OSRS Account Security Guide 2026 — Don't Lose Your Bank 
Thousands of hours of progress disappear every day because of weak security. A 15-minute setup prevents 99% of hacks. Here's exactly what to do.

Security Checklist (Print This) 

1. Why Account Security Matters 
Old School RuneScape accounts are high-value targets for hackers. A maxed main with 2B+ bank is worth hundreds of dollars on the black market. Even mid-level accounts with 50M-100M GP are regularly targeted.

The Reality Check 
Security Layer Protection Level Setup Time 
Jagex Account Blocks 90%+ of attacks 5 minutes 
2FA (Authenticator) Blocks unauthorized logins 3 minutes 
Bank PIN Protects bank even if hacked 2 minutes 
Secure Email + 2FA Prevents account recovery abuse 10 minutes 
All Layers Combined Nearly impenetrable ~20 minutes total

Bottom line: 20 minutes of setup versus potentially thousands of hours lost. The math is simple. 

2. Jagex Account — Upgrade NOW If You Haven't 
In 2023, Jagex introduced Jagex Accounts — a modern authentication system that replaces the old username/password login. As of 2026, this is the single most important security upgrade you can make.
title: OSRS Account Security Guide 2026 — Protect Your Account From Hackers

text:
sername/password login. As of 2026, this is the single most important security upgrade you can make. 
Why Jagex Accounts Are Superior 
No more recovery questions — hackers can't social-engineer their way in 
Backup codes — 10 one-time codes to recover access if you lose 2FA device 
Multi-character support — up to 20 characters under one secure login 
Login notifications — email alerts for new device logins 
Mandatory 2FA — authenticator app is required, not optional
title: OSRS Account Security Guide 2026 — Protect Your Account From Hackers

— email alerts for new device logins 
Mandatory 2FA — authenticator app is required, not optional 
No username login — your login name is never exposed publicly 
How to Upgrade 
Go to account settings on the RuneScape website 
Click "Upgrade to Jagex Account" 
Follow the migration wizard (takes <5 minutes) 
Set up your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, or Microsoft Authenticator) 
Save your 10 backup codes in a safe place (NOT on your computer!) 
Verify your email address

Verify your email address 
Critical Warning 
Write down your backup codes on paper. Store them somewhere physical — a notebook, a drawer, or a safe. If you lose your phone AND your backup codes, Jagex CANNOT recover your account. This is by design — the security is so strong that even Jagex can't bypass it.

3. Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) Setup 
If you're still on a legacy account (haven't upgraded to Jagex Account), you MUST enable the RuneScape Authenticator immediately. 
Setup Instructions 
Download an authenticator app: Google Authenticator , Authy , or Microsoft Authenticator 
Log into your RuneScape account on the website 
Go to Account Settings → Authenticator

4. Bank PIN — Your Last Line of Defense 
Even if a hacker somehow gets into your account, a Bank PIN prevents them from accessing your bank. This is your absolute last line of defense — do NOT skip it. 
How to Set Your Bank PIN 
Talk to any banker in OSRS 
Select "I'd like to check my PIN settings" 
Set a 4-digit PIN (don't use your birth year, 1234, or other obvious numbers)
title: OSRS Account Security Guide 2026 — Protect Your Account From Hackers

text:
ck my PIN settings" 
Set a 4-digit PIN (don't use your birth year, 1234, or other obvious numbers) 
Choose 7-day recovery delay (maximum security) 
Bank PIN Settings — What the Delays Mean 
Setting Security Inconvenience 
3-day recovery Low Minimal — but hackers only need to wait 3 days 
7-day recovery Maximum If you forget PIN, you wait a week. Worth it. 
Always choose 7-day recovery. If you forget your PIN, waiting a week is annoying but losing your entire bank is devastating.

Never Share Your PIN 
Jagex moderators will NEVER ask for your bank PIN. Anyone asking for your PIN — in-game, on Discord, via email, anywhere — is a scammer. No exceptions. 

5. Strong Password Strategy 
A weak password is the easiest entry point for hackers. Here's what makes a password strong in 2026.
title: OSRS Account Security Guide 2026 — Protect Your Account From Hackers

text:
A weak password is the easiest entry point for hackers. Here's what makes a password strong in 2026. 
Password Rules 
Minimum 16 characters — length beats complexity 
Use a password manager (Bitwarden, 1Password, KeePass) — don't try to memorize unique passwords 
Never reuse passwords — if one site gets breached, all accounts with that password are vulnerable 
Avoid personal info — no birthdays, pet names, favorite sports teams

6. Email Security — The Most Overlooked Layer 
Your email is the master key to your RuneScape account. If a hacker controls your email, they can disable your authenticator, change your password, and lock you out completely.
title: OSRS Account Security Guide 2026 — Protect Your Account From Hackers

your email, they can disable your authenticator, change your password, and lock you out completely. This is the #1 attack vector for OSRS account theft. 
Email Security Checklist 
Enable 2FA on your email — Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo all support it. This is NON-NEGOTIABLE. 
Use a unique password — your email password must be different from EVERY other password you use 
Check recovery email/phone — make sure these are up to date

Create a dedicated email — consider a separate email address used ONLY for RuneScape 
Pro Tip: Dedicated RS Email 
Create a Gmail account used exclusively for RuneScape. Never use it for anything else. Don't give it to friends, don't register on fan sites with it, don't use it for Discord.

7. Account Recovery Configuration 
For legacy accounts (non-Jagex Account), recovery questions are critical. For Jagex Accounts, backup codes serve this purpose.

Treat recovery answers like passwords — random, unique, stored in password manager 
Keep your registered email current 
Jagex Account Backup Codes

Phishing is the #1 way OSRS accounts get hacked .

8. Phishing & Scam Awareness 
Phishing is the #1 way OSRS accounts get hacked . Hackers create fake websites that look exactly like the RuneScape login page, tricking you into entering your credentials — including 2FA codes. 
Common Phishing Tactics 
Tactic How It Works Red Flag 
Fake Forum Links Link to "rs-forums.runescape.com" or similar URL is NOT runescape.com 
Double XP Scams "Double XP Weekend!
title: OSRS Account Security Guide 2026 — Protect Your Account From Hackers

text:
o "rs-forums.runescape.com" or similar URL is NOT runescape.com 
Double XP Scams "Double XP Weekend! Click here to activate!" Jagex never requires you to click external links for events 
Fake Streams Fake Twitch/YouTube streams with "quitting" giveaways Asks you to log in via external link 
Discord PMs Random DM with "check out this OSRS tool" Unsolicited DMs from strangers 
Email Phishing Fake Jagex emails about "suspicious activity" Check sender address — only @jagex.com is real
title: OSRS Account Security Guide 2026 — Protect Your Account From Hackers

text:
shing Fake Jagex emails about "suspicious activity" Check sender address — only @jagex.com is real 
How to Never Get Phished 
Bookmark the real RuneScape site — never navigate to it through links 
Check every URL carefully — runescape.com vs runescape.co vs runescape-forums.com 
Never click links in Discord/email — even from "friends" (their account might be compromised) 
Jagex never asks for your password — any message asking for credentials is fake

Jagex never asks for your password — any message asking for credentials is fake 
Use the official RuneLite launcher — only download from runelite.net 

9. Linked Accounts — Steam, Google, Apple 
Linking your OSRS account to Steam, Google, or Apple can be convenient, but it also creates additional attack surfaces . If your Steam account is compromised, your OSRS account might be too.
title: OSRS Account Security Guide 2026 — Protect Your Account From Hackers

Best Practices for Linked Accounts 
Only link accounts that are equally secured (2FA on Steam/Google/Apple too) 
Review linked accounts in your Jagex Account settings regularly 
Remove any linked accounts you no longer use 
Steam Guard is mandatory if you link Steam — enable it

10. Common OSRS Scams (2026 Edition) 
Beyond account phishing, there are in-game scams designed to steal your items or GP directly. Knowing these is half the battle. 
Scam How It Works How to Avoid 
Trust Trade / "Doubling Money" Scammer offers to double your GP. Takes your money and logs out. If it sounds too good to be true, it is. Always.

text:
s to double your GP. Takes your money and logs out. If it sounds too good to be true, it is. Always. 
Item Switching In trade screen, swaps valuable item for cheap lookalike at last second Always check second trade screen carefully 
Anti-Lure / "I Know a Trick" "This guy tried to lure me, but I know how to anti-lure him" — the anti-lure IS the lure Walk away from any conversation about luring

If the worst happens, act immediately . Every minute counts.

11. What To Do If You Get Hacked 
If the worst happens, act immediately . Every minute counts. 
Immediate Actions (Minutes 0-5) 
Change your email password first — this is how they'll maintain access 
Enable 2FA on your email if it wasn't already 
Change your RuneScape password 
End all active sessions from account settings 
Check linked accounts — hackers often link their own Steam/Google account 
Short-Term Actions (Hours 0-24)
title: OSRS Account Security Guide 2026 — Protect Your Account From Hackers

text:
nked accounts — hackers often link their own Steam/Google account 
Short-Term Actions (Hours 0-24) 
Scan your computer for malware/keyloggers (Malwarebytes is free and effective) 
Check your email's "sent" folder — hackers may have used it to compromise other accounts 
Review bank transaction history on RuneScape website 
Report the hack to Jagex through the official support page 
Important Reality Check 
Jagex's Policy on Lost Items 
Jagex does not return lost items from hacked accounts.

Jagex's Policy on Lost Items 
Jagex does not return lost items from hacked accounts. Their policy is clear: account security is the player's responsibility. If your items are gone, they're gone. This is why prevention is everything.

Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 
You've got 5M GP, 43 Prayer, and a weapon. Now it's time to kill your first boss for real money. Barrows is the best entry-level boss in OSRS — low requirements, consistent profit, and it teaches you the core skills (prayer switching, resource management, boss mechanics) that you'll use at every boss in the game. Here's exactly how to start.

1. The Quick Answer — Can You Do Barrows? 
Yes. If you have these stats, you can start today: 
Minimum Stats to Start Barrows 
50+ Magic — For Iban's Blast (your main damage spell) 
43 Prayer — Protect from Melee/Missiles/Magic (essential for survival) 
The Nature Spirit quest — Required for Morytania access 
Underground Pass quest — Required for Iban's Staff 
~500K GP — For your gear setup (you have this from Phase 2.3) 
That's it.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
Required for Iban's Staff 
~500K GP — For your gear setup (you have this from Phase 2.3) 
That's it. You don't need 70 combat, you don't need expensive gear, and you don't need maxed stats. Barrows is designed to be accessible to new members — and it's profitable from your very first chest. 

2. What Is Barrows? The Overview 
Barrows is a combat minigame in Morytania where you fight the 6 Barrows Brothers — undead warriors buried in crypts beneath the landscape.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
nia where you fight the 6 Barrows Brothers — undead warriors buried in crypts beneath the landscape. After defeating all 6, you loot the chest in the center tunnel for a chance at their powerful armor pieces. 
The Brothers 
Ahrim (mage), Karil (range), Guthan (melee/heal), Dharok (melee/high damage), Torag (melee/defense drain), Verac (melee/ignore prayer). Each uses a different attack style. 

The Reward 
Barrows armor pieces (helms, bodies, legs, weapons) worth 50K to 5M+ GP each .
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
style. 

The Reward 
Barrows armor pieces (helms, bodies, legs, weapons) worth 50K to 5M+ GP each . Blood runes, death runes, chaos runes, bolt racks, and coins from every chest. 

Run Time 
A full run (kill 6 brothers + loot chest) takes 5-10 minutes for beginners. Experienced players do it in 3-4 minutes. You can do 8-15 runs per hour. 

Why It's Perfect for You 
Barrows teaches prayer switching, resource management, and boss mechanics — the foundation of all OSRS PvM.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
teaches prayer switching, resource management, and boss mechanics — the foundation of all OSRS PvM. It's your training ground before Vorkath, Zulrah, and Raids. 

3. Requirements & Quests You Need 
Before your first Barrows run, complete these quests in order: 
Required Quests (Do These First) 
Priest in Peril — Unlocks Morytania. No requirements. 20 minutes. 
Nature Spirit — Unlocks the swamp and blesses your Silver Sickle. Requires Priest in Peril. 30 minutes.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
ure Spirit — Unlocks the swamp and blesses your Silver Sickle. Requires Priest in Peril. 30 minutes. 
Animal Magnetism — Unlocks Ava's Accumulator (ammo retrieval). Saves money on ranged ammo. Requires 30 Ranging, 35 Crafting. 
Underground Pass — Unlocks Iban's Staff , your primary Barrows weapon. Requires 25 Ranging. 1-2 hours. Must-do. 
After Underground Pass: Immediately upgrade Iban's Staff at the Dark Mage in the Well of Voyage (after the quest).
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
und Pass: Immediately upgrade Iban's Staff at the Dark Mage in the Well of Voyage (after the quest). This gives it 25 charges instead of 120 (but each cast hits harder). It's the best Barrows weapon until Trident of the Seas. 

Highly Recommended (Not Required) 
In Aid of the Myreque — Unlocks the Burgh de Rott shortcut (faster travel to Barrows). 30 minutes. 
Darkness of Hallowvale — Unlocks the Meiyerditch Labs shortcut. Longer quest but very useful.

Darkness of Hallowvale — Unlocks the Meiyerditch Labs shortcut. Longer quest but very useful. 
Morytania Diary Tier 2 — Gives 50% more runes from the Barrows chest. This is a massive profit boost. Requires some skill levels but absolutely worth pursuing. 

4. The Budget Gear Setup (~500K Total) 
You don't need expensive gear. Here's the cheapest setup that works — everything costs under 500K total: 
Weapon & Shield 
Iban's Staff (upgraded) — Free after Underground Pass.

Anti-dragon shield — Free from Duke Horacio. No ranged defense needed since you'll pray against Karil.

Pro Tip — Iban's vs Trident 
Iban's Staff is the undisputed king of budget Barrows. At 1.2M GP, the Trident of the Seas is the upgrade path — it auto-casts, uses cheaper runes, and hits more consistently. But Iban's max hit is actually higher than an uncharged Trident. Stick with Iban's until you can comfortably afford a Trident.

5. Inventory Setup — What to Bring 
Standard Barrows Inventory 
Spade — Required to dig into the mounds. Don't forget this. Every Barrows player has forgotten this at least once. 
Prayer potions (4 doses): 3-4 — Your lifeline. Each dose restores ~31 prayer points at 43 Prayer. You'll use 1-2 doses per run. 
Food (lobsters or better): 6-8 — For emergency healing when you mess up prayer switches.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
s per run. 
Food (lobsters or better): 6-8 — For emergency healing when you mess up prayer switches. Monkfish are best value (16 GP/HP healed). 
Runes for Iban's Blast: Death rune (1) + Fire rune (5) per cast. Bring 200+ death runes and 1000+ fire runes per trip. 
Teleport out: Ring of Dueling (Castle Wars bank) or Ectophial. You'll need to bank and restock after 4-6 runs. 
Super restore (1-2) — Restores prayer + stats if you get stat-drained by the brothers.

Iban's Blast: ~25 casts/brother × 6 brothers = ~150 casts 
Death runes: 150 × 1 = 150 death runes (~22K GP) 
Fire runes: 150 × 5 = 750 fire runes (~6K GP) 
Total rune cost per run: ~28K GP 
Prayer potion cost per run: ~15K GP (2 doses) 
Total supply cost per run: ~43K GP

The chest's average value (including runes + bolt racks + potential armor) is 80K-120K per run , so you profit 37K-77K per run even without an armor drop. 

6. How to Get to Barrows 
There are several ways to reach the Barrows. Here are the best options for new members, ordered by speed: 
Method 1: Barrows Teleport Tab (Fastest) 
Buy Barrows teleport tabs from the GE (~1.5K GP each).
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
d: 
Method 1: Barrows Teleport Tab (Fastest) 
Buy Barrows teleport tabs from the GE (~1.5K GP each). Click the tab and you're there. This is the best method for speed runners. The GP cost is negligible compared to the profit per run. 

Method 2: Mort'ton via Minigame Teleport (Free) 
Open your minigame menu → Shades of Mort'ton → Teleport. You land in Mort'ton, just south of Barrows. Run north to the mounds. Free and reliable.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

→ Teleport. You land in Mort'ton, just south of Barrows. Run north to the mounds. Free and reliable. 

Method 3: Ectophial + Run (Free) 
Use the Ectophial (from Ghosts Ahoy quest) to teleport to the Ectofuntus. Run west through the swamp to Mort'ton, then north to Barrows. Takes 3-4 minutes. Good backup method. 

Method 4: Morytania Legs + Burgh de Rott (Shortcut) 
After completing In Aid of the Myreque, use the Burgh de Rott bank and run north through the Myreque hideout shortcut.

7. The 6 Brothers — Kill Order & Strategy 
Each brother has a different combat style. The key to Barrows is using the right protection prayer before they attack you . Here's the optimal kill order and strategy: 
Recommended Kill Order 
Dharok (melee) — Kill him first because his damage increases as his HP drops.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
ecommended Kill Order 
Dharok (melee) — Kill him first because his damage increases as his HP drops. At low HP, he can hit 60+ through prayer if you lag. Get him out of the way. 
Guthan (melee) — Heals off your hits. Kill early before he drains too much of your food. 
Verac (melee) — Hits through prayer occasionally. Manageable but annoying. 
Torag (melee) — Drains your agility. Low priority but easy kill. 
Karil (ranged) — Switch to Protect from Missiles. He hits hard with his crossbow.

ty but easy kill. 
Karil (ranged) — Switch to Protect from Missiles. He hits hard with his crossbow. 
Ahrim (magic) — Switch to Protect from Magic. Last because magic attacks are easiest to predict and dodge. 

Dharok the Wretched 
Prayer: Protect from Melee. Threat: VERY HIGH. His max hit scales with missing HP — at 1 HP, he can hit 60+. Never let your prayer drop against Dharok. If your prayer is low, drink a dose BEFORE fighting him. 

Guthan the Infested 
Prayer: Protect from Melee.

prayer is low, drink a dose BEFORE fighting him. 

Guthan the Infested

Verac the Defiled 
Prayer: Protect from Melee. Threat: Medium. 25% chance to ignore your protection prayer and hit through it. Bring extra food for Verac hits. 

Torag the Corrupted 
Prayer: Protect from Melee. Threat: Low.

Pro Tip — Kill in the Crypt 
When you dig into a mound, the brother spawns in a small crypt room. Turn on your prayer BEFORE you open the sarcophagus. The brother attacks instantly when you search it.

rn on your prayer BEFORE you open the sarcophagus. The brother attacks instantly when you search it. If you're already praying, you take zero damage on the first hit. 

8. Prayer Switching — The Skill That Keeps You Alive 
Prayer switching is the single most important skill you'll learn at Barrows, and it transfers to every boss in OSRS. Here's how to do it: 
Prayer Switching Basics 
Always have your Prayer book open — Keep it on your screen at all times.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
: 
Prayer Switching Basics 
Always have your Prayer book open — Keep it on your screen at all times. You need to see the prayers to click them fast. 
Switch BEFORE the attack animation — When you see the brother start their attack animation, switch your prayer. The game checks your prayer at the moment the hit registers, not when the animation starts. 
Melee brothers = Protect from Melee — Dharok, Guthan, Verac, Torag all use melee. Keep this on for the first 4 brothers.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

tect from Melee — Dharok, Guthan, Verac, Torag all use melee. Keep this on for the first 4 brothers. 
Karil = Protect from Missiles — Switch to range protection when you enter Karil's crypt. 
Ahrim = Protect from Magic — Switch to magic protection for Ahrim. 
Between brothers: keep melee prayer on — In the tunnels, random brothers can spawn. Default to Protect from Melee since 4 of 6 brothers are melee.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

e tunnels, random brothers can spawn. Default to Protect from Melee since 4 of 6 brothers are melee. 

Prayer Point Management 
Each protection prayer drains 1 point every 3 seconds at 43 Prayer 
A full run takes 5-8 minutes = roughly 100-160 prayer points drained 
With 43 Prayer (43 points), you can sustain about 2 minutes of constant prayer 
You'll need 2-3 prayer doses per run (restores 93-139 points) 
Tip: Only turn on prayer when fighting a brother.

Pro Tip — Quick Prayers 
Set up Quick Prayers: Protect from Melee + Mystic Might (or Eagle Eye for range). This lets you activate both with one click instead of two. Set this up in your Prayer menu before your first run. It saves hundreds of clicks per hour.

9. The Tunnels — Navigating to the Chest 
After killing all 6 brothers above ground, one of them will have spawned in the tunnels below. Find the hidden door and navigate to the center room to loot the chest. 
Tunnel Navigation Guide 
Find the entrance — After killing all 6 brothers, the mound with the tunnel entrance has a different examine text.

nce — After killing all 6 brothers, the mound with the tunnel entrance has a different examine text. Dig in the mound of the brother you didn't find above ground — or just check each mound until you find the stairs. 
Navigate the maze — The tunnels are a simple maze. There are 4 possible maze layouts. Head toward the center room (the chest room).

Kill the tunnel brother — One brother spawns in the tunnels. Kill him (with prayer!) before looting the chest. 
Loot the chest — Search the chest for your reward.

The more brothers you kill before looting the chest, the better your loot. Killing all 6 brothers gives the maximum chance for Barrows items. If you skip a brother, you lose their potential drop.

11. GP/Hr Analysis — How Much You Really Make 
Let's break down the real numbers. No inflated estimates — here's what you can expect: 
Per-Run Breakdown 
Average rune/bolt/coin loot: ~30K GP 
Average armor drop value (1/17 chance): ~130K per drop ÷ 17 runs = ~7.6K GP per chest average 
Supply cost per run: ~43K GP (runes + prayer potions) 
Net profit per run (no armor drop): 30K - 43K = -13K GP (you lose a little)
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
nes + prayer potions) 
Net profit per run (no armor drop): 30K - 43K = -13K GP (you lose a little) 
Net profit per run (with average armor drop factored in): 30K + 7.6K - 43K = -5.4K GP 
Wait, negative profit? Not quite — the numbers above are conservative. With Morytania Diary 2 (50% more runes) and Ring of Wealth , the rune value jumps to 45K+ per chest. And high-value drops skew the average.

and Ring of Wealth , the rune value jumps to 45K+ per chest. And high-value drops skew the average. 

Realistic GP/Hr (After All Costs) 
Beginner (no diary, budget gear): 500K-800K GP/hr after supplies 
Intermediate (Morytania Diary 2, Iban's): 800K-1.2M GP/hr 
Experienced (Trident, Morytania 2, efficient routes): 1.2M-2M GP/hr 
Even at the lowest level, Barrows is one of the best GP/hr activities available to new members .

Even at the lowest level, Barrows is one of the best GP/hr activities available to new members . And it only gets better as you upgrade your gear and diary completions. 

Pro Tip — Morytania Diary 2 Changes Everything 
Morytania Diary Tier 2 gives 50% more runes from the Barrows chest . This turns a marginal activity into a consistently profitable one. If you're serious about Barrows, make getting Morytania Diary 2 your first priority.

profitable one. If you're serious about Barrows, make getting Morytania Diary 2 your first priority. It requires: Completion of In Aid of the Myreque, 40 Agility, 50 Construction, 50 Slayer, and some other skills. Do it within your first 2 weeks of membership. 

12. Gear Upgrades — Scaling Your Runs 
As you earn more GP from Barrows and other methods, upgrade your setup in this order for maximum impact: 
Upgrade Priority List 
Occult Necklace (800K) — +10% magic damage.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
n this order for maximum impact: 
Upgrade Priority List 
Occult Necklace (800K) — +10% magic damage. The single biggest DPS upgrade for Iban's Blast. Pays for itself in faster runs within days. 
Morytania Legs 2 (free, requires diary) — 50% more runes from chest. Not gear, but the biggest profit upgrade possible. 
Ancient Magick Book (free after Desert Treasure) — Gives access to Blood spells for free healing. Saves food and prayer potions.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
ter Desert Treasure) — Gives access to Blood spells for free healing. Saves food and prayer potions. 
Trident of the Seas (1.2M) — Auto-casts, cheaper per cast, consistent damage. The quality-of-life upgrade that makes Barrows feel smooth. 
Barrows armor from your drops (free!) — Use any Barrows body/legs you get as armor for future runs. Ahrim's or Karil's sets are great for magic/range. 
Dragon Defender (free after Warrior's Guild) — For melee phase against Ahrim if you range him.

nge. 
Dragon Defender (free after Warrior's Guild) — For melee phase against Ahrim if you range him. 
Imbued Ring of Wealth (requires NMZ points) — Better rare drop table access. Marginal but free if you're doing NMZ anyway. 

13. Common Mistakes That Cost You GP 
The 7 Deadly Sins of Barrows 
Forgetting your spade. You literally cannot enter the crypts without one. Keep it in your inventory at all times. Bank it? No. Just keep it. Forever. 
Not praying before opening the sarcophagus.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
ntory at all times. Bank it? No. Just keep it. Forever. 
Not praying before opening the sarcophagus. The brother attacks instantly. One hit from Dharok at full damage can kill you. Always pray first. 
Running out of prayer mid-fight. Watch your prayer points. If you're below 10, drink a dose before the next brother. Dying wastes 5+ minutes of running back. 
Wrong protection prayer. Protect from Melee doesn't help against Karil or Ahrim. Switch prayers to match the brother's attack style.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
from Melee doesn't help against Karil or Ahrim. Switch prayers to match the brother's attack style. 
Skipping brothers. Each brother you skip reduces your chance of getting their armor drop by ~16%. Always kill all 6. 
Not using the Ring of Wealth. It improves the rare drop table (including Barrows items). The DPS loss from not wearing a Berserker Ring is tiny compared to the loot improvement. 
Walking back instead of teleporting. Use Ring of Dueling or Ectophial to bank.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
he loot improvement. 
Walking back instead of teleporting. Use Ring of Dueling or Ectophial to bank. Walking through the swamp wastes 3-4 minutes per trip. That's 4-6 fewer runs per hour. 

14. FAQ 
How many Iban's Staff charges do I need per run? 
Upgraded Iban's Staff has 2,500 charges. Each cast uses 1 charge. With ~150 casts per run (25 per brother × 6), you can do ~16 runs per full recharge . Recharging costs 80K GP at the Dark Mage — factor this into your supply costs (5K/run additional).
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
. Recharging costs 80K GP at the Dark Mage — factor this into your supply costs (5K/run additional). 

Should I use magic or melee against the brothers? 
Magic (Iban's Blast) against all melee brothers and Karil. Ranged against Ahrim (he has high magic defense but low ranged defense). Most beginners just use Iban's against everyone for simplicity — it works fine. 

What if I die at Barrows? 
Your items appear on the floor for 60 minutes (not the normal 15). You can run back and pick them up.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
our items appear on the floor for 60 minutes (not the normal 15). You can run back and pick them up. But your supplies (runes, food) are gone. Always bring a teleport and don't risk items you can't afford to lose. 

Is Barrows good for Ironmen? 
Absolutely. Barrows is one of the best Ironman money-makers because you can't buy the armor — you have to earn it. The blood runes are also essential for Ironman spellcasting. Ironmen should prioritize Barrows even more than regular accounts.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
sential for Ironman spellcasting. Ironmen should prioritize Barrows even more than regular accounts. 

When should I move on from Barrows? 
Barrows stays profitable forever, but once you hit 80+ combat with 70+ Ranged and 70+ Magic , you should start mixing in Vorkath (1.5-3M GP/hr) and Zulrah (2-4M GP/hr). Barrows is still worth doing as a semi-AFK option or when you're learning new bosses. 

Does Barrows combat level scale? 
No. The brothers have fixed combat levels regardless of your level.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
oes Barrows combat level scale? 
No. The brothers have fixed combat levels regardless of your level. Dharok is always level 115, Karil is always level 98, etc. Higher stats make you faster, but the brothers don't get harder. This means Barrows is one of the few activities where being low-level doesn't significantly hurt your GP/hr. 

How do I recharge Iban's Staff? 
Return to the Dark Mage in the Well of Voyage (inside the Underground Pass, after Iban's throne room).
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

text:
turn to the Dark Mage in the Well of Voyage (inside the Underground Pass, after Iban's throne room). Pay 80K GP to recharge the upgraded staff to 2,500 charges. Alternatively, use the Flamtaer Brace from Shades of Mort'ton for free recharges (slower, requires minigame). 

Next in the Series: 2.5 — Your First 99: Fastest Skill to Max 
You've got gear, you've got GP, and you've killed your first boss. Now it's time for the iconic milestone: your first 99.
title: Barrows Guide for New OSRS Members 2026 — Your First Boss GP

ve got GP, and you've killed your first boss. Now it's time for the iconic milestone: your first 99. We'll cover the fastest and cheapest skills to 99 for new members, optimal training methods at each level range, and how to turn your 99 into even more GP .

15. FAQ 
What order should I do quests in? 
Follow the 2-week roadmap above : Waterfall -> Fight Arena -> Witch's House -> Death Plateau -> Tree Gnome quests -> Priest in Peril -> Lost City -> Monkey Madness -> Recipe for Disaster. This order maximizes reward stacking and minimizes backtracking. 

Should I do all quests or just the important ones? 
Eventually, do all of them.
title: Best Quests for New OSRS Members 2026 — Complete Roadmap

text:
izes backtracking. 

Should I do all quests or just the important ones? 
Eventually, do all of them. Many quests have XP rewards and unlock content you'll need later. But prioritize the 10 on this list first — they give the biggest immediate impact. Come back to the rest when you need specific unlocks. 

Can Ironmen follow this same roadmap? 
Yes! In fact, questing is even more important for Ironmen because you can't buy gear — you must unlock it through quests.
title: Best Quests for New OSRS Members 2026 — Complete Roadmap

text:
g is even more important for Ironmen because you can't buy gear — you must unlock it through quests. The roadmap is identical, though Ironmen may need to gather supplies manually instead of buying them. 

What combat level do I need for Monkey Madness? 
Theoretically level 40+ with Protect from Magic. Realistically, 50+ combat with 43 Prayer makes it comfortable. The Jungle Demon is level 195 but can be safespotted and tanked by NPCs.

rayer makes it comfortable. The Jungle Demon is level 195 but can be safespotted and tanked by NPCs. 

How do I get Barrows Gloves fast? 
Recipe for Disaster requires many pre-quests and skill levels. Use the Quest Cape Roadmap to plan an efficient route. Most players get Barrows Gloves around 2-4 weeks after buying membership. 

Do quests give Quest Points? What are they for? 
Yes — most quests award 1-3 Quest Points.

ership. 

Do quests give Quest Points? What are they for? 
Yes — most quests award 1-3 Quest Points. You need 175 Quest Points for the Quest Cape, 32 for Dragon Slayer 2, and various amounts for other unlocks. They also unlock the Tears of Guthix minigame (free weekly XP).

Quest Overview & Lore 
The Blood Moon Rises is the epic conclusion to the Myreque questline, which began in 2005 with In Search of the Myreque . After years of battling Vyrewatches, uncovering the secrets of the Myreque, and defeating Vanstrom Klause, you'll finally face the ultimate threat: the Blood Moon avatar itself.

The Myreque have been fighting a secret war against the Vyrewatches and the Vampyres of Morytania.

Step 1: Speak to Veliaf Hurtz 
Go to the Myreque Hideout in Canifis (talk to the Myreque member outside the swamp to enter). 
Speak to Veliaf Hurtz (he's near the back of the hideout). 
He'll tell you that the Blood Moon is rising and you must stop it.

Veliaf gives you the Blood Moon Talisman (key item). 
Travel to the Blood Moon Temple (new area, unlocked during quest). 
Use the Blood Moon Talisman on the temple altar to enter. 
You'll be transported to the Blood Moon Dimension (instanced area).

Inside the temple, you'll find 3 Lunar Altars (Sun, Moon, Blood). 
Puzzle: Align the altars to weaken the Blood Moon avatar. 
Solution (Spoiler): Activate Sun altar first, then Moon, then Blood. Wait for the correct phase (full moon) to activate Blood altar.

The Blood Moon avatar fight is a multi-phase boss battle. Here's a detailed strategy for each phase. 
Phase 1: The Avatar's First Form (HP 1000-700) 
Attack Style: Melee (slash attacks). 
Prayer: Protect from Melee (reduces damage by 80%). 
Weapon: Blisterwood Weapon (staff or sword). Other weapons do -50% damage. 
Special Attack: Blood Drain — Drains 20% of your current prayer points. Bring extra prayer potions! 
Strategy: Tank with Protect from Melee, attack with Blisterwood.

oints. Bring extra prayer potions! 
Strategy: Tank with Protect from Melee, attack with Blisterwood. When your prayer gets low, drink a prayer potion. When your HP gets low, eat food. 
Enrage: At 75% HP, the avatar gains +10% damage. Slightly harder, but still manageable. 
Phase 2: The Avatar's True Form (HP 700-0) 
Attack Style: Magic (blood spells) + Melee (switch every 10 seconds). 
Prayer: Switch between Protect from Magic and Protect from Melee every 10 seconds.

Puzzle Solutions 
The Blood Moon Rises has several puzzles. Here are the solutions (spoilers!). 
Puzzle 1: The Lunar Altar Alignment 
Objective: Align the 3 Lunar Altars to weaken the Blood Moon avatar. 
Solution: 
Activate the Sun Altar first (gives +10% damage bonus).
title: OSRS The Blood Moon Rises Quest Guide 2026 — Complete Walkthrough - OSRSGuru

text:
to weaken the Blood Moon avatar. 
Solution: 
Activate the Sun Altar first (gives +10% damage bonus). 
Activate the Moon Altar second (gives +10% defence bonus). 
Wait for the Full Moon phase (check the lunar cycle in the quest interface). 
Activate the Blood Altar during Full Moon (weakens the avatar by 20%). 
Wrong Order Penalty: If you activate in wrong order, the avatar enrages (+20% damage). You can redo the puzzle, but it costs 10K GP to reset.
title: OSRS The Blood Moon Rises Quest Guide 2026 — Complete Walkthrough - OSRSGuru

text:
rong order, the avatar enrages (+20% damage). You can redo the puzzle, but it costs 10K GP to reset. 
Puzzle 2: The Collapsing Temple (Agility) 
Objective: Escape the collapsing temple within 60 seconds. 
Solution (Step-by-Step): 
Jump the Gap: Click the "Jump" option (3-tile gap). Need Agility 50+ (or fail). 
Crawl Under Rocks: Click the "Crawl" option (takes 2 seconds). Timing: crawl when rocks are NOT falling. 
Run Across Beam: Click the "Run" option (5-tile beam).
title: OSRS The Blood Moon Rises Quest Guide 2026 — Complete Walkthrough - OSRSGuru

text:
). Timing: crawl when rocks are NOT falling. 
Run Across Beam: Click the "Run" option (5-tile beam). Use Stamina Potion if low run energy. 
Final Jump: Jump to the exit (5-tile gap). Need Agility 60+ (or fail). 
Tip: If you fail any obstacle, you take 30 damage and restart that obstacle. Use Agility Potions if your Agility is low. 
Puzzle 3: The Blood Moon Seal (Memory Game) 
Objective: Memorize and repeat the sequence of blood runes. 
Solution: The sequence is random each run.

💡 Puzzle Tip: For the Memory Game, use a piece of paper to write the sequence. Don't rely on memory alone!

text:
void Them 
Even experienced players make mistakes in The Blood Moon Rises. Here's how to avoid them. 
Mistake 1: Not Bringing a Blisterwood Weapon 
The Mistake: Using a regular weapon for the boss fight (does -50% damage). The Fix: Always bring a Blisterwood Weapon (staff or sword). It's required! 
Mistake 2: Running Out of Prayer Potions 
The Mistake: Not bringing enough prayer potions (boss drains prayer!). The Fix: Bring 10+ prayer potions (4-dose). Better safe than sorry.
title: OSRS The Blood Moon Rises Quest Guide 2026 — Complete Walkthrough - OSRSGuru

text:
r potions (boss drains prayer!). The Fix: Bring 10+ prayer potions (4-dose). Better safe than sorry. 
Mistake 3: Failing the Agility Puzzle (Collapsing Temple) 
The Mistake: Low Agility (under 50) and failing obstacles. The Fix: Train Agility to 50+ before quest. Use Agility Potions if low. 
Mistake 4: Not Wearing Anti-Poison 
The Mistake: Getting poisoned by the avatar and dying. The Fix: Bring Superantipoison (or Anti-venom).

e Mistake: Getting poisoned by the avatar and dying. The Fix: Bring Superantipoison (or Anti-venom). Drink it before the fight! 
Mistake 5: Forgetting to Upgrade Blisterwood Staff to Sword 
The Mistake: Using the slow staff in the boss fight. The Fix: After the quest, upgrade to Blisterwood Sword (faster attacks). It's worth the 1M GP! 
⚠️ Final Warning: The Blood Moon avatar fight is challenging. Don't underestimate it! Bring plenty of food, prayer potions, and your best gear.

Frequently Asked Questions 
Q: Can I do this quest on my F2P account? 
A: No, The Blood Moon Rises is a members-only quest. You need P2P (bond or membership). 
Q: What's the hardest part of the quest? 
A: The Blood Moon avatar boss fight (Phase 2 especially). It requires good gear, supplies, and prayer management. 
Q: Can I solo the boss fight? 
A: Yes, but it's challenging.

Q: Can I solo the boss fight?

Q: How long does the quest take? 
A: Approximately 2-4 hours (depending on your skill and if you get stuck on puzzles). 
Q: Is the Blisterwood Sword better than the Staff? 
A: Yes! The sword has faster attack speed (same DPS, but quicker hits). Upgrade to sword after the quest.

Q: Can I get the Blood Moon Amulet if I lose it?

What Are Combat Achievements? 
Combat Achievements (CAs) are a system of optional challenges introduced to OSRS in 2022 that reward players for accomplishing specific combat feats. Similar to Achievement Diaries, they are divided into tiers, and each completed tier grants unique rewards.
title: OSRS Combat Achievements Complete Guide 2026 — From Easy to Grandmaster - OSRSGuru

text:
to Achievement Diaries, they are divided into tiers, and each completed tier grants unique rewards. 
The system tracks your progress across all bosses and monsters in the game, encouraging you to learn new content and improve your PvM skills. 
How to Access Combat Achievements 
Click the skull icon (⚔️) in your game interface (next to the Quest icon) 
Alternatively, use the game setting "Combat achievements" to enable the tracker 
Talk to Ghommal at the Warrior's Guild to claim rewards
title: OSRS Combat Achievements Complete Guide 2026 — From Easy to Grandmaster - OSRSGuru

ombat achievements" to enable the tracker 
Talk to Ghommal at the Warrior's Guild to claim rewards 
Key Features 
200+ tasks across all combat tiers 
Progress tracking for each boss (kill count, personal bests, etc.) 
Rewards that significantly help with PvM (Ghommal's hilt upgrades, Antique lamps, etc.) 
Display reel — show off your completed tasks to other players 
Tip: You don't need to complete CAs in order. Start with Easy tasks for quick rewards, then work your way up.

Why Ogress Warriors? 
Ogress Warriors in the Corsair Cove dungeon are the best AFK combat money maker in F2P . They drop rune items (full helm, battleaxe, med helm), alchable runes (nature, death, law), and noted resources. No competition for spawns because it's instanced-ish with multiple rooms.

7. Avoiding the Bond Treadmill Trap 
The Bond Treadmill is when you spend so much time earning GP for your next bond that you never actually progress your account. You log in, grind for 14 days, buy a bond, repeat — never getting better gear or higher stats. 
How to Escape the Treadmill 
Spend your first 14 days on account progression, not GP grinding.

How to Escape the Treadmill 
Spend your first 14 days on account progression, not GP grinding. Quests, skills, diaries — these permanently increase your earning potential. 
Invest at least 50% of your extra GP into gear/skills. Buying a whip (3M) increases your Slayer GP/hr. Buying prayer levels for Piety (70 Prayer) increases your DPS everywhere. These are investments, not expenses. 
Use passive income for bond funding. Herb runs and Miscellania should cover 50-80% of a bond.

9. FAQ 
Q: How long does F2P to first bond realistically take? 
About 25-35 hours of total gameplay, spread over 2-4 weeks for casual players. Dedicated players can do it in 1-2 weeks playing 3-4 hours/day. The grind tests your patience, but it's absolutely doable. 
Q: Is it better to just pay for membership? 
Honest answer: for your first month, yes.

tely doable. 
Q: Is it better to just pay for membership? 
Honest answer: for your first month, yes. $11 for 30 days lets you skip the worst part (F2P bond grind) and jump straight to making 1M+/hr in P2P. After that, sustain with bonds indefinitely. If you absolutely can't spend real money, the F2P grind is viable — just slower. 
Q: What's the fastest F2P money maker? 
High alching items with good margins (300K-500K/hr) when you have starting cash. Ogress Warriors (200K/hr) if you don't.

ith good margins (300K-500K/hr) when you have starting cash. Ogress Warriors (200K/hr) if you don't. Telegrab Zamorak wines (200K-350K/hr) if you have 33 Magic and can compete with bots for spawns. 
Q: Can I sustain bonds as a casual player (1 hour/day)? 
Yes, but barely. One hour/day = 14 hours per bond cycle. You need to average 1M/hr — which means Vorkath/Zulrah or very efficient herb run stacking. At lower GP/hr rates, you'll be on the treadmill.

Q: What if bond prices keep going up? 
Bond prices in OSRS have historically trended upward (from 3M in 2015 to 12-15M in 2026), tracking inflation. Your GP/hr also increases as your account progresses. A 2026 Vorkath kill is worth more GP than a 2020 Vorkath kill. The ratio stays roughly balanced.

Q: Can Ironmen use bonds? 
Ironmen can use bonds on another account and pay for membership, but they can't trade bonds on their Ironman. Ironmen can use bonds that were donated to them by a main account via the bond pouch system (right-click "Use" bond on Ironman).

2. Why 5M GP Matters 
5 million GP isn't a random number. It's the threshold where your account transforms from "surviving" to "progressing": 
Gear Upgrades 
5M buys you a full mid-game melee setup : Dragon Scimitar (100K), Fighter Torso (free but time), Barrows Gloves (free via quest), Berserker Ring (1.5M), and Obsidian Platelegs (350K). This gear carries you to 80+ combat.

Skill Buyables 
Construction (player-owned house), Herblore (potions for bosses), and Crafting (jewelry, Zenyte) all require GP investment. 5M funds your early Construction and key Herblore levels.

Bond Freedom 
Once you can earn 5-6M GP consistently per 2 weeks, you can pay for membership with in-game Bonds — making OSRS genuinely free-to-play at the members level. 

3. Method 1: Bird House Runs — Passive 400K+/Day 
This is the single most important money-making method for new members.
title: First 5M GP for New OSRS Members 2026 — Proven Money Makers

text:
use Runs — Passive 400K+/Day 
This is the single most important money-making method for new members. It requires almost no stats, takes 5 minutes per run, and generates consistent passive income every single day. 
GP Per Run 
~100K per run at 5 Hunter. Up to ~150K per run at 50+ Hunter. With 4 runs/day: 400K-600K GP/day . 

Requirements 
5 Hunter (start), Bone Voyage quest (for Fossil Island access). No other skills needed. Steel bar for clockwork if making your own.
title: First 5M GP for New OSRS Members 2026 — Proven Money Makers

text:
uest (for Fossil Island access). No other skills needed. Steel bar for clockwork if making your own. 

Time Per Run 
3-5 minutes. You set 4 bird houses, leave, and come back 50 minutes later. Zero active time while they fill up. 

Why It's #1 
It's pure passive income that also trains Hunter. You do 4 runs a day while doing other activities. Over a month, that's 12M-18M GP from bird houses alone — enough for a Bond.
title: First 5M GP for New OSRS Members 2026 — Proven Money Makers

doing other activities. Over a month, that's 12M-18M GP from bird houses alone — enough for a Bond. 

Step-by-Step Bird House Run 
Get to Fossil Island — Complete Bone Voyage quest (no requirements). Use the barge north of Digsite. 
Bring 4 clockwork + 4 hop seeds (barley, hammerstone, asgarnian, jute — any hop seeds work). Buy clockwork from the GE for ~200 GP each. 
Run the 4 bird house spots on Fossil Island: Mushroom Meadow (2), Verdant Valley (1), and Swamp (1). Set each one.
title: First 5M GP for New OSRS Members 2026 — Proven Money Makers

text:
house spots on Fossil Island: Mushroom Meadow (2), Verdant Valley (1), and Swamp (1). Set each one. 
Wait 50 minutes — Go do other activities. Quest, train combat, do farm runs. 
Return and harvest — Dismantle each bird house. You get bird nests (valuable: ring seeds, tree seeds), raw bird meat, and feathers. 
Repeat — Set 4 new bird houses immediately after harvesting. That's it. 
Pro move: Always keep hop seeds and clockwork in your inventory.

ately after harvesting. That's it. 
Pro move: Always keep hop seeds and clockwork in your inventory. Never leave the island without resetting your bird houses. 

Pro Tip — Bird House Upgrades 
As your Hunter level increases, upgrade your bird houses: Regular (5) → Oak (14) → Willow (24) → Teak (34) → Maple (44) → Mahogany (54) → Redwood (74) . Higher-tier houses = more valuable nests. Always use the best house you can.

4. Method 2: Herb Farming — 500K-1M Per Farm Run 
Herb farming is the second pillar of new-member income. Like bird houses, it's semi-passive: you plant, leave, and harvest later. Unlike bird houses, the profit scales dramatically with your Farming level. 
GP Per Run 
~150K at 9 Farming (Guam). ~300K at 26 Farming (Harralander). ~500K-1M at 38+ Farming (Toadflax, Snapdragon, Ranarr).

g (Guam). ~300K at 26 Farming (Harralander). ~500K-1M at 38+ Farming (Toadflax, Snapdragon, Ranarr). 2 runs/day = 300K-2M/day. 

Requirements 
9 Farming (minimum). Farming skill, seed dibber, rake, spade, and herb seeds. Completion of relevant farming quests helps. 

Growth Time 
80 minutes per growth cycle. You can do 2 full runs per hour if you're dedicated, or 2-3 runs per day casually. 

Profit per Seed 
Ranarr seed: ~60K profit/herb. Toadflax: ~40K. Snapdragon: ~80K.

er day casually. 

Profit per Seed 
Ranarr seed: ~60K profit/herb. Toadflax: ~40K. Snapdragon: ~80K. Always check GE prices before planting — herb prices fluctuate weekly. 

Step-by-Step Herb Farm Run 
Get herb patches unlocked — Start with the 4 standard patches: Ardougne, Catherby, Falador, and Port Phasmatys. Each needs raking + compost before planting. 
Buy seeds from the GE — Start with Guam seeds (9 Farming, ~100 GP each).

+ compost before planting. 
Buy seeds from the GE — Start with Guam seeds (9 Farming, ~100 GP each). Graduate to Ranarr (32 Farming, ~30K seed) or Toadflax (38 Farming, ~5K seed) ASAP. 
Use ultracompost always — It costs ~500 GP/dose but dramatically increases your yield. From 4-6 herbs to 6-9 herbs per patch. Always worth it. 
Plant, wait 80 minutes, harvest — Teleport between patches using Ardougne Cloak, Catherby tele, Falador tele, and Ectophial.

Pro Tip — Farming Profit Calculator 
The most profitable herb changes weekly based on GE prices. Before each run, check the OSRS Wiki Farming profit calculator to see which herb has the best GP/seed ratio. Toadflax is usually the sweet spot for new members — cheap seeds, decent herb value, low risk.

Trollheim patch — Unlocked after My Arm's Big Adventure quest. Never gets diseased. Free profit. 
Hosidius patch — Unlocked with 50% Hosidius favor. +5% yield bonus. 
Farming Guild patch — Requires 65 Farming and 60% Hosidius favor. Another free patch. 
Each additional patch is pure profit.

5. Method 3: Blast Furnace — 300K-600K GP/Hr 
Blast Furnace is the best active money-maker available to new members with moderate stats. You smelt bars at double speed for half the coal cost — and the margin between ore + coal and bar prices is consistently profitable. 
GP Per Hour 
Steel bars: 300-400K/hr (30 Smithing).
title: First 5M GP for New OSRS Members 2026 — Proven Money Makers

text:
coal and bar prices is consistently profitable. 
GP Per Hour 
Steel bars: 300-400K/hr (30 Smithing). Gold bars: 400-600K/hr (40 Smithing + Goldsmith gauntlets). Mithril bars: 400-550K/hr (50 Smithing). 

Requirements 
30 Smithing for steel bars. 40 Smithing for gold bars. Start The Giant Dwarf quest for Keldagrim access (free boat from Rellekka after starting). 

Input Cost 
Steel bars: Iron ore (120 GP) + Coal (160 GP) → Steel bar (560 GP) = ~280 GP profit/bar.
title: First 5M GP for New OSRS Members 2026 — Proven Money Makers

text:
Input Cost 
Steel bars: Iron ore (120 GP) + Coal (160 GP) → Steel bar (560 GP) = ~280 GP profit/bar. Gold bars: Gold ore (170 GP) → Gold bar (230 GP) + Smithing XP = profit with Goldsmith Gauntlets. 

Why It's Great 
It simultaneously makes money AND trains Smithing. Smithing is one of the most useful member skills — you need it for Dragon Slayer 2, quest requirements, and money-making later.

useful member skills — you need it for Dragon Slayer 2, quest requirements, and money-making later. 

Step-by-Step Blast Furnace 
Get to Keldagrim — Take the minecart from the Grand Exchange (after starting The Giant Dwarf) or boat from Rellekka. 
Pay the foreman — 1,250 GP to use the furnace (free if under 60 Smithing). Always pay — the time saved is worth 10x the cost. 
Bank at the nearby NPC — Use the bank chest next to the conveyor belt. Deposit coins for the foreman.
title: First 5M GP for New OSRS Members 2026 — Proven Money Makers

ank at the nearby NPC — Use the bank chest next to the conveyor belt. Deposit coins for the foreman. 
Load ores on the conveyor belt — Iron ore + Coal for steel. The furnace automatically smelts them. You need 1 iron + 2 coal per steel bar (half the normal coal requirement). 
Collect bars from the bar dispenser — They appear after a few seconds. Grab them and bank. 
Repeat — A full inventory takes ~90 seconds. You can do 30-35 inventories per hour.

Pro Tip — Gold Bars for XP, Steel for Profit 
Gold bars with Goldsmith Gauntlets give insane Smithing XP (56.2 XP/bar) but lower GP/hr. Steel bars give better profit but slower XP. Do gold bars until 50 Smithing, then switch to mithril for the best balance of XP and GP.

6. Method 4: Early Slayer — 100K-300K GP/Hr + Combat XP 
Slayer isn't the fastest GP/hr at low levels, but it's the only method that makes money while training all three combat stats simultaneously . It's also the gateway to high-level money-makers like Kraken, Cerberus, and Hydra. 
GP Per Hour 
Early (1-40 Slayer): 50-150K/hr. Mid (40-70): 150-300K/hr. Alch drops + emblems add 50-100K/hr on top.

Requirements 
Slayer skill (unlocked with membership). No minimum combat level. Talk to Turael in Burthorpe for easy tasks. 

Hidden Value 
Slayer gives Slayer Points (unlock Rings of Wealth, Bigger Badder, and Superior spawns). It also trains combat for free while earning GP — something no other method does. 

Best Early Tasks 
Crawling Hands, Cave Bugs, Banshees, Cockatrices, Pyrefiends.

Slayer Money-Making Tips 
Always use the Slayer Ring — Unlocked at 75 Crafting (or buy from GE). Teleports to task locations save enormous time. 
Alch drops while fighting — Keep nature runes and a fire staff. Alch any drop worth 500+ GP. This adds 50-100K/hr to any task.

Unlock "Bigger and Badder" — 150 Slayer Points. Superior monsters drop valuable loot and give bonus XP. Pays for itself within days.

7. Method 5: Fossil Island Nepotrophe — 200K-400K GP/Hr 
If you've completed Bone Voyage (which you should have for bird houses), the Fossil Island underwater area offers one of the best low-requirement money-makers in the game.

Ammonite Crabs — Low defense, 100 HP, aggressive, and they respawn instantly.

Ammonite Crabs are the #1 AFK combat training method for new members.

Pro Tip — Crab Spot Etiquette 
Ammonite Crab spots are shared. If someone is already at a spot, hop worlds. There are 3 crab spawns per spot — standing in the middle aggros all 3. Use a Dwarf Cannon for maximum XP (costs ~400K/hr in cannonballs but dramatically speeds up kills).

8. Method 6: Plank Making — 200K-350K GP/Hr 
This is a simple buy-low-sell-high method that requires zero combat and zero stats. You buy logs, turn them into planks, and sell the planks for profit. The Sawmill operator does the work — you just run back and forth. 
GP Per Hour 
Oak planks: 200-300K/hr. Teak planks: 250-350K/hr. Mahogany planks: 200-300K/hr. Profits fluctuate with plank prices.

How It Works 
Buy oak logs (50 GP) → Pay Sawmill 250 GP/plank → Oak plank sells for ~450 GP. Profit: ~150 GP per plank. 1,200 planks/hr = 180K/hr minimum. 

When to Do This 
When you need guaranteed, combat-free income .

Plank-Making Route (Fastest) 
Start at Varrock GE — Withdraw 27 oak logs + GP for planks (27 x 250 = 6,750 GP). 
Run to Sawmill — North-east of Varrock. ~30 seconds from GE. 
Convert all logs to planks — Talk to the Sawmill operator, choose "Buy planks," select oak.

9. Method 7: Wintertodt Supplies — 150K-300K GP/Hr 
You might have done Wintertodt in F2P, but as a member, it's dramatically more profitable. Members get access to better food, warm clothing, and higher-level rewards from supply crates.

50 Firemaking (recommended). No combat. Bring warm clothing (Pyromancer, Scarf, etc.) and food (Saradomin brews for members).

Why It's Still Worth It 
Wintertodt gives Firemaking XP + Construction supplies + seeds + GP all at once. It's not the best GP/hr, but the multi-skill value makes it time-efficient.

10. Your Daily GP Routine — The 5M Blueprint 
Here's the exact daily routine that will get you to 5M GP in under 2 weeks. No guessing, no wasted time — just follow this loop: 
Morning Session (30 minutes) 
Harvest bird houses (3 min) — Collect nests, reset all 4 houses 
Do a herb farm run (5 min) — Harvest, replant, apply compost 
Check GE offers (2 min) — Sell herbs, nests, and bird house loot

Earned: ~200K from bird houses + ~300K from herbs = 500K in 10 min active time 

Midday Session (1-2 hours) 
Harvest bird houses again (3 min) — It's been 50+ minutes 
Blast Furnace or Slayer (1-2 hrs) — Active money-making of your choice 
Second herb farm run (5 min) — If herbs have grown

Evening Session (30 minutes) 
Final bird house run (3 min) — Reset before bed 
Final herb farm run (5 min) — Plant before sleeping 
Bank everything — Sell on GE, check profits 
Earned: ~200K bird houses + ~300K herbs = 500K

At 1.6M/day, you hit 5M GP in 3.1 days . At 2M/day, you hit it in 2.5 days . Even doing just bird houses + herbs (no active methods), you still reach 5M in about a week. 
The secret is consistency. Missing bird house runs is like throwing away 100K. Missing farm runs is like throwing away 300K. Set a timer, do your runs, and the GP flows in automatically.

11. GP Milestones — What to Buy at Each Stage 
Don't just hoard GP — spend it on upgrades that accelerate your progress. Here's what to buy at each milestone: 
500K GP — The Essentials 
43 Prayer (Chaos Altar, ~500K) — Protect from Melee changes everything 
Glory Amulet (4) (50K) — Best general-purpose teleport jewelry 
Combat bracelet (4) (30K) — Edgeville/Fishing Guild teleports

st general-purpose teleport jewelry

Obsidian platelegs/skirt (350K) — Best mid-game leg slot 
Herb seeds for farming (50-100K restock) — Keep the passive income flowing

Complete mid-game melee setup — You now have everything you need for Slayer, Barrows, and early bossing

Every GP you spend on upgrades should increase your GP/hr . Berserker Ring → faster kills → more Slayer drops.

ou spend on upgrades should increase your GP/hr . Berserker Ring → faster kills → more Slayer drops. 43 Prayer → no food costs → pure profit. Herb seeds → more farm income. Think of spending as investing, not consuming. 

12. FAQ 
What if I don't have time for 4 bird house runs per day? 
Do as many as you can. Even 2 runs per day (morning + evening) still generates 200K/day.
title: First 5M GP for New OSRS Members 2026 — Proven Money Makers

text:
s per day? 
Do as many as you can. Even 2 runs per day (morning + evening) still generates 200K/day. The beauty of bird houses is that they're flexible — you can do them during bathroom breaks, between activities, or while watching YouTube. No other method is this time-efficient. 

Should I do Blast Furnace or Slayer for active money-making? 
Blast Furnace if you want pure GP/hr. Slayer if you want combat XP + GP + long-term progression. The answer is probably "both" — alternate between them.
title: First 5M GP for New OSRS Members 2026 — Proven Money Makers

text:
want combat XP + GP + long-term progression. The answer is probably "both" — alternate between them. Do Slayer until you get a slow/bad task, then swap to Blast Furnace until your next task. 

What about flipping on the GE? 
Flipping is profitable but requires capital (1M+ GP) and market knowledge . It's not ideal for your first 5M because you need that GP for gear upgrades. After 5M, you can set aside 1-2M for flipping. See our Cheap Flipping Methods for New Players guide.
title: First 5M GP for New OSRS Members 2026 — Proven Money Makers

text:
After 5M, you can set aside 1-2M for flipping. See our Cheap Flipping Methods for New Players guide. 

Are these methods Ironman-friendly? 
Bird houses: Yes, fully Ironman-friendly (gather your own seeds). Herb farming: Yes, but you must get seeds from drops/bird nests. Blast Furnace: Yes, you mine your own ores. Slayer: Absolutely. Plank making: No (requires buying logs from GE). Ironmen should focus on bird houses + herb farming + Slayer as their core trio.
title: First 5M GP for New OSRS Members 2026 — Proven Money Makers

text:
uying logs from GE). Ironmen should focus on bird houses + herb farming + Slayer as their core trio. 

How do I track my GP/hr? 
Use the RS Pocket Book or GE Tracker apps/websites. They log your loot, calculate GP/hr per method, and help you find the most profitable activities. Also check the OSRS Wiki's money-making guide for updated rates. 

When can I start doing Barrows for money? 
With 43 Prayer + Iban's Staff + Mystic Robes + 50+ Magic , you can do Barrows.
title: First 5M GP for New OSRS Members 2026 — Proven Money Makers

text:
g Barrows for money? 
With 43 Prayer + Iban's Staff + Mystic Robes + 50+ Magic , you can do Barrows. That's achievable within your first 1-2 weeks of membership. Barrows generates 1-2M GP/hr on average and is the natural next step after your first 5M. We'll cover it in the next article in this series. 

Should I sell everything on the GE or alch it? 
Rule of thumb: If the GE price is higher than the high alch value, sell on GE. If the GE price is lower, alch it.
title: First 5M GP for New OSRS Members 2026 — Proven Money Makers

text:
: If the GE price is higher than the high alch value, sell on GE. If the GE price is lower, alch it. For items worth < 500 GP, drop them or alch — they're not worth a GE slot. Nature runes cost ~100 GP each, so only alch items worth 768+ GP (the break-even point). 

Next in the Series: 2.4 — Barrows & Your First Boss GP 
You've got 5M GP, your mid-game gear, and 43 Prayer. It's time to take on your first boss for real money.

OSRS Leagues are limited-time game modes where players create fresh accounts and race to earn points by completing tasks across Gielinor. Each League features a unique theme, a set of Regions you can unlock, and Relics that dramatically boost your power. 
Leagues typically last 4-6 months. Your progress is tracked on a global leaderboard. The faster you complete tasks, the higher you rank.

Even though League characters are fresh accounts, there are ways to prepare on your main that will make you a better League player: 
1. Practice Efficient Questing Routes

Tip 1: Don't Spread Points Too Thin 
Top players focus on 2-3 regions they know intimately rather than unlocking everything. Deep knowledge of a few regions beats shallow knowledge of many.

Tip 3: Sleep Is for the Weak (But Seriously, Take Breaks) 
Leagues are marathons, not sprints. The leaderboard resets mildly throughout the League. Consistent daily play beats a 24-hour binge followed by burnout.

Common League Mistakes to Avoid 
Picking the "Cool" Relic Over the Efficient One: Relics are permanent for that League. Pick what's optimal, not what looks fun (you can have fun later with a maxed character). 
Ignoring Area Tasks: Some players treat Leagues like main game with buffs. Area tasks are the core progression.

ea Tasks: Some players treat Leagues like main game with buffs. Area tasks are the core progression. Ignoring them delays your relic unlocks by days. 
Skilling Before Questing: Quests give massive XP lumps. Always do quest XP rewards before grinding a skill from 1 to X. 
Not Banking Efficiently: Death in Leagues can be punishing early on. Always have a teleport method and don't risk expensive gear until you have a "protect item" = 5-item death relic. 
Going in Blind: Leagues reward preparation.

League Mechanics Deep Dive — Points, Tasks & Relic Synergy 
Understanding the underlying mechanics helps you plan better. Here's a deep dive into how Leagues work based on previous editions. 
Points Economy 
Points are the currency of Leagues. You earn them by completing Area Tasks (easy/medium/hard/elite).
title: OSRS League 6 Preparation Guide 2026 — Predictions & Early Game Strategy

text:
Points are the currency of Leagues. You earn them by completing Area Tasks (easy/medium/hard/elite). Each tier gives exponentially more points: 
Task Tier Points Reward Unlocks 
Easy (per task) 1-5 points Early unlocks 
Medium (per task) 5-15 points Tier 2 Relics 
Hard (per task) 15-40 points Tier 3 Relics, new regions 
Elite (per task) 40-100 points Tier 4-5 Relics, endgame 
Strategy: Rush easy + medium tasks in your starting region first. They give fast points for early relic unlocks.

sh easy + medium tasks in your starting region first. They give fast points for early relic unlocks. Save elite tasks for when you have high stats and better gear.

Double Cast + Rapid Renewal: Double Cast lets you cast spells twice per click. Rapid Renewal boosts HP regen. Combine for insanely fast magic training. 
Godsend + Overload Relic: Godsend gives all God Wars access. Overload boosts all combat stats. Combine for fastest GWD kills.

League 6 FAQ — predicted Questions 
Q: Will League 6 be P2P or F2P? 
A: Past Leagues have been P2P-only (require membership). League 6 will likely be P2P-only as well. If you're F2P, consider buying a bond before League starts. 
Q: Can I play League on my main account? 
A: No. Leagues require creating a fresh League character. Your main account is unaffected. The League character exists only during the League period.
title: OSRS League 6 Preparation Guide 2026 — Predictions & Early Game Strategy

Q: What happens to my League character after the League ends? 
A: After the League ends, the League character is converted to a normalIronman (not Hardcore). You keep all items, stats, and quest progress. But you cannot access League-exclusive content anymore. 
Q: Are Leagues pay-to-win? 
A: No. Everyone starts with the same fresh account. Bond-users and subscriber have no advantage.

Overall Strategy & Philosophy 
The fastest route to Max Cape is NOT training each skill from 1-99 in isolation. The efficient approach is: 
Quests First: Quests give massive lump sums of XP. Do them before grinding.

Leverage Expensive Methods: GP is easier to make than time is to spend. Buy Dragon bones for Prayer, spend on blaze powder for Construction.

AFK vs Active Training Balance 
Max Cape is a marathon. You cannot actively train 8 hours/day for months without burning out. Balance AFK and active methods.

ou cannot actively train 8 hours/day for months without burning out. Balance AFK and active methods. 
AFK-Friendly Skills (Train While Doing Other Things) 
Cooking: Afk at Catherby range with lobsters/swordfish. ~200k XP/hr. 
Fishing: Afk at Minnows (82+ Fishing) or Trawler (levels 15-99). ~40k-80k XP/hr. 
Woodcutting: Afk at Teaks (35+) or Redwoods (90+). ~40k-70k XP/hr. 
Mining: Afk at Motherlode Mine (30+). ~20k-40k XP/hr.

Money-Making Interspersed Strategy 
You'll need ~200-500M GP to buy your way through the expensive buyable skills (Prayer, Construction, Herblore). Here's when and how to make that GP. 
Early Game Money (First 200 Hours) 
Slayer (40-75): 300k-800k GP/hr depending on task. Also trains Combat + Slayer. 
Wintertodt (Firemaking 50+): 300k-600k GP/hr. Also trains Firemaking.

Mid Game Money (200-1000 Hours in) 
Vorkath (Combat 90+, Ranged 80+): 1.5M-2.5M GP/hr. Best consistent money in the game.

Raids (CoX / ToB): 2M-5M GP/hr (team-dependent). Best money but requires skill.

Ironman Differences — What Changes 
Ironman mode restricts trading with other players. This changes the strategy significantly. 
Key Differences 
No Buying Supplies: You must gather herbs, ores, logs, bones yourself. Farming is essential.

Farming is Mandatory: You need herb runs for Herblore. Tree runs for Construction/Woodcutting. Do every 4 hours. 
Bossing for Drops: You need to kill bosses for rare drops (Dragon defender, trident, etc.) instead of buying them.

1. What Is Mid-Game Money Making? 
Mid-game in OSRS (roughly combat 70-100, total level 1000-1750) is where money making transitions from grinding to strategy . You're past the "pick flax for 100K/hr" phase, but not yet at raids or endgame bosses. The methods here scale from 500K/hr to 3M/hr.

11. 1M to 100M Roadmap — Step by Step 
Phase 1: 1M to 10M (The Foundation) 
Do herb runs every 80 minutes. At 32 Farming (Ranarr): 100K/run. 5 runs/day = 500K. In 7 days: 3.5M. 
Add birdhouse runs. Stack with herb runs. 50K/run. 250K/day extra. 
Train Slayer to 65. Kurasks at 70 = consistent 500K-600K/hr. Do 2-3 tasks per day: 500K-1M.

Buy essential gear: Whip (3M), blowpipe (3M), trident (1M), fury (1M), berserker ring (2M) = ~10M total. 
Timeline: 1-2 weeks to 10M bank. 
Phase 2: 10M to 50M (Scaling Up) 
Complete Dragon Slayer II. Requires: 200 QP, various skills ~60-70, boss fights. Unlocks Vorkath. 
Start Vorkath grinding. 15-20 kills/hr with blowpipe = 1.5M-2M/hr. Grind 15 hours for 25M+. 
Continue daily passive income.

Upgrade gear incrementally: Torture (10M), anguish (12M), tormented bracelet (12M) — prioritize damage upgrades.

Scale up flipping. With 50M+ cash, flipping 3-5 high-value items daily = 1M-3M passive/day. 
Consider Gauntlet/Corrupted Gauntlet. Requires Song of the Elves. 0 GP risk, 2M-3M/hr with corrupted completion. High skill ceiling but infinite scalability.

12. FAQ 
Q: What's the fastest way to 10M from scratch? 
Herb runs (ranarr/toadflax) every 80 minutes + Slayer to 65-75. Herb runs are the most GP/hr per active minute spent. Slayer gives passive income while training combat.
title: OSRS Mid-Game Money Making Guide 2026 — 1M to 100M GP

text:
runs are the most GP/hr per active minute spent. Slayer gives passive income while training combat. Combination: ~7 days to 10M at 2-3 hours/day. 
Q: Vorkath or Zulrah — which should I learn first? 
Vorkath if you want consistent, low-variance profit and have DS2 requirements. Zulrah if you want to learn a harder boss that costs less to die at. Vorkath is slightly better GP/hr at mid levels. 
Q: When should I stop herb runs? 
Never.
title: OSRS Mid-Game Money Making Guide 2026 — 1M to 100M GP

text:
to die at. Vorkath is slightly better GP/hr at mid levels. 
Q: When should I stop herb runs? 
Never. Even at endgame with 500M+ bank, herb runs are still 150K-200K for 5 minutes of work — that's an effective 1.8M-2.4M/hr rate per active minute. High-level players do herb runs during AFK activities. 
Q: Is flipping worth learning if I only have 5M? 
Yes, but keep expectations realistic. With 5M, flipping consumables (runes, darts, scales, potions) can yield 100K-200K/day with 10 minutes of work.

Q: How much GP do I need before starting Vorkath/Zulrah? 
Vorkath: 10M minimum (blowpipe + blessed d'hide + salve amulet (ei) + supplies). Zulrah: 12M minimum (trident + blowpipe + Ahrim's + ring of suffering). Add 2-5M for death costs while learning either boss.

Kill Mechanics & Phases 
Moolord has a three-phase fight with distinct mechanics in each phase. Understanding these is key to consistent kills. 
Phase 1: The Graze (100%—66% HP) 
In this phase, Moolord uses primarily melee attacks with occasional "Hoof Stomp" AoE. Stay under him and use Protect from Melee. 
Hoof Stomp: AoE attack dealing up to 25 damage.
title: OSRS New Boss Guide 2026 — Kill Strategy & Loot Breakdown - OSRSGuru

text:
mp" AoE. Stay under him and use Protect from Melee. 
Hoof Stomp: AoE attack dealing up to 25 damage. Move 1 tile away when you see the animation. 
Attack Speed: 4 ticks (2.4 seconds) between attacks. 
Phase 2: The电荷 (66%—33% HP) 
Moolord becomes enraged and gains the "Milk Barrage" magic attack. He will alternate between melee and magic attacks. 
Milk Barrage: Ranged-like magic projectiles that deal up to 35 damage. Protect from Magic helps but doesn't fully block.
title: OSRS New Boss Guide 2026 — Kill Strategy & Loot Breakdown - OSRSGuru

text:
-like magic projectiles that deal up to 35 damage. Protect from Magic helps but doesn't fully block. 
Enrage: Attack speed increases to 3 ticks (1.8 seconds). 
Strategy: Prayer flick between Melee and Magic protection. 
Phase 3: The Stampede (33%—0% HP) 
Moolord enters his final phase with all previous attacks plus "Stampede" — a charge attack that deals 40+ damage if it connects. 
Stampede: Moolord charges across the arena. Move perpendicular to dodge.
title: OSRS New Boss Guide 2026 — Kill Strategy & Loot Breakdown - OSRSGuru

text:
40+ damage if it connects. 
Stampede: Moolord charges across the arena. Move perpendicular to dodge. 
Heal Mechanic: If you take too long, Moolord heals 50 HP every 30 seconds. 
Strategy: Use high DPS gear and overloads/potions. Bring Ruby Bolt (e) for extra damage. 
Special Mechanic: The Golden Calf 
At 50% HP, Moolord summons two "Calf Minions" with 50 HP each. Kill them quickly or they will heal Moolord for 20 HP every 10 seconds.
title: OSRS New Boss Guide 2026 — Kill Strategy & Loot Breakdown - OSRSGuru

lf Minions" with 50 HP each. Kill them quickly or they will heal Moolord for 20 HP every 10 seconds. 
Tip: Use AoE abilities (if using Revolution) or quickly switch to AoE weapon (Dragon 2h Sword spec) to clear the calves fast.

ass Make Is King for Ironmen: At 77 Magic, Superglass Make creates 1.3x more molten glass per input. Always use 3 giant seaweed + 18 sand per cast for max efficiency.

w long does 1-99 Crafting take?

Q: What's the best method for Ironman? 
Giant seaweed + Superglass Make → unpowered orbs (46-87) → light orbs (87-99). This is THE Ironman Crafting meta. Farm giant seaweed on Fossil Island, mine sandstone for sand, cast Superglass Make, blow the glass.

It depends on your method. Glassblowing and battlestaves are profitable. Dragonhide crafting is expensive but fast. Jewelry is roughly breakeven. You can train 1-99 Crafting for free or even profit if you choose the right methods. 
Q: When should I stop glassblowing and switch to something faster? 
For main accounts: switch to battlestaves at 54 (water), or dragonhide at 63 (green).

1. Why Train Farming? — The Ultimate Passive Skill 
Farming is unique in OSRS. It's the only skill that trains itself while you do other activities . You plant crops, go train other skills or PvM for hours, then come back to harvest massive XP and profit. It's the definition of passive income in Gielinor.

Why Every Account Needs Farming 
Massive money maker at ALL levels: Herb runs alone can generate 500K–2M GP per day depending on your level and seed choice. Tree runs add another 200K–500K GP profit daily. 
Compost/Supercompost/Ultracompost: Reduces crop death chance dramatically. Always use ultracompost on valuable crops — it pays for itself easily with extra yields.

Diary requirements: Multiple Achievement Diaries require Farming levels across all tiers (Easy, Medium, Hard, Elite). 
Access to useful teleports: Spirit trees (83 Farming) provide a transportation network across Gielinor.

💡 Key Insight: Farming Trains Itself 
Unlike most skills where you actively grind XP, Farming lets you plant → log off/do other content → come back hours later to massive XP and GP .

🥔 Allotment Crop Progression 
Level 1–5: Potatoes — Plant in any allotment patch. Buy potato seeds from farming shops (~3 GP each) or Grand Exchange. Always use supercompost (reduces death rate from ~30% to ~10%). Harvest after 35 minutes. 
Level 5–7: Onions — Similar to potatoes, slightly more GP from onion sales. Still use supercompost. 
Level 7–12: Cabbages — Minimal profit, but fast growth (35 minutes). Good for getting past the early levels quickly.

Level 31–47: Strawberries — Very useful for making supercompost! Each strawberry can be used as supercompost bucket fodder. Growth time: 70 minutes. Plant these in bulk to fuel your compost needs.

Best Herbs for Each Budget 
Early game (Levels 9–31): Stick to Guam/Marrentill/Harralander. Seeds are cheap, profit is reliable. Don't waste GP on expensive seeds yet. 
Mid game (Levels 32–61): Ranarr weeds are the sweet spot. ~15K GP/seed but ~8K GP profit per herb. With 8 patches × 6-10 herbs = ~300K-500K GP per run. 
Late game (Levels 62–84): Snapdragon is the money printer.

End game (Level 85+): Torstol. ~100K+ GP/seed. Extremely high risk but can generate 600K-1M GP per run. Only for rich accounts.

Equip Magic Secateurs before harvesting. +10% yield = +10% profit. If you forget to equip them, you're leaving money on the table.

5. Tithe Farm (Level 34+) — Fast AFK XP Alternative 
Tithe Farm is a minigame in Zeah (Great Kourend) that gives fast Farming XP without needing seeds or compost . It's fully AFK-friendly and perfect for players who want pure XP without managing inventory or risking crop death.

Requirements & Setup

Farming Requirement: 34 Farming (to enter), but 54+ recommended for efficient runs 
Hosidius Favour: 100% favour required (do kitchen tasks + woodland tasks, takes 3-5 hours) 
No seed/compost cost: All supplies are free within Tithe Farm 
How Tithe Farm Works 
Tithe Farm is a mini-game style farming activity:
title: OSRS 1-99 Farming Guide Beginner Profit 2026

text:
re free within Tithe Farm 
How Tithe Farm Works 
Tithe Farm is a mini-game style farming activity: 
You're given a plot of 10 "patches" (actually just interactive spots in the minigame) 
You plant seeds (provided free), then must keep them watered and healthy 
Each plant goes through growth stages. You need to water them at the right times to prevent withering 
Successfully harvested plants earn you points 
Points can be exchanged for Farming XP or Farming supplies (seeds, compost, etc.)

Round 5–9 10 plants ~40K–50K XP/hr Decent XP, still learning timing

10. Pro Tips for Maximum Profit & Efficiency 
💰 Tip #1: Ultracompost is NON-NEGOTIABLE on Expensive Crops 
If you're planting Ranarr, Snapdragon, Torstol, Magic trees, Palm trees, or Dragonfruit trees — ALWAYS use ultracompost . The cost (~3K GP) is negligible compared to the seed cost (15K-100K+ GP).

⏰ Tip #2: Do Farm Runs TWICE Per Day Minimum 
Farming is passive, but you need to actually DO the runs. Set a timer on your phone: 
Morning: Do herb + tree + fruit tree runs 
Evening: Do herb + tree + fruit tree runs again 
That's it. 20-30 minutes of gameplay per day for massive XP and profit. 
Even 1 run per day is better than nothing.

11. FAQ — Common Farming Questions 
Q: Is farming worth it without ultracompost? 
A: No. Always use supercompost or ultracompost.
title: OSRS 1-99 Farming Guide Beginner Profit 2026

text:
tions 
Q: Is farming worth it without ultracompost? 
A: No. Always use supercompost or ultracompost. Crop death will eat your profits otherwise. The only exception is ultra-low-level stuff (potatoes, onions) where seeds are ~3 GP each. But once you're planting herbs (9+), always use compost. 
Q: Should I pay farmers to protect my trees? 
A: For expensive trees (Magic, Palm, Dragonfruit) — YES, absolutely. It's cheap insurance. A Magic tree seed costs ~120K GP.
title: OSRS 1-99 Farming Guide Beginner Profit 2026

text:
Magic, Palm, Dragonfruit) — YES, absolutely. It's cheap insurance. A Magic tree seed costs ~120K GP. Paying a farmer 25 coconuts (~25K GP) is 21% of the seed cost to guarantee the tree survives . Always pay for expensive trees. 
Q: How often should I do farm runs? 
A: Minimum 2x/day for herbs/allotments. Trees every 4-6 hours ideally. Even 1 run per day is better than nothing. Farming is passive — the crops grow while you do other content.
title: OSRS 1-99 Farming Guide Beginner Profit 2026
