Playing an ironman in F2P is one of the most rewarding — and challenging — experiences in Old School RuneScape. Without access to the Grand Exchange and restricted to free-to-play worlds, you need to rely entirely on what you can gather yourself.
title: OSRS Ironman Money Making F2P 2026 — Best Methods Guide | OSRSGuideHub

text:
ge and restricted to free-to-play worlds, you need to rely entirely on what you can gather yourself. This guide covers the best money-making (resource-generating) methods available to F2P ironman players in 2026, organized from early-game to late-game. 
Why F2P Ironman "Money Making" Is Different 
For regular accounts, "money making" means converting time into GP on the Grand Exchange.
title: OSRS Ironman Money Making F2P 2026 — Best Methods Guide | OSRSGuideHub

text:
Different 
For regular accounts, "money making" means converting time into GP on the Grand Exchange. For an F2P ironman, it means accumulating the resources, equipment, and supplies you need to progress — since you can't trade with other players. Your "wealth" is measured in what you've stockpiled, not your coin stack. 
That said, coins are still useful for buying from NPC shops, using death mechanics, and a handful of F2P use cases. The methods below generate both coins and critical supplies.

Alchemy on the Go

OSRS Low Cost 1-99 Herblore Guide 2026 
Skill Training Herblore Budget Updated 2026 
Herblore is infamous for being one of the most expensive skills to train in OSRS. However, with careful potion selection and smart ingredient sourcing, you can significantly reduce the cost.
title: OSRS Low Cost 1-99 Herblore Guide 2026

text:
with careful potion selection and smart ingredient sourcing, you can significantly reduce the cost. This guide covers the cheapest potions to make at every level, full GP cost breakdowns, and special sections for Ironman players who must source herbs from monsters and farming. 

Herblore Basics 
Herblore works by combining a cleaned herb with a secondary ingredient in a vial of water to create a potion. XP is gained when the potion is completed.

Use the Serum 207 method (level 3) for the very cheapest early XP. 
Mixing unfinished potions and adding secondaries separately is the standard method.

The early Herblore levels can be accomplished quickly with minimal spending. The key is choosing the cheapest potions that give adequate XP.

12. Pro Tips for Beginner Money Makers 
Always check GE prices first. Prices shift daily. A margin of 200 GP today might be -50 GP tomorrow. Use the OSRS Wiki or GE Tracker to verify before committing an hour to a method.

Combine training with profit. Killing cows trains combat AND makes gold. Cannonball smithing trains Smithing AND makes gold. Maximize your time by choosing methods that advance your account. 
Don't hold onto resources. Sell weekly. Hoarding items hoping prices rise is a gamble. Consistent selling and reinvesting compounds faster than speculation. 
Stack your GP -- don't spend it.

13. Common Mistakes 
Doing a method without checking prices. The single biggest mistake. What a guide says is profitable might not be profitable today. Spend 30 seconds checking GE prices before starting. 
Forgetting to bring a teleport. Always have an escape. An emergency teleport saves you minutes of walking back to a bank -- and in the Wilderness, it saves your loot.

text:
Q: What is the best money maker for a brand-new OSRS account with level 3 stats?
A: Picking flax in Seers' Village is the best zero-requirement method -- ~60K GP/hr with no skills needed. If you have 10 Crafting (achievable in 15 minutes), spin the flax into bowstrings to earn ~100K-120K GP/hr. Alternatively, collecting snape grass at the Hobgoblin Peninsula (members) yields ~100K GP/hr with zero requirements. For F2P, killing cows in Lumbridge and selling cowhides is the classic starter method at ~40K-70K GP/hr while also training combat.
title: OSRS Low Effort Money Making for Beginners 2026 -- 10 Methods, No High Stats

text:
Q: How much starting GP do I need for GE flipping?
A: You can start flipping with as little as 50,000-100,000 GP. Focus on high-volume items with a 5%+ margin: cannonballs, nature runes, ranarr weeds, raw sharks, and pure essence. At 100K capital, expect 5K-10K profit per flip. As your capital grows to 1M, expect 50K-100K per flip. At 10M capital, experienced flippers earn 500K-2M per day passively. The key is reinvesting profit -- never cash out your flipping capital for gear.
title: OSRS Low Effort Money Making for Beginners 2026 -- 10 Methods, No High Stats

text:
Q: Are these methods safe from PKers?
A: Most methods listed are completely safe. Flax picking, cowhide collecting, tanning hides, and GE flipping have zero PK risk -- they are all in safe zones. Wines of Zamorak at the Chaos Temple has Wilderness PK risk (level 30-35 Wilderness). Use the Asgarnia Ice Dungeon or the deep Wilderness Zamorak temple alternative if you want zero PK risk. Never bring items you're not willing to lose into the Wilderness.
title: OSRS Low Effort Money Making for Beginners 2026 -- 10 Methods, No High Stats

text:
Q: How quickly can a beginner earn their first 1M GP?
A: With these methods, a brand-new player can earn their first 1M GP in about 10-20 hours of casual play. For example: 10 hours of flax spinning at 100K/hr = 1M GP. Or combine multiple methods: 30 min of GE flipping (50K), 2 hours of killing cows (80K), 1 hour of snape grass collection (100K), and 5 hours of flax spinning (500K) for ~730K in about 8-9 hours. Once you hit 1M, better money-makers unlock.

5. The Woox Walk — Acid Phase Advanced Technique 
The Woox Walk is what separates casual Vorkath farmers from efficient ones. During the acid phase, you can continue attacking Vorkath while dodging acid pools.
title: OSRS Low Gear Vorkath Guide 2026 — Budget Setup, Woox Walk & Profit Per Kill

text:
efficient ones. During the acid phase, you can continue attacking Vorkath while dodging acid pools. Here's the step-by-step: 
Identify a clear row: As soon as the acid phase begins, find a straight line of 5+ tiles with no acid pools. This is your walking lane. 
Starting position: Stand at one end of your clear row. Click one tile forward — your character starts walking. 
Attack click: The instant your character begins moving, click Vorkath to attack.
title: OSRS Low Gear Vorkath Guide 2026 — Budget Setup, Woox Walk & Profit Per Kill

text:
er starts walking. 
Attack click: The instant your character begins moving, click Vorkath to attack. Your character will take one step then turn to fire. 
Repeat: As soon as you fire, click the next tile (back the other direction), then immediately click Vorkath again. The rhythm is: Move → Attack → Move → Attack. 
Timing: You must complete each move-attack cycle before the acid pool spawns under you. This is roughly a 2-tick window.
title: OSRS Low Gear Vorkath Guide 2026 — Budget Setup, Woox Walk & Profit Per Kill

text:
plete each move-attack cycle before the acid pool spawns under you. This is roughly a 2-tick window. Practice with a crossbow first (slower attack speed = easier timing) before trying with a Blowpipe. 
Beginner variation: If you can't get the attack timing, just walk back and forth without attacking. Surviving the acid phase is better than getting hit by 30+ acid damage because you tried to squeeze in an attack.

Q: Is Salve Amulet (ei) or Void better for Vorkath? 
A: Salve Amulet (ei) is better. Vorkath is an undead creature, so the Salve Amulet (ei) provides a +20% damage and accuracy bonus that stacks with Void. The combination of Elite Void + Salve (ei) is the meta setup for ranged. If you had to choose only one, Salve (ei) with Black D'hide outperforms Elite Void with a Fury. 

Q: How many kills per trip can I expect with budget gear? 
A: 2-4 kills per trip.
title: OSRS Low Gear Vorkath Guide 2026 — Budget Setup, Woox Walk & Profit Per Kill

text:
oid with a Fury. 

Q: How many kills per trip can I expect with budget gear? 
A: 2-4 kills per trip. With the ~8M budget setup, expect 2-3 kills consistently. As you improve at dodging acid and handling the undead spawn, you'll stretch to 3-4 kills. Max gear players can get 5-8 kills per trip. The limiting factor is always food — Vorkath's ranged auto-attacks chip away at your HP regardless of prayer.

Q: Is Vorkath better money than Zulrah in 2026? 
A: Vorkath is more consistent; Zulrah has higher potential. Vorkath's guaranteed drops (bones + hides) mean you never have a "bad" kill. Zulrah's unique drops (Tanzanite Fang, Magic Fang) are more valuable individually, but you can go dry for hundreds of kills. Vorkath is recommended for steady income; Zulrah for gambling on big ticket drops.

👹 Vorkath Is Your First Big Money Printer 
Vorkath is the boss that turns OSRS from a game into a career. Once you can consistently kill this blue dragon, money stops being an obstacle. Your first 100 kills will be messy — you'll die to the spawn, misclick during acid phase, and forget to re-pot antifire. That's fine. By kill 50, the Woox Walk starts clicking.

text:
Q: What are the minimum requirements for Vorkath in OSRS?
A: You must complete Dragon Slayer II quest as an absolute requirement. Minimum stats: 75+ Ranged (80+ recommended), 70+ Defence, 70+ Prayer (74 for Rigour is ideal). An Anti-dragon shield or Dragonfire ward is mandatory — without one, Vorkath's dragonfire will one-shot you.
title: OSRS Low Gear Vorkath Guide 2026 — Budget Setup, Woox Walk & Profit Per Kill

text:
Q: What is the best budget gear for Vorkath under 10M GP?
A: Budget setup (~8-10M): Elite Void Knight set, Dragon Crossbow with Ruby/Diamond Bolts (e), Anti-dragon Shield, Amulet of Fury, Archer's Ring (i), Ava's Accumulator, and Barrows Gloves. This setup can achieve 2-3 kills per trip and 1.5M-2M GP/hr.
title: OSRS Low Gear Vorkath Guide 2026 — Budget Setup, Woox Walk & Profit Per Kill

text:
Q: How does the Woox Walk work at Vorkath?
A: During the acid phase, click one tile away from your position, then immediately click Vorkath to attack. As soon as your character turns toward Vorkath, click another tile away and then click Vorkath again. This back-and-forth rhythm keeps you moving (avoiding acid pools) while still dealing damage. Practice without attacking first — just move back and forth cleanly.
title: OSRS Low Gear Vorkath Guide 2026 — Budget Setup, Woox Walk & Profit Per Kill

text:
Q: How much GP per hour is Vorkath in 2026?
A: With budget gear, expect 1.5M-2.5M GP/hour at 20 kills/hr. With max gear (Dragon Hunter Crossbow), expect 3M-5M GP/hour at 25-30 kills/hr. Each kill averages 130K-180K GP in guaranteed drops (Superior dragon bones, blue dragonhides, alchables), with rare drops like the Dragonbone Necklace (900K) and Vorki pet adding long-term value.

📍 Memory Trick: The "Varrock-Lumbridge-Falador Triangle" 
These three towns form a triangle in central Misthalin. Most F2P content happens inside this triangle. If you can navigate between these three, you can handle 90% of F2P content. 

3. Walking & Running — Stamina Management 
You have two movement speeds: 
Walking: Slow. Uses no run energy. Use for short distances.

You have two movement speeds: 
Walking: Slow. Uses no run energy. Use for short distances. 
Running: Fast (2x speed). Uses run energy. Toggle with the running shoe icon (bottom-right of game screen). 
Run Energy — How It Works 
Factor Effect on Run Energy 
Walking Restores 0.5% per game tick (0.3 seconds) 
Running Drains 0.7% per game tick (varies with weight) 
Carrying weight More weight = faster energy drain 
Agility level Higher Agility = slower drain + faster restore

📊 Practical Energy Management Strategies 
🚶 Short Trips (Under 30 seconds) 
Strategy: Walk, don't run. Running for 20 seconds drains ~15% energy — not worth it for short distances. 
Examples: Lumbridge castle → Lumbridge swamp (walk), Varrock east bank → Varrock west bank (walk).
title: OSRS Maps & Fast Travel Guide 2026 — Navigate Gielinor Without Getting Lost

text:
Examples: Lumbridge castle → Lumbridge swamp (walk), Varrock east bank → Varrock west bank (walk). 

🏃 Medium Trips (30 seconds - 2 minutes) 
Strategy: Run, but only until you reach ~40% energy. Then walk the rest to let it restore. Or run the whole way if you have a musician nearby at the destination. 
Examples: Lumbridge → Varrock (run, uses ~50% energy), Varrock → Falador (run, uses ~70% energy).

Examples: Lumbridge → Varrock (run, uses ~50% energy), Varrock → Falador (run, uses ~70% energy). 
Musician locations: Lumbridge (near general store), Varrock (near east bank), Falador (near west bank), Draynor (near market). Stand near a musician to restore energy to 100% instantly. 

🏃♂️ Long Trips (Over 2 minutes) 
Strategy (F2P): Run until ~20% energy, then walk. Or walk the entire way (boring but saves energy for when you need it).

Examples: Lumbridge → Port Sarim (walk, ~4 minutes), Varrock → Al-Kharid (run + walk, ~3 minutes).

⚖️ Weight Management — Why It Matters 
Your carry weight directly affects run energy drain. The heavier you are, the faster your energy drains while running. 
How to check weight: Hover over your inventory (bottom-right corner shows weight in kg). 
Weight reduction: ( Members only) Runecrafting pouches reduce weight. Boots of Lightness (obtained in the Temple of Ikov quest) reduce weight. Penance gloves (Horror from the Deep quest) reduce weight.

F2P tip: Drop heavy items before running long distances. For example, if you have 20 iron ore (each weighs 1 kg), drop them, run to the bank, then come back for them. 

💡 Pro Tip: Drop Heavy Items Before Running Long Distances 
If you're carrying 20 iron ore (heavy!) and need to run to the bank, your run energy will drain in 30 seconds.

Once you have some Magic levels and runes, teleport spells are the fastest way to travel. Each spell teleports you to a specific location.

📖 How to Get Teleport Spells (F2P) 
📍 Step 1: Buy the Required Runes 
Where to buy: Varrock rune shop (northwest Varrock, near the west bank). The shop is called "Runes Emporium" . You can also buy runes from the Grand Exchange (Varrock market area). 
Cost for one Varrock Teleport: 3 Air runes (~15 GP) + 1 Fire rune (~5 GP) + 1 Law rune (~200 GP) = ~220 GP per teleport .

Budget tip: Buy Air runes in bulk (1,000+) to reduce cost per teleport. Law runes are the expensive part — save them for important trips. 

📍 Step 2: Open Your Spellbook 
How: Click the Magic tab (looks like a star, located near your Inventory tab). This opens your Spellbook . 
If you don't see teleport spells: You might be on the Ancient Magicks or Lunar Spellbook .

For other cities: Lumbridge Home Teleport (free, 30-min cooldown), Walk/run between nearby cities (Lumbridge↔Varrock in 2 min, Varrock↔Falador in 5 min). Yellow dots = NPCs , White dots = other players , Red dots = monsters , Blue dots = items on the ground . Click on the minimap to walk in that direction. Right-click the minimap for zoom options.

Agility

Herblore 
Why it matters: Herblore lets you make your own potions — super combat, prayer renewal, stamina, anti-venom, the list goes on. In F2P, you're stuck buying strength potions from shops.

10. FAQ 
Can I go back to F2P after being a member? 
Yes and no. Your account never loses member items , but you can't use member-exclusive items, access member areas, or train member skills while in F2P. Your member items stay in your bank, but they're greyed-out and unusable. Your member stats are preserved but also greyed-out. When you re-subscribe, everything comes back exactly as you left it.
title: OSRS Membership Guide 2026 — Is It Worth Buying? | Complete F2P vs Members Comparison

text:
preserved but also greyed-out. When you re-subscribe, everything comes back exactly as you left it. 

What happens to my member items if my membership runs out? 
They stay in your bank safely. You just can't equip or use them. If your bank is over 400 slots (the F2P limit), you can still access all your items but can't deposit new ones until space clears or you re-subscribe. 

Can I fund membership with GP from day one? 
Technically yes — you can buy a Bond from the Grand Exchange for ~10M GP.
title: OSRS Membership Guide 2026 — Is It Worth Buying? | Complete F2P vs Members Comparison

text:
hip with GP from day one? 
Technically yes — you can buy a Bond from the Grand Exchange for ~10M GP. But earning 10M GP as a brand-new F2P player is extremely difficult (100+ hours at F2P money rates). Most players who use Bonds to sustain membership are already established with high-level money-makers. For your first 3 months, pay with cash and use the time to reach the level where Bonds become sustainable. 

Do I lose progress if I cancel and resubscribe later? 
No. Your account is permanent.

Do I lose progress if I cancel and resubscribe later? 
No. Your account is permanent. All progress, quest completions, bank items, and stats are preserved indefinitely. OSRS accounts are designed for seasonal play — many players take breaks for months and return right where they left off. 

Can I pay with PayPal from China? 
Yes. Jagex accepts PayPal payments globally, including PayPal China accounts.

Is membership the same for RS3 and OSRS? 
Yes! One membership covers both games . If you buy OSRS membership, your account also has full access to RuneScape 3.

What's the difference between recurring and non-recurring monthly? 
Recurring: $13.99/month, auto-renews, cancel anytime. Non-recurring: $7.99 one-time, expires after 30 days, no auto-renewal. The non-recurring option is significantly cheaper but must be manually re-purchased each month.

1. How the OSRS Economy Works 
OSRS has a fully player-driven economy. Items are priced based on supply and demand — there's no fixed store price for most things. As a new player, you need to understand three key concepts: 
The Grand Exchange (GE) — The central marketplace in Varrock.
title: OSRS Money Making for Beginners 2026 — 0 GP to 500k with Zero Stats

text:
eed to understand three key concepts: 
The Grand Exchange (GE) — The central marketplace in Varrock. You put items up for sale/buy and the game matches you with other players automatically. Almost everything is traded here. 
GE Price vs Shop Price — Store prices are usually much lower than GE prices. Selling to the GE is almost always better than selling to a shop. 
Raw materials vs Processed goods — Raw ores, logs, and hides are worth money.
title: OSRS Money Making for Beginners 2026 — 0 GP to 500k with Zero Stats

text:
an selling to a shop. 
Raw materials vs Processed goods — Raw ores, logs, and hides are worth money. Processed versions (bars, planks, leather) are often worth more — or sometimes less. Always check the GE before processing. 
💡 Install the RuneLite GE Price Overlay 
With RuneLite, every item in your inventory shows its current GE price when you hover over it. Invaluable for knowing what's worth keeping and what to drop.

🐄 Cowhide Tanning (Best Day 1 Method) 
Kill cows east of Lumbridge. Pick up cowhides (100% drop rate).

Cowhide Tanning (Best Day 1 Method) 
Kill cows east of Lumbridge. Pick up cowhides (100% drop rate). 
Take cowhides to the Tanner in Al Kharid (just south of Lumbridge, 1 GP per hide to tan) 
Sell Soft Leather or Hard Leather on the Grand Exchange (~200–300 GP each) 
Profit: ~150–250 GP per hide, 100+ hides/hour = 15,000–25,000 GP/hr 
🪨 Mining Copper/Tin Ore 
Mine copper or tin ore at Varrock East/West Mine, sell at GE for ~100–150 GP each. Very low GP/hr but trains Mining simultaneously.

However, minnows require active attention — the fishing spot moves every 15 seconds and you must click to continue fishing. Not AFK, but the highest raw GP from fishing.

Not completing quest unlocks. Swan Song (Monkfish at 150K/hr) and Tai Bwo Wannai Trio (Karambwans at 200K/hr) are short quests that triple your fishing profits versus swordfish. Do them early. 
Ignoring Infernal Eels for "better" GP/hr. The 150K/hr rate underestimates Infernal Eels because you can do them for 6+ hours while working. Pure GP/hr isn't the only metric — AFK time matters too.

Selling raw fish at the wrong time. Raw food prices spike on weekends (more players bossing). Bank your fish during the week and sell Friday-Sunday for 10-15% more.

7. Frequently Asked Questions 
Q: Is fishing or Woodcutting better money in OSRS? 
A: Fishing wins at every level. Lobsters (50K/hr) beat yew logs (40K/hr). Monkfish (150K/hr) beat magic logs (100K/hr).

7. Core Concepts Every New Player Must Know 
New players quit because they don't understand HOW the game works under the hood. Let me explain the key systems in plain English — no jargon, no assumptions about prior gaming knowledge.

7.1 The Combat Triangle 
OSRS combat revolves around three styles that counter each other: 
⚔️ MELEE Swords, axes Beats Ranged 
→ counters → 
🏹 RANGED Bows, crossbows Beats Magic 
→ counters → 
🔮 MAGIC Spells, staves Beats Melee 

Practical meaning: If you're fighting a monster with a bow and it switches to melee, switch to magic spells. If it uses magic, pull out your sword.

7.2 The Skill System — 23 Skills, Infinite Progression 
Every skill goes from Level 1 to Level 99. XP (Experience Points) levels you up. Higher levels unlock: 
Skill Type Examples Why Level It 
Combat Skills (7) Attack, Strength, Defence, Hitpoints, Prayer, Ranged, Magic Higher damage, better armor, access to better weapons/equipment.

Gathering Skills (6) Mining, Fishing, Woodcutting, Farming, Hunter, Thieving Collect raw materials to sell or craft into valuable items. Primary money makers. 
Artisan Skills (5) Smithing, Crafting, Cooking, Herblore, Fletching, Construction Turn gathered materials into useful items (potions, food, gear). Often required for quests.

7.4 Quest System — Not Optional, Actually Essential 
Quests in OSRS aren't side content — they're the FASTEST way to gain XP and unlock game features: 
XP Rewards: One quest can give 10K+ XP across multiple skills (saves hours of grinding) 
Unlocks: Quests unlock new areas, spells, prayers, equipment, and game mechanics

7.5 Economy & The Grand Exchange 
The OSRS economy is entirely player-driven: 
Supply & Demand: When a new boss releases, its drops flood the market → prices crash → smart players buy low and wait 
Flipping: Buy low, sell high.

Merchanting Clans: Groups that manipulate item prices (risky but profitable) 
Skill supplies: High-level players buy materials from low-level players → everyone benefits

FAQ — Questions Every New Player Asks 
Is OSRS free to play? 
Yes! OSRS has a robust F2P mode with 15 skills, 22 quests, and plenty of content for 50+ hours of gameplay.
title: OSRS New Player Guide 2026 — Complete Beginner's Handbook | Zero to Bossing

text:
RS has a robust F2P mode with 15 skills, 22 quests, and plenty of content for 50+ hours of gameplay. Membership ($7.99/month or via in-game Bond) unlocks the remaining 8 skills, 130+ quests, the full world map, bosses, and much more. Many players start F2P and eventually earn enough in-game currency to buy Bonds — effectively playing for free indefinitely. 

How long does it take to reach "endgame"? 
It depends entirely on your goals and playtime.

nitely. 

How long does it take to reach "endgame"? 
It depends entirely on your goals and playtime. Casual players (1-2 hours/day) typically reach mid-game competence in 2-3 months. Hardcore players (4-6 hours/day) can reach bossing-ready status in 4-6 weeks. True "maxed" accounts take years — but that's the beauty of OSRS, there's no rush and no subscription fatigue. 

Should I play on PC or mobile? 
Both! PC offers superior performance, multiple monitors, and precise clicking.
title: OSRS New Player Guide 2026 — Complete Beginner's Handbook | Zero to Bossing

text:
lay on PC or mobile? 
Both! PC offers superior performance, multiple monitors, and precise clicking. Mobile lets you train AFK skills (woodcutting, fishing, etc.) during downtime. The same account works on both platforms seamlessly. Many successful players use PC for serious gameplay and mobile for casual skilling sessions. 

What's the difference between OSRS and RS3? 
They're completely different games sharing similar roots.
title: OSRS New Player Guide 2026 — Complete Beginner's Handbook | Zero to Bossing

text:
at's the difference between OSRS and RS3? 
They're completely different games sharing similar roots. OSRS (this guide) is based on the 2007 version — classic combat, simpler graphics, nostalgic feel, 200K+ active players. RS3 evolved into a modern MMO with microtransactions, Evolution of Combat (EoC), very different gameplay. OSRS is generally considered the more popular and community-driven version. Once you pick one, your account doesn't transfer between them.
title: OSRS New Player Guide 2026 — Complete Beginner's Handbook | Zero to Bossing

text:
popular and community-driven version. Once you pick one, your account doesn't transfer between them. 

Can I make real money playing OSRS? 
Technically yes through legitimate means (streaming, content creation, services), but Jagex strictly prohibits Real World Trading (RWT) — selling in-game GP for real money. Stick to legitimate methods.
title: OSRS New Player Guide 2026 — Complete Beginner's Handbook | Zero to Bossing

text:
prohibits Real World Trading (RWT) — selling in-game GP for real money. Stick to legitimate methods. Many players earn enough in-game GP to sustain their membership (Bonds) without ever spending real cash, which is the closest to "profitable" most players get. 

What's an Ironman? Should I start as one? 
Ironman Mode is a challenging playstyle where you cannot trade with other players or use the Grand Exchange. Everything you use must be gathered or crafted yourself.
title: OSRS New Player Guide 2026 — Complete Beginner's Handbook | Zero to Bossing

text:
th other players or use the Grand Exchange. Everything you use must be gathered or crafted yourself. It's incredibly rewarding but significantly harder. Recommendation: Start as a regular account for your first character. Experience the full economy and social aspects of OSRS. You can always create an Ironman later once you understand the game deeply. 

I keep dying and losing stuff. Is this normal? 
Absolutely! Death is part of OSRS.
title: OSRS New Player Guide 2026 — Complete Beginner's Handbook | Zero to Bossing

text:
he game deeply. 

I keep dying and losing stuff. Is this normal? 
Absolutely! Death is part of OSRS. Veterans die regularly — sometimes intentionally for strategic reasons (teleporting to spawn faster, respawning with full health). The key is to never risk what you can't afford to lose . Carry cheap gear for exploration, save your best equipment for situations you understand well.

ose . Carry cheap gear for exploration, save your best equipment for situations you understand well. 

How do I find people to play with? 
OSRS has several ways to connect: Clan Chat (join any public clan), Discord communities (hundreds of OSRS servers), Reddit (r/2007scape has 500K+ members), and in-game Friends List .
title: OSRS New Player Guide 2026 — Complete Beginner's Handbook | Zero to Bossing

text:
ities (hundreds of OSRS servers), Reddit (r/2007scape has 500K+ members), and in-game Friends List . The community is famously welcoming to new players — don't be afraid to ask questions! 

What's the best skill to train first as a brand new player? 
Melee combat (Attack + Strength) is the best starting choice because it's cheapest, simplest, and prepares you for all quests and content. After reaching 40+ Attack/Strength, train Magic to 55 for High Alchemy (passive income).
title: OSRS New Player Guide 2026 — Complete Beginner's Handbook | Zero to Bossing

text:
nd content. After reaching 40+ Attack/Strength, train Magic to 55 for High Alchemy (passive income). Then branch into Ranged for bossing. Read our Combat Training Guide for the exact route. 

How do I set up my bank efficiently from day one? 
Open your bank at Lumbridge Castle (2nd floor). Click the "tab" icons at the top of your bank to create tabs. Recommended tab setup: Tab 1 = Food/Potions, Tab 2 = Gear, Tab 3 = Skilling Supplies, Tab 4 = Quest Items, Tab 5 = Valuable Items.
title: OSRS New Player Guide 2026 — Complete Beginner's Handbook | Zero to Bossing

text:
Food/Potions, Tab 2 = Gear, Tab 3 = Skilling Supplies, Tab 4 = Quest Items, Tab 5 = Valuable Items. Always right-click → "Withdraw-All" instead of clicking items individually. 

Should I use a guide for every quest, or try blind first? 
Use guides for your first 10 quests to learn how quests work in OSRS. After that, try some quests blind — they're designed to be solvable with the in-game clues. If you get stuck for 10+ minutes, look up the wiki.

designed to be solvable with the in-game clues. If you get stuck for 10+ minutes, look up the wiki. Never feel shame about using guides — even veteran players use them for complex quests like Desert Treasure or Monkey Madness .

ed general — a 5-phase Zarosian boss locked deep in the Ancient Prison beneath the God Wars Dungeon. This guide covers every phase mechanic, duo and trio strategies, gear setups, and how to farm her 10M-16M GP/hr profitably.

3. Phase-by-Phase Strategy 
Phase Nex Attacks Strategy 
💨 Smoke Ranged + Poison clouds Spread out. Don't stand in poison clouds. Use Protect from Missiles. 
🌑 Shadow Melee + Shadow damage Stay away from dark spots. Protect from Melee. Nex charges shadow bombs — dodge. 
🩸 Blood Heals from all attacks CRITICAL: When Nex summons red blood orbs, STOP attacking. Every hit heals her. Wait for orbs to despawn. 
❄️ Ice Freeze + Protect from Melee Use Ranged only (Nex prays melee).
title: OSRS Nex Guide 2026 — Strategy, Gear Setup, Loot Table & Duo/Trio Tactics

text:
er. Wait for orbs to despawn. 
❄️ Ice Freeze + Protect from Melee Use Ranged only (Nex prays melee). Dodge ice prison attack — if you get frozen, teammate must free you. 
⚡ Zaros All attacks + Turmoil curse Switch to Melee (Fang). Nex uses Turmoil — drains your stats. Stay on Protect from Magic. Final phase — dump specs. 

4. Duo Roles 
Player 1 (Main DPS): Ranged for Smoke/Shadow/Blood/Ice → Melee (Fang) for Zaros. Focuses on dealing damage.

6. Frequently Asked Questions 
Q: Is Nex harder than Theatre of Blood? 
A: Different difficulty types. ToB requires perfect team coordination across 6 rooms. Nex is a single 5-phase boss fight.

ty types. ToB requires perfect team coordination across 6 rooms. Nex is a single 5-phase boss fight. Nex is easier to learn than ToB but still punishing — especially the Blood and Zaros phases. 

Q: Can I solo Nex? 
A: Technically yes, but extremely difficult. Nex solo requires maxed stats, perfect prayer flicking, and BIS gear. Most players trio Nex for consistent kills. Duo is the sweet spot for profit.

licking, and BIS gear. Most players trio Nex for consistent kills. Duo is the sweet spot for profit.

📅 Published: June 7, 2026 | ⏱️ 15 min read | ✍️ OSRS Guru 

👹 Boss Guide — Updated June 2026 The Nightmare of Ashihama — the Sleeper beneath Slepe — houses some of the most valuable unique drops in OSRS: Inquisitor Armor and the 400M GP Harmonised Orb.
title: OSRS Nightmare & Phosani's Nightmare Guide 2026 — Curse Flicking, Phases & Inquisitor Drops

text:
ses some of the most valuable unique drops in OSRS: Inquisitor Armor and the 400M GP Harmonised Orb. This guide covers both the regular team encounter and the solo Phosani's variant, with complete curse flicking mechanics, all 4 phases, full gear progression, and how to maximize your unique drop rate. 
🌙 Nightmare — Quick Reference 
Location: Slepe Dungeon, Morytania Team Size: 1-5 Regular / Solo Phosani's 
Best Drop: Harmonised Orb (~400M) Unique Rate (Phosani's): ~1/200 (3x Regular) 

1.
title: OSRS Nightmare & Phosani's Nightmare Guide 2026 — Curse Flicking, Phases & Inquisitor Drops

text:
Solo Phosani's 
Best Drop: Harmonised Orb (~400M) Unique Rate (Phosani's): ~1/200 (3x Regular) 

1. The Curse Mechanic — Master This or Die 
The Nightmare's signature attack is the curse — a charged attack that bypasses ALL protection prayers. When the Nightmare growls, it's charging a curse with a specific combat style. You must pray the correct style in the exact tick the curse lands. Miss by even one tick = 50-70 damage.
title: OSRS Nightmare & Phosani's Nightmare Guide 2026 — Curse Flicking, Phases & Inquisitor Drops

text:
must pray the correct style in the exact tick the curse lands. Miss by even one tick = 50-70 damage. 
Learning the audio cues: High-pitched growl = Magic curse (Protect from Magic). Low guttural growl = Melee curse (Protect from Melee). Mid-range roar = Ranged curse (Protect from Missiles). Use game audio when learning — this is non-negotiable. After 20-30 KC, you'll start recognizing the visual wind-up animations too.

this is non-negotiable. After 20-30 KC, you'll start recognizing the visual wind-up animations too. The curse is the #1 killer at Nightmare — master it first, everything else second. 

2. Phase-by-Phase Breakdown (Regular Nightmare) 
Phase Mechanics Strategy 
1. Standard Curse + Standard attacks Prayer flick curses. DPS with Crush weapons (Bludgeon/Inq Mace). 
2. Sleepwalkers 4 Sleepwalkers spawn in corners → crawl toward Nightmare Kill ALL 4 before they reach her.

text:
epwalkers 4 Sleepwalkers spawn in corners → crawl toward Nightmare Kill ALL 4 before they reach her. Each that reaches = massive damage. Blowpipe for farthest, melee for nearest. Split directions with your team. 
3. Husks & Parasites Husks (Melee immune to everything else) + Parasites (Magic immune) Husks = Melee only. Parasites = Magic only. Wrong style = zero damage. Kill Parasites first (they heal Nightmare).

4. Enrage Faster curses, black flowers on floor, faster attacks Dodge flowers (explode for 30+ damage). Curse flicks must be PERFECT. Dump specs at < 10%. 

3. Phosani's Nightmare — Solo Endgame 
The solo-only hard mode. You cannot pray against any special attack — curses, flowers, and Sleepwalker damage must all be dodged by movement. Sleepwalkers spawn in EVERY phase, not just Phase 2.

5. Frequently Asked Questions 
Q: Regular or Phosani's for loot? 
A: Phosani's — if you can handle it. Triple the unique rate. But expect to die repeatedly while learning. 30+ deaths before your first Phosani's KC is normal. Start with 20+ regular Nightmare KC first. 

Q: Is Nightmare worth doing without max gear? 
A: Yes, but expect slow kills.
title: OSRS Nightmare & Phosani's Nightmare Guide 2026 — Curse Flicking, Phases & Inquisitor Drops

text:
Nightmare KC first. 

Q: Is Nightmare worth doing without max gear? 
A: Yes, but expect slow kills. A budget setup with Bludgeon takes 15-20 minutes per solo. Max gear with Inquisitor's Mace takes 8-12 minutes. The unique table is valuable enough that even slow kills are profitable — the 400M Orb averages out over time. 

🌙 The Sleeper's Riches 
The Nightmare is a marathon boss. Kills are long, the unique table is deep, and dry streaks are legendary.

ghtmare is a marathon boss. Kills are long, the unique table is deep, and dry streaks are legendary. But when you see that purple text in the chat box — Harmonised Orb or Inquisitor piece — it's one of the biggest dopamine hits in OSRS. Master the curse flick. Stay patient. The drops will come.

text:
Q: What's the difference between Nightmare and Phosani's Nightmare?
A: Phosani's Nightmare is the solo-only variant with triple the unique drop rate (~1/200 vs ~1/400 for Inquisitor pieces). Phosani's has faster attack speed, harder curses, and Sleepwalkers in every phase. You cannot pray against any special attack in Phosani's — everything must be dodged by movement. It's significantly harder but far more rewarding per hour.
title: OSRS Nightmare & Phosani's Nightmare Guide 2026 — Curse Flicking, Phases & Inquisitor Drops

text:
Q: How does curse flicking work at Nightmare?
A: The Nightmare growls before each curse attack. The curse has a specific attack style (Melee/Ranged/Magic) that bypasses all protection prayers. You must pray the CORRECT style in the tick the curse hits. Miss = 50-70 damage. Learn the audio cue — the growl pitch changes based on the curse style. High-pitched growl = Magic curse. Low growl = Melee curse. Medium = Ranged curse.
title: OSRS Nightmare & Phosani's Nightmare Guide 2026 — Curse Flicking, Phases & Inquisitor Drops

text:
Q: What is the best drop from Nightmare?
A: The Harmonised Nightmare Orb (~400M GP) creates the Harmonised Nightmare Staff — BIS for certain magic encounters. Inquisitor Armor pieces (Mace ~150M, Hauberk ~80M, Plateskirt ~50M) have a set bonus against crush-weak enemies. The Eldritch Orb (~80M) and Volatile Orb (~40M) create powerful spec weapons.

Letting Kingdom approval drop below 100%. Approval affects resource yield proportionally. At 50% approval, you get 50% of the resources but still pay full maintenance. Check daily. 
Underfunding the Kingdom coffers. Workers deduct 75K/day. If the coffers drop below 750K, resource yield decreases. Keep at least 750K-1M in reserve.

text:
Q: What is the best passive money maker in OSRS?
A: Managing Miscellania (Kingdom Management) is the single best passive money maker. After completing Throne of Miscellania and Royal Trouble quests, your workers collect resources while you're offline, generating 200,000-400,000 GP per day with just 2 minutes of maintenance. It requires 750K-1M GP in the coffers and daily approval rating checks.
title: OSRS Passive Money Making While Offline 2026 — Earn GP Overnight with Kingdom, Herbs & Flipping

text:
Q: How much GP can I earn passively per day in OSRS?
A: With all passive methods combined (Kingdom, herb runs, birdhouses, GE flipping), you can earn 500,000-1,400,000 GP per day with 10-15 minutes of active play. Over a month, this is 15-42M GP — enough to fund mid-level gear upgrades without ever grinding for cash.
title: OSRS Passive Money Making While Offline 2026 — Earn GP Overnight with Kingdom, Herbs & Flipping

text:
Q: Do herb runs work while I'm offline?
A: No — herbs grow in real time whether you're online or offline, but you must be logged in to plant and harvest. A herb run takes 5 minutes of active play, then the herbs grow over 80 minutes (real time). You log back in to harvest. This is semi-passive: 5 minutes of work every 80 minutes for 200K-800K GP per run.
title: OSRS Passive Money Making While Offline 2026 — Earn GP Overnight with Kingdom, Herbs & Flipping

text:
Q: Can I flip items on the Grand Exchange while logged out?
A: Yes! The GE processes buy and sell orders while you're offline. Place buy offers before logging out — when you return, items will have been purchased. Then list them for sale before your next logout. This requires capital but generates pure passive income with zero active playtime.

text:
Q: How many Pest Control points for full Void?
A: Full Void set costs 850 points total: 250 for Top, 250 for Robe, 200 for Gloves, 150 for Melee/Range/Mage Helm. Elite Void upgrade adds 200 points. Total for full Elite Void: 1,050 points (~8-12 hours depending on combat level bracket).
title: OSRS Pest Control & Void Knight Guide 2026 — Full Void Set, Points Strategy & Combat XP

text:
Q: What combat level is best for Pest Control?
A: The Medium boat (combat 70-99) is the sweet spot — games are fast, points are decent (3 per win), and the pest difficulty is manageable. The Veteran boat (100+) gives 4 points per win but pests have more HP. Hardcore PC farmers use the Medium boat at exactly combat 99-100 for the best balance of speed and points.
title: OSRS Pest Control & Void Knight Guide 2026 — Full Void Set, Points Strategy & Combat XP

text:
Q: Is Void armor worth it in 2026?
A: Yes. Void Range gives +20% Ranged accuracy and +12.5% damage — it's BIS at many bosses including Vorkath, Zulrah, and Chambers of Xeric. Void Melee is BiS at Corporeal Beast. Elite Void (from Hard Combat Achievements) adds +2.5% more damage. It's one of the most valuable untradeable armor sets in the game.
title: OSRS Pest Control & Void Knight Guide 2026 — Full Void Set, Points Strategy & Combat XP

text:
Q: How long does it take to get full Void?
A: About 6-10 hours on the Medium boat (70-99 combat). On the Veteran boat (100+), about 5-8 hours. The Elite Void upgrade adds 2-3 more hours. Use the official Pest Control world (344) for always-full boats and the fastest games.

OSRS Phantom Muspah Guide 2026 — Strategy, Gear & 6M GP/hr Profit 
📅 Published: June 7, 2026 | ⏱️ 13 min read | ✍️ OSRS Guru 

👹 Boss Guide — Updated June 2026 The Phantom Muspah is a two-phase demonic boss unlocked after Secrets of the North. It's one of the best mid-to-high-level money makers at 4.5M-6M GP/hr with lower supply costs than Vorkath.
title: OSRS Phantom Muspah Guide 2026 — Boss Strategy, Gear Setup & Profit

text:
ne of the best mid-to-high-level money makers at 4.5M-6M GP/hr with lower supply costs than Vorkath. This guide covers both combat phases, gear setups, and exactly how to handle the ice teleport mechanic. 
👻 Phantom Muspah — Quick Reference 
Quest: Secrets of the North Location: Ghorrock Dungeon (Frozen Waste) 
Phases: 2 (Melee → Ranged phase) GP/hr: 4.5M-6M 

1. Two-Phase Fight Overview 
Phase 1 (Melee): Muspah walks toward you and attacks with Melee. Use Protect from Melee.
title: OSRS Phantom Muspah Guide 2026 — Boss Strategy, Gear Setup & Profit

text:
t Overview 
Phase 1 (Melee): Muspah walks toward you and attacks with Melee. Use Protect from Melee. Attack with Ranged (Ruby Bolts e). Stay away — kite Muspah around the room to avoid damage. 
Phase 2 (Ranged): Muspah becomes transparent and floats. Attacks with Magic-based Ranged. Switch to Protect from Missiles. Switch to Melee (Fang). Muspah teleports to you — stay calm and keep DPS up.

💨 Smoke Dash Muspah dashes through you Melee phase only. Kite — don't stand still. 
🔮 Teleport Muspah teleports to an ice pool Ranged phase only. Step on the glowing pool to prevent Muspah's charged attack.

A: Comparable at max efficiency. Vorkath is more consistent (guaranteed 150K+ per kill). Muspah has higher variance from rare drops (Venator Shard spikes). Muspah uses fewer supplies. Master both and switch based on what you enjoy.

title: OSRS Phantom Muspah Guide 2026 — Boss Strategy, Gear Setup & Profit

text:
Q: What quest is required for Phantom Muspah?
A: Secrets of the North quest must be completed to access the Phantom Muspah boss. The quest requires 69 Magic, 64 Thieving, 56 Agility, and 50 Mining. After completing the quest, you can fight the boss in the Ghorrock Dungeon (ice path) beneath the Frozen Waste Plateau.
title: OSRS Phantom Muspah Guide 2026 — Boss Strategy, Gear Setup & Profit

text:
Q: How much GP/hr is Phantom Muspah?
A: Phantom Muspah averages 4.5M-6M GP per hour with maxed combat and good gear. The main profit comes from the Venator Shard (1/100, ~8M), Ancient Icon (1/50, ~500K), and consistent drops of Muspah Spines, noted Super Restores, and Rune items.
title: OSRS Phantom Muspah Guide 2026 — Boss Strategy, Gear Setup & Profit

text:
Q: What combat style should I use against Muspah?
A: You need BOTH Melee and Ranged. Muspah has two phases: Melee phase (Protect from Magic, use Ranged with Ruby Bolts) and Ranged phase (Protect from Missiles, use Melee/Fang). The boss switches phases throughout the fight — bring gear switches for both styles.
title: OSRS Phantom Muspah Guide 2026 — Boss Strategy, Gear Setup & Profit

text:
Q: Is Phantom Muspah harder than Vorkath?
A: Comparable difficulty. Muspah has more mechanics to learn (2 phases, ice spikes, smoke dash, prayer drain) but hits less hard than Vorkath's dragonfire. Once you learn the rhythm, Muspah is very consistent — and the supply cost is lower since you don't need anti-fire protection.
title: OSRS Phantom Muspah Guide 2026 — Boss Strategy, Gear Setup & Profit

Beginner Quest FAQs 

1. What Are Quests in OSRS? 
Quests are story-driven tasks you complete for NPCs (non-player characters) across Gielinor. Unlike other MMOs, OSRS quests are hand-crafted adventures — not "kill 10 wolves" fetch quests. They have lore, puzzles, bosses, and often hilarious dialogue.
title: OSRS Questing Guide for Beginners 2026 — Best Starter Quests & Rewards

text:
— not "kill 10 wolves" fetch quests. They have lore, puzzles, bosses, and often hilarious dialogue. 
There are currently 160+ quests in OSRS, ranging from 5-minute beginner tasks to multi-hour epic storylines. As a new player, you only need to focus on about 20 quests in your first month. 
📋 Quest Requirements 
Every quest lists its requirements : skill levels needed, items to bring, and sometimes other quests to complete first.

3. How to Start a Quest — Step by Step 
Open your Quest Journal — Click the shield icon in the bottom-right tab menu, or press Alt+Q . This shows all available quests. 
Click a quest name — Read the description, requirements, and recommended items. 
Travel to the quest start location — The journal tells you where to go and who to talk to.

Claim your reward — After the final cutscene, you'll receive XP lamps, items, or new abilities.

8. Beginner Quest FAQs 
Can I fail a quest? No — you can't permanently fail a quest. If you die mid-quest, you respawn and can try again. Some quests restart if you leave mid-way, but you never lose progress permanently. 
Do I need high stats to start questing? No.

leave mid-way, but you never lose progress permanently. 
Do I need high stats to start questing? No. Many of the best quests (Waterfall Quest, Fairytale I) have zero combat requirements. A few require specific skill levels, but the wiki clearly shows what you need. 
What's the fastest way to get 32 Quest Points for Dragon Slayer? Do every F2P novice quest in order — you'll hit 32 QP in 1–2 hours.

Should I use guides for every quest? Yes, especially at first. The wiki has step-by-step walkthroughs with maps. There's no shame in following a guide — even veterans do it for complex quests. 
Are quests worth it for Ironmen? Absolutely.

text:
I lose a quest item? Most quest items can be re-obtained by talking to the NPC who gave them to you. If you accidentally drop or destroy a quest item, return to the NPC and ask for another. For rare items (like the Silverlight sword), you can get a replacement from the NPC who originally gave it. 
Can I do quests in any order? Most quests can be done in any order, but some require prerequisites (other quests completed first). Always check the quest journal or Wiki before starting.

text:
Q: What are Mystic Vigor and Deadeye prayers?
A: Mystic Vigor (level 62 Prayer) gives +2% Magic damage and +18% Magic accuracy. Deadeye (level 63 Prayer) gives +2% Ranged damage and +18% Ranged accuracy. Both are FREE drops from the Royal Titans boss. They are the mid-game alternatives to Augury (+4% Magic, 77 Prayer, ~5M scroll) and Rigour (+8% Ranged, 77 Prayer, ~15M scroll).
title: OSRS Royal Titans Guide 2026 — Duo Boss, Mystic Vigor & Deadeye Prayers, Loot Table

text:
Q: Can I solo Royal Titans?
A: Yes but duo is strongly recommended. The fight is designed for two players — one handles the Brand Titan (Melee/Ranged), the other handles the Solar Titan (Magic). Soloing is possible at 90+ combat but kills are significantly slower (4-6 min vs 2-3 min duo). Find a partner on World 306 or the OSRS Discord.
title: OSRS Royal Titans Guide 2026 — Duo Boss, Mystic Vigor & Deadeye Prayers, Loot Table

text:
Q: What stats do I need for Royal Titans?
A: Minimum: 70+ in all combat stats, 62 Prayer (for Mystic Vigor/Deadeye). Recommended: 80+ combat stats, 70+ Prayer. The boss is aimed at mid-level players and is significantly easier than GWD bosses. No quests are required to access the fight.
title: OSRS Royal Titans Guide 2026 — Duo Boss, Mystic Vigor & Deadeye Prayers, Loot Table

text:
Q: Is Deadeye worth using if I can afford Rigour?
A: No — Rigour is strictly better (+8% Ranged damage vs Deadeye's +2%). But if you don't have 15M GP for the Dexterous Prayer Scroll or can't afford 77 Prayer yet, Deadeye gives you a FREE +2% Ranged damage at only 63 Prayer. Use Deadeye as a stepping stone while saving for Rigour.

Safe spots let you fight monsters using Ranged or Magic without taking ANY damage — no food needed, no banking, almost fully AFK. This guide shows you exactly how to find and use them.

Safe Spot FAQs 

1. What Is a Safe Spot? 
A safe spot is a position where you can attack a monster with Ranged or Magic, but the monster cannot reach you because an obstacle (rock, corner, tree, furniture) is in the way. 
The monster tries to walk around the obstacle to reach you, but if the pathfinding keeps them stuck, you take zero damage for the entire fight.
title: OSRS Safe Spots Guide for Beginners 2026 — Fight Without Taking Damage

text:
le to reach you, but if the pathfinding keeps them stuck, you take zero damage for the entire fight. 
🎯 Why Safe Spots Are Game-Changing 
Zero food cost — train for hours with no banking 
Safe spot training = 100% of your XP without HP drain 
Perfect for AFK sessions — let it run while doing something else 
Lets low-level players kill higher-level monsters far above their combat level 

2.
title: OSRS Safe Spots Guide for Beginners 2026 — Fight Without Taking Damage

something else 
Lets low-level players kill higher-level monsters far above their combat level 

2. How to Use a Safe Spot — Step by Step 
Have Ranged or Magic equipped — Safe spots only work with Ranged/Magic. Melee requires you to be standing next to the monster. 
Identify the obstacle — A rock, a corner of wall, furniture, or any tile the monster cannot path through. 
Stand on one side of the obstacle — Position yourself so the obstacle is directly between you and the monster.
title: OSRS Safe Spots Guide for Beginners 2026 — Fight Without Taking Damage

text:
ne side of the obstacle — Position yourself so the obstacle is directly between you and the monster. 
Attack the monster from range — Click the monster. Your character will shoot/cast at it. 
Watch the monster's pathing — It should try to walk toward you, but the obstacle blocks it. If it reaches you, reposition. 
Confirm you're not taking damage — Your HP should stay at 100% for the whole fight. If not, your safe spot is broken — find a new angle.
title: OSRS Safe Spots Guide for Beginners 2026 — Fight Without Taking Damage

💡 Corners Work Best 
The most reliable safe spots are corners — stand behind a corner tile so the monster can't navigate around it. Dungeons and cave interiors are full of these.

🗺️ Goblins — Lumbridge Swamp Caves 
How to set up: Enter the cave and find the northeastern corner where two cave walls meet at a 90° angle.

7. Advanced Safe Spot Tips 
🔄 Multi-monster safe spots — Some spots let you safe spot multiple monsters at once. Jellies in the Fremennik Slayer Dungeon can be lined up in clusters.

🚪 Doors as safe spots — In some locations, a closed door acts as an obstacle. Close the door and shoot through it at monsters on the other side. 
🧊 Freeze + safe spot — Cast Ice Burst/Barrage (high level Magic) to freeze a monster in place, then safe spot it from any angle. Used for nightmare Slayer tasks.

8. Safe Spot FAQs 
Do safe spots work in PvP (Wilderness)? Yes, but other players can navigate around obstacles in ways monsters can't (players can solve pathfinding better). Safe spots are most reliable against NPCs, not players. 
Will monsters ever figure out how to reach me in a safe spot? Sometimes. If a safe spot is partially blocked, the monster may find an alternate path.
title: OSRS Safe Spots Guide for Beginners 2026 — Fight Without Taking Damage

text:
a safe spot? Sometimes. If a safe spot is partially blocked, the monster may find an alternate path. Always monitor your HP for the first minute to confirm the spot is solid. 
Can I safe spot with Melee? No. Melee requires you to be directly adjacent to the monster. You can position in a corner to only take hits from one direction, but that's a "tank spot" not a true safe spot. 
Is safe spotting considered exploiting or bannable? No.
title: OSRS Safe Spots Guide for Beginners 2026 — Fight Without Taking Damage

text:
that's a "tank spot" not a true safe spot. 
Is safe spotting considered exploiting or bannable? No. Safe spotting is a completely legitimate and intentional game mechanic that Jagex has never punished players for using. It's a fundamental part of OSRS strategy. 
What's the best cannon spot for beginners? Ogress Warriors (Corsair Cove Dungeon) after Dragon Slayer I. Set up Dwarf Cannon (Dwarf Cannon quest required), safe spot the Ogresses with Ranged while cannon hits.
title: OSRS Safe Spots Guide for Beginners 2026 — Fight Without Taking Damage

text:
up Dwarf Cannon (Dwarf Cannon quest required), safe spot the Ogresses with Ranged while cannon hits. Very fast XP and decent GP. 
How do I know if I've found a valid safe spot? After attacking, watch your HP bar for 30-60 seconds. If you take zero damage during that time and the monster is visibly stuck (running in circles or against a wall), you've found a valid safe spot. If the monster reaches you, reposition immediately.
title: OSRS Safe Spots Guide for Beginners 2026 — Fight Without Taking Damage

text:
against a wall), you've found a valid safe spot. If the monster reaches you, reposition immediately. 
Can I safe spot multiple monsters at the same time? Yes! Multi-monster safe spots exist. Jellies in Fremennik Slayer Dungeon can be lined up around a single pillar. Hill Giants in Edgeville can sometimes be safespotted in pairs if they both path to the same obstacle. Use RuneLite's Monster Highlight plugin to find verified multi-spots.
title: OSRS Safe Spots Guide for Beginners 2026 — Fight Without Taking Damage

text:
oth path to the same obstacle. Use RuneLite's Monster Highlight plugin to find verified multi-spots. 
What's the difference between a safe spot and a cannon spot? A safe spot uses obstacles to prevent a monster from reaching you. A cannon spot is where you set up a Dwarf Cannon to hit monsters while you safe spot or tank. The best cannon spots are also safe spots — you attack with Ranged/Magic while your cannon deals automatic damage.
title: OSRS Safe Spots Guide for Beginners 2026 — Fight Without Taking Damage

text:
n spots are also safe spots — you attack with Ranged/Magic while your cannon deals automatic damage. 
Do I need a specific quest completed to use safe spots? No quests are required to use safe spots — it's a base game mechanic. However, some of the best safe spot locations are in dungeons that require quest progress (Dragon Slayer I for Crandor, Lost City for Taverley Dungeon, etc.).
title: OSRS Safe Spots Guide for Beginners 2026 — Fight Without Taking Damage

text:
ons that require quest progress (Dragon Slayer I for Crandor, Lost City for Taverley Dungeon, etc.). 
Why does my safe spot sometimes break when I log out and back in? When you log out mid-combat, the monster may have time to pathfind a new route to your last position. Always re-verify your safe spot after logging back in. Also, if another player walks through your tile while you're logged out, it can reset the monster's pathfinding.
title: OSRS Safe Spots Guide for Beginners 2026 — Fight Without Taking Damage

text:
ther player walks through your tile while you're logged out, it can reset the monster's pathfinding. 
Can I use safe spots for Slayer tasks? Absolutely — this is one of the best uses of safe spots. High-Defence Slayer monsters like Jellies, Turoths, and Kurasks can be safely safespotted. This saves massive amounts of food and lets you complete tasks much faster. Check the Slayer master's advice for known safe spots.
title: OSRS Safe Spots Guide for Beginners 2026 — Fight Without Taking Damage

text:
food and lets you complete tasks much faster. Check the Slayer master's advice for known safe spots. 
What's the best F2P safe spot for Ranged training? Lesser Demons in the Karamja Dungeon cage are the best F2P Ranged training spot. At level 30-60 Ranged, you can gain 25,000-40,000 Ranged XP/hr with zero food cost. Bring 1,000+ iron or steel arrows and High Alch the Rune Med Helms (11,000 GP each).
title: OSRS Safe Spots Guide for Beginners 2026 — Fight Without Taking Damage

zero food cost. Bring 1,000+ iron or steel arrows and High Alch the Rune Med Helms (11,000 GP each). 
How far away can I be from a monster and still safe spot it? Your maximum distance depends on your attack style's range: Ranged with a shortbow is 7 tiles; with a longbow is 8 tiles; Magic is 8 tiles (10 with a staff of fire/air). The obstacle must stay between you and the monster at all times within this range. 
Can other players ruin my safe spot? Yes, unfortunately.

Can other players ruin my safe spot? Yes, unfortunately. In multi-combat areas, another player can attack "your" monster and cause it to move, breaking your safe spot. In P2P worlds, this is less common because there are more monsters. In F2P, popular safe spots (like the Karamja Lesser Demon cage) can get crowded.

What's the most GP per hour I can make using safe spots? Black Demons in Edgeville Dungeon (P2P) can yield 100,000-200,000 GP/hr when you alch your drops. Hill Giants are steadier for low levels at 40,000-80,000 GP/hr. The key is using High Alchemy (55 Magic) to convert drops to GP instantly without banking.

1. How to Start Sailing in OSRS 
Starting Sailing is incredibly easy — there are zero skill requirements .
title: OSRS Sailing 1-99 Complete Guide 2026 — Fastest Routes, AFK Training & Profit

text:
to Start Sailing in OSRS 
Starting Sailing is incredibly easy — there are zero skill requirements . Follow these steps: 
Go to Port Sarim docks (south of Falador) 
Talk to Will or Anne at the dock 
Accept and complete the Pandemonium quest 
Receive your Raft (first boat) + Captain's Log 
You're now ready to train Sailing! 

💡 Pro Tip: Complete Pandemonium immediately on any account — it takes under 15 minutes and unlocks everything. Even level 3 skillers can do it with zero combat.

📋 Port Tasks (Level 1+) 
Port Tasks are your starting activity. Visit the noticeboard at any major port, pick up a task, and complete it for XP. Two types exist: 
Courier deliveries: Sail cargo between ports. Easy, consistent XP. 
Bounty hunts: Hunt down a specific target at sea. More XP, slightly more risk. 
Port Tasks are best from level 1-30 before you unlock Barracuda Trials. After level 30, only do them when you want a break from trials.

before you unlock Barracuda Trials. After level 30, only do them when you want a break from trials. 
🗺️ Sea Charting (Level 1+) 
Sea Charting is a one-time exploration activity . Sail to uncharted map zones, and you're rewarded with a lump sum of XP for each new area discovered. In total, charting every zone grants 691,000 XP — enough to take you from level 1 to approximately level 55 on its own. 
Use the OSRS Wiki Sailing Map with WikiSync to track which charting spots you've completed.

Use the OSRS Wiki Sailing Map with WikiSync to track which charting spots you've completed. The RuneLite Sailing plugin highlights undiscovered zones on your in-game map. 
⚓ Shipwreck Salvaging (Level 15+) — The AFK King 
This is the most popular training method for a reason. You sail to shipwreck locations, cast your salvaging hook, and wait 2–4 minutes while your character automatically gathers loot and XP.

🏎️ Barracuda Trials (Level 30+) — Fastest XP 
Barracuda Trials are time-trial obstacle courses on the water. Think of them as Sailing's equivalent of Rooftop Agility courses . Each trial has a fixed layout, and your goal is to navigate through checkpoints as fast as possible. 
The faster you complete a trial, the more XP you earn. Mastering each course's layout is key to maximizing your XP rates.

A: Absolutely. Sailing unlocks some of the best money makers in the game (Doom of Mokhaiotl at 15M-23M/hr), provides excellent AFK training, and the cost to 99 is only ~500K GP. It's one of the most cost-effective skills in OSRS.

3M 🔴 Extreme Focus ✅ Yes 
Doom of Mokhaiotl is the highest GP/hr activity in all of OSRS right now . It's a deep-delve Sailing boss encounter where you descend through 16 increasingly difficult waves, each with unique mechanics and escalating rewards. 
How It Works 
You sail to the Mokhaiotl Depths (unlocked via a Sailing-only sea route south of Fossil Island) and descend through Delve levels 1–16. Each wave throws a new combination of enemies, environmental hazards, and boss mechanics at you.

16. Each wave throws a new combination of enemies, environmental hazards, and boss mechanics at you. Loot accumulates per wave, and the deeper you go, the more valuable the drops become.

90+ Sailing — required to navigate the Mokhaiotl Depths currents 
95+ Ranged — primary DPS style;Bow of Faerdhinen + Crystal Armor or better 
95+ Magic — needed for specific wave mechanics and freezing enemies 
90+ Defence — you will take damage even with perfect prayer

Why Duo? 
Yama's mechanics are explicitly designed for two players. One player handles crowd control and adds (typically the Magic user), while the other focuses on single-target DPS (Ranged or Melee).

There are currently 4 underwater coral patches (Fossil Island, Hosidius Reef, Piscatoris Cove, Varlamore Coast). A full run at 77+ Farming takes 5–7 minutes and nets ~400K GP . text:
Q: What is the best Sailing money maker in OSRS 2026?
A: Doom of Mokhaiotl (Delve 1–16) is the highest GP/hr Sailing activity at 15M–23M GP per hour. It requires near-maxed Ranged and Magic, 90+ Sailing, and high-end gear. For mid-level players, Cutting Raw Marlin (3M–10.5M/hr at 82+ Sailing) and Frost Dragons (~4M/hr at 87+ Sailing) are more accessible options.
title: OSRS Sailing Money Making Guide 2026 — GP/hr Ranked (Best to Worst)

text:
Q: Can you make money while training Sailing?
A: Yes. Shipwreck Salvaging from level 15+ generates 15M–20M+ GP profit on the way to 99. Deep Sea Trawling (level 50+) earns 2.3M–3.3M GP/hr while also training Fishing. Sailing is one of the few skills where you profit while training to 99.
title: OSRS Sailing Money Making Guide 2026 — GP/hr Ranked (Best to Worst)

text:
Q: What Sailing level do I need for Frost Dragons?
A: You need level 87 Sailing to access Frost Dragons, plus high Magic and preferably a Slayer task. They earn approximately 4M GP per hour with consistent drops of noted frost dragon bones.
title: OSRS Sailing Money Making Guide 2026 — GP/hr Ranked (Best to Worst)

text:
Q: Is Sailing worth training for money making?
A: Absolutely. Sailing unlocks the highest GP/hr activity in OSRS (Doom of Mokhaiotl at 23M/hr). Even mid-level Sailing methods like Raw Marlin cutting (82+ Sailing, 3M–10.5M/hr) compete with established bosses like Vorkath and Zulrah. The skill pays for itself many times over.

text:
Q: When should I upgrade from Raft to Skiff in OSRS Sailing?
A: Upgrade from Raft to Skiff immediately at level 15 Sailing. The Skiff unlocks 2 crew slots and 1 facility slot, enabling Shipwreck Salvaging with a Bronze Hook and your first crew members. The upgrade costs approximately 25K GP and pays for itself in under an hour.
title: OSRS Sailing Ship Upgrades & Crew Guide 2026 — Best Boats, Facilities & Crew Setup

text:
Q: What is the best boat in OSRS Sailing?
A: The Sloop (unlocked at level 50 Sailing) is the best and final boat. It provides 5 crew slots and 3 facility slots, enabling full crew setups for all activities. There is currently no higher-tier boat beyond the Sloop as of June 2026.
title: OSRS Sailing Ship Upgrades & Crew Guide 2026 — Best Boats, Facilities & Crew Setup

text:
Q: Which Sailing facility should I install first?
A: Install the Salvaging Hook first (level 15), then Wind Catcher at level 35 (+5% global Sailing XP boost). If doing Deep Sea Trawling, add the Trawling Net at level 50. Crystal Extractor at level 73 provides passive crystal shards. Cannons and Teleport Focus are lower priority.
title: OSRS Sailing Ship Upgrades & Crew Guide 2026 — Best Boats, Facilities & Crew Setup

text:
Q: How do crew members work in OSRS Sailing?
A: Crew members provide passive bonuses to specific Sailing activities. Navigators speed up travel and improve trial times. Salvagers increase loot from Shipwreck Salvaging by 5-15%. Anglers boost Deep Sea Trawling catch rates. Recruit them starting at level 40+ from the Port Sarim Sailor's Guild.

4. Sarachnis Mechanics & Kill Strategy 
Sarachnis alternates between Ranged and Magic attacks, and periodically spawns spiderlings. Understanding each mechanic is key to efficient kills.

Kill Rotation 
Enter the lair with Protect from Magic active (magic is the more dangerous attack). 
Attack immediately -- Sarachnis always starts with a magic attack. 
Watch the projectiles: Green = switch to Missiles.

7. Advanced Tips & Efficiency 
Spec weapon swap: Bring a Dragon Dagger (p++) for special attacks. Use both specs at the start of each kill for free damage. With a Lightbearer ring, you can spec every other kill. 
Thralls: If you have access to the Arceuus spellbook, summoning a thrall adds ~1.5 DPS -- approximately 8% faster kills for zero inventory cost.

Use Xeric's Talisman: The "Xeric's Heart" teleport drops you near the Forthos Dungeon entrance. Combine with a house teleport for the fastest bank-and-return cycle. 
Alch runes in pouch: Bring nature and fire runes in a rune pouch. Many Sarachnis drops (rune items, dragonhide) alch for more than their GE value. 
Birdhouse run integration: Fossil Island is close to Great Kourend.

Using slash weapons. The Abyssal Whip at Sarachnis is significantly worse than a Dragon Mace. Always use crush. The accuracy difference is ~30%.

9. Frequently Asked Questions 
Q: Can I kill Sarachnis on a low-level Ironman? 
A: Yes! With base 70 melee stats, 43 Prayer, and a Dragon Mace, you can get kills. It will be slower (15-20 kills/hr) and you'll use more food, but the seed drops are immediately valuable. Train to 80+ Attack/Strength for comfortable trips. 

Q: Is the Sarachnis Cudgel worth grinding for? 
A: Absolutely for Ironmen.

for comfortable trips. 

Q: Is the Sarachnis Cudgel worth grinding for? 
A: Absolutely for Ironmen. At a 1/500 drop rate and 25-40 kills per hour, expect 12-20 hours to hit the drop rate. The cudgel is your best crush weapon until the Inquisitor's Mace from Nightmare (a much harder boss). It makes Gargoyles, Tekton, and other crush-weak monsters significantly faster. Regular accounts can also profit from it -- the cudgel sells for ~500K-1M GP.

Q: How do I get to the Forthos Dungeon quickly? 
A: Fastest method: Xeric's Talisman to "Xeric's Heart" -- run south into the Hosidius area, enter the dungeon entrance just south of the altar. Alternative: Skills Necklace to Woodcutting Guild, run east. Fairy Ring code DJR drops you near the Kourend Castle, then run south-west.

Q: Should I use ranged instead of melee at Sarachnis? 
A: Melee (crush) is better. While ranged works and lets you avoid some mechanics at distance, Sarachnis's crush weakness makes melee significantly faster. Ranged is only recommended if your melee stats are substantially lower than your ranged stats, or if you're a Hardcore Ironman who wants the safety of distance.

💡 Beginner Money-Making Strategy: The 3-Step Loop 
The most reliable way for beginners to earn GP through skilling follows this pattern: 
Pick ONE gathering skill you enjoy (Fishing, Mining, or Woodcutting).
title: OSRS Skills Overview for Beginners 2026 — All 23 Skills Explained Simply

text:
killing follows this pattern: 
Pick ONE gathering skill you enjoy (Fishing, Mining, or Woodcutting). Don't spread yourself thin — focus on one to reach profitable levels faster. 
Use the Grand Exchange to sell raw materials directly. Most beginners make more GP selling raw fish/ores/logs than processed versions, because high-level players buy them in bulk for fast XP. 
Reinvest GP into better tools (Rune pickaxe, Rune axe, Lobster pot) as soon as you can.

Frequently Asked Questions — OSRS Skills 
Q1: What's the maximum level for each skill in OSRS? Every skill in OSRS has a maximum level of 99 (about 13,034,431 XP). However, some skills can be virtually levelled beyond 99 through "virtual levels" shown in certain RuneLite plugins. In practice, once you hit 99, there's nothing new to unlock — you've maxed that skill.
title: OSRS Skills Overview for Beginners 2026 — All 23 Skills Explained Simply

text:
Lite plugins. In practice, once you hit 99, there's nothing new to unlock — you've maxed that skill. The total level cap is 2,277 (23 skills × 99). 
Q2: How long does it take to reach level 99 in a skill? It varies dramatically by skill. Fast skills like Cooking or Fletching can take 30-50 hours using efficient methods. Slow skills like Runecrafting , Agility , or Slayer can take 200-500+ hours.
title: OSRS Skills Overview for Beginners 2026 — All 23 Skills Explained Simply

sing efficient methods. Slow skills like Runecrafting , Agility , or Slayer can take 200-500+ hours. The key factor is XP per hour : some skills max out at ~40K XP/hr, while others can reach 800K+ XP/hr with the right methods. 
Q3: Which skills are the easiest to get to level 99? The fastest and easiest 99s for beginners: 
Cooking — Can reach 700K+ XP/hr making wines or cooking karambwans. Often the first 99 for most players. 
Fletching — Stringing bows gives 600K+ XP/hr.

Fletching — Stringing bows gives 600K+ XP/hr. Profitable to 99 if you buy materials wisely. 
Firemaking — Wintertodt is 300K+ XP/hr and profitable for supplies. 
Prayer — Very fast XP (500K+/hr) but extremely expensive (100M+ GP for 99).

Runecrafting — Historically the slowest. Even with Zeah bloods, maxes ~40K XP/hr AFK or ~90K XP/hr with Lava runes (very click-intensive). 
Agility — Maxes ~65K-75K XP/hr at Ardougne rooftop. Repetitive and requires constant clicking. 
Slayer — Average 20K-40K XP/hr overall.

Q7: Should I train one skill to 99 at a time, or spread out? For most players, spreading out your training is better because: 
Burning out on one skill is very common. Switching skills keeps the game fresh.

Quest requirements often ask for multiple mid-level skills, not one high-level skill. 
The exception: If you're close to a 99 (e.g., level 95+), it can be worth pushing through for the skill cape and the sense of achievement.

Q9: What do skillcapes do, and how do you get them? When you reach level 99 in any skill, you can buy that skill's cape from a specific NPC for 99,000 GP .
title: OSRS Skills Overview for Beginners 2026 — All 23 Skills Explained Simply

text:
n you reach level 99 in any skill, you can buy that skill's cape from a specific NPC for 99,000 GP . Skillcapes provide: 
A perk unique to that skill (e.g., Cooking cape prevents burning food, Crafting cape gives unlimited teleports to the Crafting Guild). 
The ability to perform the skillcape emote (a special animation). 
+9 bonus in all defensive stats, making them decent hybrid capes. 
The Max Cape (all 99s) combines all skillcape perks into one item.

Prayer above 77 (for Rigour/Augury) is expensive with marginal benefit. But 99 Prayer is still useful for the cape perk.

Q11: How do temporary boosts (potions, pies) work with skill requirements? Temporary boosts are crucial for questing and unlocking content without fully training a skill: 
Visible boosts (e.g., Attack potion, ranging potion): Raise your visible stat. You need the boosted level for combat, but NOT for quest requirements (quests check your base level).

Invisible boosts (e.g., Slayer helmet, Salve amulet): Apply a damage/accuracy multiplier without changing your visible level. 
Skill requirements for quests can sometimes be bypassed with spicy stews (from Recipe for Disaster) which randomly boost or drain stats by up to ±5.

Do Waterfall Quest immediately — free 13,675 Attack + Strength XP (level 1 → 30 in both).

Use the best scimitar you can wield at all times (Iron → Steel → Rune → Dragon). Scimitars have the best DPS until you get a whip.

Q15: What's the most efficient order to max all 23 skills? Efficient maxing (used by experienced players aiming for the Max Cape quickly) follows this logic: 
Agility first — Full Graceful outfit from rooftop courses. Faster run energy recovery benefits EVERYTHING. 
Combat through Slayer — Train combat stats through Slayer instead of pure combat grinding. Kill two birds with one stone.

Final Tips — Skills Overview for Beginners 
Train combat skills alongside skilling. Don't neglect Attack, Strength, Defence, and Prayer. Higher combat unlocks better content, which in turn makes skilling easier and more profitable. 
Set milestones, not goals. "Get 99 Woodcutting" feels impossible. "Reach 50 Woodcutting this week" is achievable. Small wins keep you motivated.

ck, skip, and extension decision for Duradel, Nieve, and Konar — backed by 2026 task weighting data.

1. How Blocking & Skipping Works 
Block (100 pts): Permanently prevents a task from your CURRENT master. Each master has their OWN block list now. Skip (30 pts): Cancel current task, get a new one. Better than blocking low-weight bad tasks.

OSRS Tempoross Guide 2026 — Fishing Boss Strategy, Rewards & XP Rates 
📅 Published: June 7, 2026 | ⏱️ 12 min read | ✍️ OSRS Guru 

🌊 Skill Training — Updated June 2026 Tempoross is the fishing skilling boss that turns a traditionally slow skill into an engaging, profitable, and surprisingly fast 99.
title: OSRS Tempoross Guide 2026 — Fishing Boss Strategy, Rewards & XP Rates

text:
g boss that turns a traditionally slow skill into an engaging, profitable, and surprisingly fast 99. This guide covers the core loop, mass vs solo strategy, the double-catch method, reward pool, Spirit Angler outfit, and XP optimization. 
🌊 Tempoross — Quick Reference 
Location: Al Kharid docks (southeast of palace) Min Level: 35 Fishing 
Max XP/hr: ~75K XP/hr (90+ Fishing) Profit: ~100K-200K GP/hr 

1. How Tempoross Works 
Tempoross is a fishing boss on the Al Kharid coastline.
title: OSRS Tempoross Guide 2026 — Fishing Boss Strategy, Rewards & XP Rates

text:
: ~100K-200K GP/hr 

1. How Tempoross Works 
Tempoross is a fishing boss on the Al Kharid coastline. You fish harpoonfish from pools → cook them on the ship → load cooked fish into the cannon → fire at Tempoross to drain its energy. The core loop: Fish → Cook → Load Cannon → Fire → Repeat. 
The ship has two cannons (left and right). Tempoross summons waves of varying intensity that can knock out fires and damage you. Keep both fires burning at all times.
title: OSRS Tempoross Guide 2026 — Fishing Boss Strategy, Rewards & XP Rates

text:
of varying intensity that can knock out fires and damage you. Keep both fires burning at all times. When Tempoross's energy hits 0%, you win and earn reward permits based on contribution. 

2. Mass World Strategy — Fast & Easy XP 
Arrive: Board the ship at Al Kharid docks. Bring a Rope (required) and optionally a Harpoon (Dragon Harpoon if you have one — its spec boosts Fishing +3). 
Fish: Fish from the pools near the cranes. Raw harpoonfish stack in your inventory.
title: OSRS Tempoross Guide 2026 — Fishing Boss Strategy, Rewards & XP Rates

text:
ts Fishing +3). 
Fish: Fish from the pools near the cranes. Raw harpoonfish stack in your inventory. 
Cook: Use raw harpoonfish on the eternal fire next to the mast. Cooked harpoonfish also stack. 
Load Cannon: Click the ammo crate next to either cannon to deposit cooked fish. 
Fire: Click the cannon when Tempoross is in range. Each shot deals 8-10 energy damage. 
Waves: When Tempoross roars, a wave hits. If fires go out, relight them IMMEDIATELY with a tinderbox from the crate.
title: OSRS Tempoross Guide 2026 — Fishing Boss Strategy, Rewards & XP Rates

oross roars, a wave hits. If fires go out, relight them IMMEDIATELY with a tinderbox from the crate. 
Lightning: Tempoross occasionally marks spots on the deck with lightning. Move away — standing in lightning deals 30+ damage. 

3. XP Rates by Level

50-65 ~40-55K Better catch rate. Start experimenting with double-catch. 
65-81 ~55-65K Solid catch rate. Regular harpoonfish.

4. Reward Permits & Pool

Spirit Angler Pieces ~1/300 each 2.5% Fishing XP boost. Priority buy. 
Fish Barrel ~1/400 Holds 28 raw fish. AFK fishing game-changer.

Tome of Water ~1/600 Infinite water runes. Curse spells bonus.

5. Frequently Asked Questions 
Q: Should I cook the fish or load them raw? 
A: Always cook. Cooked harpoonfish deal twice as much damage to Tempoross (10 vs 5 energy per shot). The cooking XP is bonus XP on top of the Fishing XP you're already getting. 

Q: Is Tempoross better than barbarian fishing? 
A: Comparable XP but more profit.

Q: Is Tempoross better than barbarian fishing? 
A: Comparable XP but more profit. Barbarian fishing is slightly faster XP at 90+ but gives zero GP. Tempoross gives ~100K-200K GP/hr in rewards plus the Spirit Angler outfit which boosts all future Fishing XP by 2.5%. Do Tempoross for the outfit + Fish Barrel, then decide which method you prefer. 

🌊 Fishing, But Make It Fun 
Tempoross turns Fishing from a "click and wait" skill into an engaging boss fight with real rewards.

text:
Q: What level should I start Tempoross?
A: You can start at level 35 Fishing on the Tempoross dock in Al Kharid. The XP rates scale with your Fishing level, so every level helps. At 81+ Fishing you get the best harpoonfish catch rate.
title: OSRS Tempoross Guide 2026 — Fishing Boss Strategy, Rewards & XP Rates

text:
Q: How much XP/hr is Tempoross?
A: At level 35: ~30K XP/hr. Level 60: ~50K XP/hr. Level 81: ~65K XP/hr. Level 90+: ~75K XP/hr. The XP is comparable to barbarian fishing but with significantly more profit from reward permits.
title: OSRS Tempoross Guide 2026 — Fishing Boss Strategy, Rewards & XP Rates

text:
Q: What rewards does Tempoross give?
A: Spirit Angler outfit (2.5% Fishing XP boost), Fish Barrel (holds 28 raw fish — amazing for AFK fishing), Tackle Box (stores fishing equipment), and Tome of Water (infinite water runes). Reward permits also give raw fish, noted planks, caskets, and gems worth ~100K-200K GP/hr.
title: OSRS Tempoross Guide 2026 — Fishing Boss Strategy, Rewards & XP Rates

text:
Q: Is Tempoross solo or mass better?
A: Mass worlds (official Tempoross world) are faster XP and easier to learn. Solo Tempoross gives more reward permits per hour but is significantly harder — you must manage both fires, waves, and the energy meter alone. New players should learn on mass worlds first.

📅 Published: June 7, 2026 | ⏱️ 18 min read | ✍️ OSRS Guru 

👹 Boss Guide — Updated June 2026 The Theatre of Blood is the ultimate test of OSRS PvM skill — 6 lethal rooms, culminating in the legendary Verzik Vitur boss fight, all for a chance at the 1.3B GP Scythe of
title: OSRS Theatre of Blood Guide 2026 — Complete ToB Walkthrough, Rooms, Roles & Scythe

text:
ms, culminating in the legendary Verzik Vitur boss fight, all for a chance at the 1.3B GP Scythe of Vitur. This is the most comprehensive ToB guide available, covering every room mechanic, role assignment, gear setup from budget to max, tick-perfect techniques, and how to recover from wipes. 
🎭 Theatre of Blood — Quick Reference 
Location: Meiyerditch, Morytania (boat from Port Phasmatys) Team: 4-man (optimal GP/hr)

Reference

2. Full Gear Setup — Budget to Max
