title: OSRS Theatre of Blood Guide 2026 — Complete ToB Walkthrough, Rooms, Roles & Scythe

text:
Armor Ahrim's Ahrim's + Ancestral Hat Ancestral 
Bring a full gear switch for all 3 combat styles . ToB rooms require specific styles — no single-style approach works. Inventory: 6-8 Saradomin Brews, 3-4 Super Restores, 1 Sanfew Serum, Stamina Potion, Ice Barrage runes, and the rest filled with Anglerfish/Sharks. 

3. Room 1 — Maiden of Sugadinti 🩸 
Difficulty: ⭐⭐⭐ | Style: Melee + Magic 
Maiden summons blood spawns (Nylocas Matomenos) that crawl toward her.
title: OSRS Theatre of Blood Guide 2026 — Complete ToB Walkthrough, Rooms, Roles & Scythe

text:
: ⭐⭐⭐ | Style: Melee + Magic 
Maiden summons blood spawns (Nylocas Matomenos) that crawl toward her. If they reach her, they heal her AND increase her damage. One player (Mage role) must freeze the blood spawns with Ice Barrage. The other 3 players DPS Maiden with Melee. At 70%, 50%, and 30% HP, Maiden spawns a wave of Nylocas — the mage must be ready to freeze each wave. Tip: Stand on the north wall to minimize blood trail damage.
title: OSRS Theatre of Blood Guide 2026 — Complete ToB Walkthrough, Rooms, Roles & Scythe

text:
mage must be ready to freeze each wave. Tip: Stand on the north wall to minimize blood trail damage. Blood trails are the #1 supply drain — move immediately when one spawns under you. 

4. Room 2 — Pestilent Bloat 💀 
Difficulty: ⭐⭐ | Style: Melee 
Bloat patrols the room. When his eyes glow, he charges forward — hide behind a pillar immediately. If Bloat hits you during a charge, you take 40+ damage and he flings you across the room. Between charges, run in and DPS with Melee.
title: OSRS Theatre of Blood Guide 2026 — Complete ToB Walkthrough, Rooms, Roles & Scythe

text:
, you take 40+ damage and he flings you across the room. Between charges, run in and DPS with Melee. Bloat drops meat on the floor — if he walks over it, he heals. Tick-perfect technique: Stand behind the pillar, move out exactly when Bloat turns away, get 2-3 hits, then run back. Experienced teams kill Bloat before the 3rd pillar falls. 

5. Room 3 — Nylocas Vasilias 🕷️ 
Difficulty: ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | Style: ALL 3 styles 
The hardest coordination room. Small Nylocas spawn in 3 colors: Green = Melee only.
title: OSRS Theatre of Blood Guide 2026 — Complete ToB Walkthrough, Rooms, Roles & Scythe

text:
e: ALL 3 styles 
The hardest coordination room. Small Nylocas spawn in 3 colors: Green = Melee only. White = Ranged only. Blue = Magic only. Players split into roles — each player handles one color. Kill ALL small Nylocas before the timer runs out. Then the Vasilias boss spawns — it changes color and protection prayer every few attacks. Match your style to its color. Tick-perfect: Stand 2 tiles from the boss spawn point when the timer hits zero — you get 2 extra hits before it activates.
title: OSRS Theatre of Blood Guide 2026 — Complete ToB Walkthrough, Rooms, Roles & Scythe

text:
tiles from the boss spawn point when the timer hits zero — you get 2 extra hits before it activates. Bring a crossbow + staff switch for your assigned color's boss phase. 

6. Room 4 — Sotetseg 🔮 
Difficulty: ⭐⭐⭐ | Style: Ranged + Melee 
Sotetseg has two devastating mechanics: the shadow ball and the death ball. During shadow ball, the team must stand on the CORRECT tile indicated by a brief flash on the floor — one wrong tile = 50+ damage to the whole team.
title: OSRS Theatre of Blood Guide 2026 — Complete ToB Walkthrough, Rooms, Roles & Scythe

text: ORRECT tile indicated by a brief flash on the floor — one wrong tile = 50+ damage to the whole team. The Maze runner (one player) must memorize the correct path through the shadow maze after Sotetseg's HP drops to 66% and 33%. Other 3 players follow the maze runner. Death ball: Sotetseg charges a massive dark orb — everyone must stand together to split the damage (70+ damage SOLO, ~20 each in a group of 4). Death ball without stacking = dead player.
title: OSRS Theatre of Blood Guide 2026 — Complete ToB Walkthrough, Rooms, Roles & Scythe

text:
t the damage (70+ damage SOLO, ~20 each in a group of 4). Death ball without stacking = dead player. Tick-perfect: The shadow ball shows the correct tile for exactly 2 ticks. The maze runner must count tiles during the maze reveal — use RuneLite's ToB plugin to mark the path. 

7. Room 5 — Xarpus ⚰️ 
Difficulty: ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | Style: All 3 styles 
Phase 1 (Exhumeds): Xarpus spawns 3 exhumeds (skeletons). Kill them one at a time with Melee.
title: OSRS Theatre of Blood Guide 2026 — Complete ToB Walkthrough, Rooms, Roles & Scythe

tyles 
Phase 1 (Exhumeds): Xarpus spawns 3 exhumeds (skeletons). Kill them one at a time with Melee. DO NOT let exhumeds reach Xarpus — each one heals her for 50+ HP. 
Phase 2 (Ranged): Xarpus climbs onto a ledge. Everyone stands at the edges and attacks with Ranged. Xarpus spits poison pools — move away immediately. This phase is a DPS race. 
Phase 3 (Screech): Xarpus drops to the floor. Before each attack, she screeches — anyone standing still when the screech hits takes 80+ damage.

This is the #1 wipe cause at Xarpus. Tick-perfect technique: Use the "walk-and-attack" rhythm — click to move, click Xarpus, click to move. With practice, you maintain full DPS while never standing still. Fang excels here because its attack speed syncs naturally with the walk-and-hit rhythm.

8. Room 6 — Verzik Vitur 🦇 (The Final Boss) 
Difficulty: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | Style: All 3 styles — Hardest PvM in OSRS 
Phase 1 (Pillar): Verzik stays on her throne. Hide behind pillars to avoid her ranged attack. When she shoots the pillar, run to the next one. DPS with Ranged during the brief gaps between pillar shots. DO NOT stand in the open. 
Phase 2 (Electric): Verzik walks around the room.

Phase 2 (Electric): Verzik walks around the room. Attack with Melee during safe windows. She summons electric balls that orbit the room — dodge them or take 30+ damage. When Verzik raises both arms, she summons Nylocas — kill them fast or they heal her. At 35% HP, she enrages — electric balls speed up significantly.

Phase 3 (Tornado) — THE HARDEST MECHANIC IN OSRS: Verzik attacks with ranged bombs (rapid 20+ damage), melee slams (if you're close), and yellow lightning attacks that target every player. NEVER stand under Verzik — her melee slam hits through prayer. When she summons tornadoes, run. Don't attack. Just run. The tornadoes track players and deal massive damage.

Standing still at Xarpus P3. You WILL die. The screech is unforgiving. 
Not stacking for Sotetseg death ball. Split damage or someone dies. Stack tightly.

12. Frequently Asked Questions 
Q: Should I learn ToB before ToA? 
A: No — learn ToA first. ToA's invocation system lets you scale difficulty gradually.

B before ToA? 
A: No — learn ToA first. ToA's invocation system lets you scale difficulty gradually. ToB has no scalable difficulty — every room is punishing from the start. Get comfortable at 150+ invocation ToA, then try ToB Entry Mode. See our ToA Solo Beginner Guide . 

Q: How many KC to get consistent at ToB? 
A: 50-100 KC. Expect to wipe 20+ times before your first completion. By 50 KC, you'll clear consistently with your team. By 100 KC, you'll be carrying learners.

text:
Q: How many players for Theatre of Blood?
A: ToB is designed for 3-5 players, with 4-man being the most common and efficient team size. Entry Mode allows solo practice for learning mechanics. Duo ToB is possible at max efficiency but significantly harder. 4-man teams balance difficulty with the best per-player GP/hr (9M-14M).
title: OSRS Theatre of Blood Guide 2026 — Complete ToB Walkthrough, Rooms, Roles & Scythe

text:
Q: What is the hardest room in ToB?
A: Verzik Phase 3 is widely considered the hardest PvM encounter in all of OSRS. She attacks with rapid ranged bombs, melee slams, tornadoes, and a yellow lightning attack that requires precise movement. Xarpus is the second hardest — the screech mechanic one-shots players who stand still. Sotetseg's death ball phase is the #1 team-wiper for learners.
title: OSRS Theatre of Blood Guide 2026 — Complete ToB Walkthrough, Rooms, Roles & Scythe

text:
Q: What are the best drops from ToB?
A: The Scythe of Vitur (~1.3B GP) is the mega-rare. Ghrazi Rapier (~180M), Sanguinesti Staff (~140M), Justiciar Armor pieces (~30-80M each), and Avernic Defender Hilt (~50M). Expected profit is 9M-14M GP/hr in efficient 4-man teams.
title: OSRS Theatre of Blood Guide 2026 — Complete ToB Walkthrough, Rooms, Roles & Scythe

text:
Q: What stats and gear do I need for ToB?
A: Minimum: 90+ Attack/Strength/Defence, 94+ Magic (for Ice Barrage), 90+ Ranged, 77+ Prayer (Rigour/Augury). Recommended: 99 all combat stats. Gear: Scythe/Fang for melee, Blowpipe + Crossbow for ranged, Trident/Sang + Ice Barrage for magic. Dragon Claws or DDS for spec. Bring full switches for all 3 combat styles.

4. Optimal Beginner Boss Order 
Kephri → Akkha → Ba-Ba → Zebak → Wardens. This saves the trickier fights for later when you have smelling salts and extra supplies.

i (Path of Scabaras) — ⭐⭐

Bait dung piles into one corner.

Shield phase: kill scarabs in Mage → Range → Melee order. 

6. Akkha (Path of Het) — ⭐⭐⭐ 
Switch attack style based on Akkha's overhead prayer. 
Memory puzzle: stand in matching safe quadrant. Fail = massive damage. Use audio cues. 
Clone phase: kill clone → drag Akkha to spot → deal damage. 
Final phase: dump Dragon Dagger specs, dodge orbs.

7. Ba-Ba (Path of Apmeken) — ⭐⭐⭐ 
Run away from ground smash AOE. 
Stand near debris for falling rocks. 
Switch to Range for boulder phase. Blowpipe excels. 

8. Zebak (Path of Crondis) — ⭐⭐ 
Ranged ONLY — never melee! 
Prayer switch: Protect Magic vs pots, Protect Missiles vs rocks.

title: OSRS Wintertodt Complete Guide 2026 — Fast 99 Firemaking, Solo & Mass Strategy, Profit

text:
remaking training method in OSRS — fast XP, profitable crates, and a genuinely enjoyable boss fight. This guide covers mass world speed strategies for max XP, solo methods for max profit, gear setups for every budget, and exactly how to survive the cold. 
🔥 Wintertodt — Quick Reference 
Location: Northern Zeah (Games Necklace teleport) Requirements: 50 Firemaking 
Mass XP/hr (90+): 300K+ XP/hr Solo XP/hr: ~250K XP/hr + Construction XP 
50-99 Time: 35-45 hours (mass) Profit 50-99: 10M-15M GP
title: OSRS Wintertodt Complete Guide 2026 — Fast 99 Firemaking, Solo & Mass Strategy, Profit

text:
olo XP/hr: ~250K XP/hr + Construction XP 
50-99 Time: 35-45 hours (mass) Profit 50-99: 10M-15M GP 

1. How Wintertodt Works 
Wintertodt is a skilling boss in the snowy north of Zeah. You enter the boss chamber, and for ~5 minutes (mass) or up to 15 minutes (solo), you fend off the Wintertodt's cold by feeding the braziers with kindling.
title: OSRS Wintertodt Complete Guide 2026 — Fast 99 Firemaking, Solo & Mass Strategy, Profit

text:
r up to 15 minutes (solo), you fend off the Wintertodt's cold by feeding the braziers with kindling. The core loop: 
Chop Bruma Roots from the trees inside the boss room 
Use the roots on the brazier to create kindling (Fletching XP) 
Feed the kindling to the brazier (Firemaking XP) 
Occasionally fix broken braziers (Construction XP) or light unlit braziers (Firemaking XP) 
Eat food to survive the cold — Wintertodt damages everyone periodically
title: OSRS Wintertodt Complete Guide 2026 — Fast 99 Firemaking, Solo & Mass Strategy, Profit

text:
braziers (Firemaking XP) 
Eat food to survive the cold — Wintertodt damages everyone periodically 
When Wintertodt's energy reaches 0%, you win and earn supply crates 

2. Requirements & Optimal Stats 
Stat Minimum Optimal Why 
Firemaking 50 90+ Higher FM = more points per kindling = more crates 
Hitpoints 10 (ideal!) 10-19 Damage scales with HP.

text:
gher FM = more points per kindling = more crates

Construction 1 30+ Fixing braziers gives Construction XP; higher = faster repairs 
🩸 The 10 HP Meta: Many players intentionally keep 10 HP for Wintertodt because damage taken is 10-15% of your max HP.
title: OSRS Wintertodt Complete Guide 2026 — Fast 99 Firemaking, Solo & Mass Strategy, Profit

text:
Many players intentionally keep 10 HP for Wintertodt because damage taken is 10-15% of your max HP. At 10 HP, you take 1-2 damage per cold hit and heal with cheap cakes. At 99 HP, you take 10-15 damage and need expensive Saradomin Brews. If you're making a new account, do Wintertodt FIRST before training HP.

Mass worlds (309 and 311 are the dedicated WT worlds) have 40+ players per game. Games last ~4-5 minutes. 
Teleport in with a Games Necklace → Wintertodt Camp.

Ignoring pyromancers.

Q: How much GP per hour is Wintertodt in OSRS?
A: GP per hour at Wintertodt scales with your skilling levels. At 50 Firemaking: ~75K-100K GP/hr. At 70+ Woodcutting/Firemaking: ~250K-300K GP/hr. At 90+ all relevant skills: ~450K-525K GP/hr. Max efficiency with 99 in Firemaking, Woodcutting, Herblore, and Fletching: ~525K-600K GP/hr. Higher Herblore level is the single biggest factor in crate value.
title: OSRS Wintertodt Money Making Per Hour 2026 -- GP, Crates & Rewards

text:
Q: What Herblore level is best for Wintertodt crates?
A: The herb tier in your supply crates is determined by your Herblore level. At level 1-24 you get guam/marrentill. At 25-49: harralander/tarromin. At 50-74: ranarr/irit/avantoe/kwuarm. At 75+: snapdragon/cadantine/lantadyme/dwarf weed/torstol. Aim for at least 50 Herblore before grinding Wintertodt for profit. 75+ Herblore maximizes herb value and overall crate GP.
title: OSRS Wintertodt Money Making Per Hour 2026 -- GP, Crates & Rewards

text:
Q: How do I maximise points at Wintertodt?
A: The optimal strategy: (1) Chop Bruma Roots until inventory is full. (2) Fletch all roots into kindling if Fletching is 50+. (3) Feed kindling to lit braziers for points. (4) Fix broken braziers and heal pyromancers for extra points. (5) Relight your brazier immediately if it goes out. The combo of chopping + fletching + feeding yields the most points per minute. Always fletch before feeding -- the extra points from fletching add ~20% to your total.
title: OSRS Wintertodt Money Making Per Hour 2026 -- GP, Crates & Rewards

text:
Q: Can Wintertodt be profitable on an Ironman account?
A: Yes, Wintertodt is one of the best early-game Ironman activities. The supply crates provide seeds, herbs, ores, logs, and fish that would otherwise take hours to gather. The herb drops scale with Herblore level. Many Ironmen start at Wintertodt at 10 HP with low Firemaking to get early supplies with minimal food cost (damage scales with HP). It also provides passive Construction XP from fixing braziers.
title: OSRS Wintertodt Money Making Per Hour 2026 -- GP, Crates & Rewards

The Quest Point Cape is awarded upon completing all quests in Old School RuneScape (currently 170+ quests as of 2026). It's one of the most prestigious untrimmed capes in the game, showing you've mastered every piece of story content Jagex has released.

Item gathering: Keep a list of required quest items and gather them in batches. Many quests share items.

13. FAQ 
Q: How long does Quest Cape take? 
Spacebarring: 40-60 hours of gameplay (2-3 weeks casual). Reading dialogue: 80-120 hours. Ironman: Add 30-50% more time for gathering items and training skills without GE. 
Q: Can I get Quest Cape as a low-level account? 
No.
title: OSRS Quest Cape Roadmap 2026 — Optimal Quest Order & Strategy

text:
athering items and training skills without GE. 
Q: Can I get Quest Cape as a low-level account? 
No. You need minimum ~85 combat, 70+ in most skills, and solid gear for grandmaster boss fights. The lowest combat Quest Cape is typically around ~85-90 combat for experienced players. 
Q: What's the hardest quest? 
Desert Treasure II has the hardest boss fights by far (The Whisperer, The Leviathan, Duke Sucellus, Vardorvis). Song of the Elves has a punishing final boss (Seren fragment).
title: OSRS Quest Cape Roadmap 2026 — Optimal Quest Order & Strategy

text:
Leviathan, Duke Sucellus, Vardorvis). Song of the Elves has a punishing final boss (Seren fragment). Dragon Slayer II has Galvek, which is a DPS check. 
Q: Do I lose Quest Cape when new quests release? 
Yes. You must complete all quests including new releases. When a new quest drops, you lose the ability to equip the cape until you complete it. This is why Quest Cape is considered a "maintenance" achievement. 
Q: Should I get 175 QP for RFD first? 
Absolutely.
title: OSRS Quest Cape Roadmap 2026 — Optimal Quest Order & Strategy

text:
Cape is considered a "maintenance" achievement. 
Q: Should I get 175 QP for RFD first? 
Absolutely. Barrows gloves are the single most important account upgrade from quests. Rush 175 QP, get Barrows gloves, then continue toward Quest Cape with proper gear. 
Q: Best order: RFD first or Quest Cape first? 
RFD first (175 QP) → you'll naturally be halfway to Quest Cape (~125 QP remaining). The Barrows gloves make remaining quest boss fights significantly easier.
title: OSRS Quest Cape Roadmap 2026 — Optimal Quest Order & Strategy

What is Sailing? — Skill Overview 
Sailing is the first new skill added to Old School RuneScape since its 2013 release. It was polled and passed by the community in 2024, with a targeted 2026 release.
title: OSRS Sailing Skill Complete Guide 2026 — From Level 1 to 99 - OSRSGuru

text:
e its 2013 release. It was polled and passed by the community in 2024, with a targeted 2026 release. Sailing introduces a whole new dimension to Gielinor: the seas. 
Sailing is a members-only gathering, PvM, and profit skill. You'll build and upgrade ships, navigate the oceans, explore uncharted islands, engage in naval combat, and establish trade routes that can earn you millions of GP per hour. 
💡 Key Fact: Sailing is trained by doing Sailing-specific activities.

n you millions of GP per hour. 
💡 Key Fact: Sailing is trained by doing Sailing-specific activities. There are no "alternate" ways to train it (like how you can train Strength with Aggressive style). You must sail, explore, fight, and trade!

How to Unlock Sailing 
Sailing is unlocked by completing a short tutorial quest called "The Sailing Primer" .

text:
lock Sailing 
Sailing is unlocked by completing a short tutorial quest called "The Sailing Primer" . Here's how to start: 
Requirements: Must be a members account (P2P). 
Location: Talk to Cap'n Izzy at the Port Sarim Docks (south of Port Sarim). 
Tutorial Length: Approximately 10-15 minutes. 
Rewards: Sailing level 1, a Small Dinghy (starter ship), access to the Sailing skill panel. 
⚠️ Important: F2P players cannot access Sailing. If you're F2P, consider buying a bond (approx.

Sailing Skill Mechanics 
Sailing has several interconnected mechanics that make it unique among OSRS skills. Understanding these mechanics is crucial for efficient training and profit. 
1. Ship Building & Customization 
You'll build ships at Shipyards located in major ports (Port Sarim, Cairn Isle, Port Phasmatys, etc.).
title: OSRS Sailing Skill Complete Guide 2026 — From Level 1 to 99 - OSRSGuru

text:
u'll build ships at Shipyards located in major ports (Port Sarim, Cairn Isle, Port Phasmatys, etc.). Ships have tiers (Tier 1-6), each requiring higher Sailing levels and GP to build. 
Ships can be customized with: 
Cannons: For naval combat (more cannons = more DPS) 
Cargo Slots: For trade routes (more slots = more profit per run) 
Sails: Affects speed (faster = more trips per hour) 
Hull: Affects durability (takes damage in combat/storm) 
Figurehead: Cosmetic, but some give small buffs

fects durability (takes damage in combat/storm)

2. Navigation & Sailing 
To sail, you must: 
Select a destination from your current port. 
Choose your ship (larger ships = slower but more cargo). 
Plot a course (some routes have storms, pirates, or shortcuts). 
Sail! You can AFK during the voyage (similar to Blast Furnace or Fishing Trawler).
title: OSRS Sailing Skill Complete Guide 2026 — From Level 1 to 99 - OSRSGuru

text:
, or shortcuts). 
Sail! You can AFK during the voyage (similar to Blast Furnace or Fishing Trawler). 
Storms and pirate encounters are random events that can give extra XP (if you survive) or damage your ship. 
3. Island Exploration 
As you sail, you'll discover uncharted islands . Each island has: 
Unique Resources: New logs, fish, ores, herbs

5. Trade Routes 
Trade routes are the most profitable part of Sailing. You buy resources at one port and sell them at another for a profit. 
How Trade Routes Work: 
Check the Trade Board at any port for "Hot Trades" (high-demand items). 
Buy the item at the source port (e.g., Karamjan bananas at Musa Point). 
Sail to the destination port (e.g., Port Sarim ).

Repeat! Higher Sailing = access to better trade routes.

Check the Trade Board daily: "Hot Trades" change daily and give 2x profit. 
Use a ship with maximum cargo slots: More cargo = more profit per run. 
Upgrade your sails: Faster ship = more runs per hour. 
Avoid storms: Storms can damage your cargo (losing profit). Check the weather forecast at the port.

Naval combat is ship-to-ship combat on the high seas. It's challenging, risky, but very rewarding. 
Naval Combat Basics 
Cannons: Your main damage source. More cannons = more DPS. 
Ship Maneuvering: You can "kite" enemies (stay at range, shoot, move away). 
Repair: Your ship takes damage. Bring Ship Repair Kits (bought at shipyards).

Frequently Asked Questions 
Q: Is Sailing really the first new skill in OSRS? 
A: Yes! OSRS launched in 2013 with the same skills as 2007 RS. Sailing is the first truly new skill. (RS3 got Archaeology in 2017, but that's a different game.) 
Q: Can F2P players train Sailing? 
A: No, Sailing is members-only.

7, but that's a different game.) 
Q: Can F2P players train Sailing? 
A: No, Sailing is members-only. F2P players will not have access to Sailing content. Consider buying a bond to experience the new skill! 
Q: How long does it take to get 99 Sailing? 
A: Approximately 350-500 hours depending on methods. Profitable methods (trade routes) are slower XP but make GP. Combat methods (naval combat) are faster XP but riskier.
title: OSRS Sailing Skill Complete Guide 2026 — From Level 1 to 99 - OSRSGuru

s (trade routes) are slower XP but make GP. Combat methods (naval combat) are faster XP but riskier. 
Q: What's the best way to make money with Sailing? 
A: High-level trade routes (80+ Sailing) are the most consistent profit (1-3M GP/hour). Boss Ship hunting (90+ Sailing, high combat) can earn 2-5M GP/hour but is risky. 
Q: Do I need high combat stats for Sailing? 
A: Not for trading or exploration. But for naval combat (which is faster XP), you'll want 70+ combat stats.

Q: Can I sink my ship? What happens if I die? 
A: Yes, you can sink your ship in naval combat or storms. If your ship sinks, you lose the ship (must rebuild) and the cargo.

Q: Are there Sailing pets? 
A: Yes! There are several Sailing pets: Crabby (from Crabclaw Atoll tasks), Baby Krakken (from Boss Ship hunting), and Sailing Cat (from reaching 99 Sailing).

Sailing Overview — How the Skill Works 
Sailing is OSRS's first new skill since 2005 (Hunter & Construction).
title: OSRS Sailing Phase 1 Training Maps & Profit Spots 2026

text:
verview — How the Skill Works 
Sailing is OSRS's first new skill since 2005 (Hunter & Construction). You build and captain a ship, explore the ocean, trade cargo, fight naval battles, and discover uncharted islands. 
Key Sailing Mechanics 
Ship Building: Start with a small dinghy. Upgrade to bigger ships (Gold, Magic, Dragon-tier) for more cargo space and combat power. 
Navigation: Use a Sextant + Watch to plot courses. Higher Sailing = more accurate navigation = faster travel.
title: OSRS Sailing Phase 1 Training Maps & Profit Spots 2026

text:
n: Use a Sextant + Watch to plot courses. Higher Sailing = more accurate navigation = faster travel. 
Cargo & Trade: Buy cargo at one port, sail to another, sell for profit. Profit depends on distance, demand, and Sailing level. 
Island Exploration: Discover new islands for XP and unlock fast-travel waypoints. 
Naval Combat: Fight pirate ships and sea monsters for combat XP and loot. 
Fishing at Sea: Special fishing spots only accessible by ship (higher-tier fish than mainland spots).

Best Early Cargo (Levels 1-30) 
Bananas (Karamja → Port Sarim): Buy ~500 GP, sell ~700 GP. Low profit but zero risk. 
Jug of wine (Port Sarim → Brimhaven): Buy ~200 GP, sell ~450 GP. Small profit. 
Steel nails (Port Sarim → Ardougne): Buy ~400 GP, sell ~700 GP. Decent early profit.

Ship Upgrades at 40-60 Sailing 
Oak Ship (40 Sailing): +2 cargo slots. Faster speed. 
Willow Ship (55 Sailing): +4 cargo slots. Can equip 1 naval cannon.

Fishing & Cooking Synergies at Sea 
Sailing unlocks deep-sea fishing spots inaccessible from shore. These spots give higher-tier fish (raw shark, raw manta ray, raw rocktail) and unique sea-only fish.

Cooking at Sea 
You can cook fish on your ship's stove (unlocked at 40 Sailing). This gives Cooking XP while Sailing.
title: OSRS Sailing Phase 1 Training Maps & Profit Spots 2026

text:
ou can cook fish on your ship's stove (unlocked at 40 Sailing). This gives Cooking XP while Sailing. At 80 Cooking + 80 Sailing, you can cook afk on your ship while doing trade runs — dual skill training! 
💡 Dual Training: At 80+ Sailing and 80+ Cooking, you can load your ship with raw fish, sail long routes, and cook them all during the voyage. You get Sailing XP (from sailing) + Cooking XP (from cooking) simultaneously.

Treasure Map Locations & Loot Tables 
Sailing adds a new Treasure Map system. Maps are found in cargo holds, from naval combat loot, or bought from port cartographers. 
Treasure Map Sources 
Cargo Loot Rolls: 1/50 chance when buying cargo at a port (higher Sailing = better odds). 
Naval Combat Loot: 1/10 chance from defeating pirate ships.

Phase 1 Tips & Efficient Training Routes 
Tip 1: Quests Give Free Sailing XP 
Several quests reward Sailing XP. Prioritize these: 
Pirate's Treasure (req none): 2,000 Sailing XP + access to Mos Le'Harmless. 
Cargo of the Kharidian (req 20 Sailing): 5,000 Sailing XP + unlock new trade routes. 
Eastern Expedition (req 50 Sailing): 15,000 Sailing XP + access to Eastern Islands.
title: OSRS Sailing Phase 1 Training Maps & Profit Spots 2026

text:
w trade routes. 
Eastern Expedition (req 50 Sailing): 15,000 Sailing XP + access to Eastern Islands. 
Sojourn to the Sunken Temple (req 65 Sailing): 25,000 Sailing XP + new altar access. 
Tip 2: Use the Optimal Ship for Your Level 
Upgrade your ship as soon as you meet the Sailing req. A better ship means more cargo = more profit per trip = more XP per hour.
title: OSRS Sailing Phase 1 Training Maps & Profit Spots 2026

text:
you meet the Sailing req. A better ship means more cargo = more profit per trip = more XP per hour. 
Tip 3: Combine Sailing with Other Skills 
Sailing is one of the best skills for multi-tasking: 
Sailing + Cooking: Cook raw fish on your ship stove during long voyages. 
Sailing + Fishing: Stop at deep-sea spots during your route. 
Sailing + Agility: Some ports have Agility shortcuts nearby — train both in the same trip. 
Sailing + Prayer: Sunken Temple Island has a boosted Prayer altar.
title: OSRS Sailing Phase 1 Training Maps & Profit Spots 2026

text:
y — train both in the same trip. 
Sailing + Prayer: Sunken Temple Island has a boosted Prayer altar. Sail there, bury bones, get +2x XP. 
Tip 4: Join a Sailing Clan or Discord 
Sailing has group content (naval battles, group trade runs). A clan makes this much easier. Search "OSRS Sailing" on Discord to find active communities. 
Tip 5: Daily Sailing Contracts (When Added) 
Like Farming and Hunter contracts, Sailing may get a contract system.
title: OSRS Sailing Phase 1 Training Maps & Profit Spots 2026

text:
ailing Contracts (When Added) 
Like Farming and Hunter contracts, Sailing may get a contract system. Check with Boss Killers NPCs at ports for daily Sailing contracts — they give bonus XP and loot.

Naval PvP Mechanics Overview 
With the introduction of the Sailing skill in OSRS (poll passed 2023-2024, released in phases through 2025-2026), a completely new dimension of PvP has opened up: Naval Combat .
title: OSRS Sailing PvP Guide 2026 — Naval Combat & Piracy Mechanics - OSRSGuru

text:
leased in phases through 2025-2026), a completely new dimension of PvP has opened up: Naval Combat . 
Naval PvP allows players to engage in ship-to-ship combat on the high seas, loot each other's cargo, and participate in piracy activities. This guide covers everything you need to know about Sailing PvP in 2026.

Basic Requirements for Naval PvP 
Sailing Level: 30+ to participate in PvP (higher levels unlock better ships/equipment) 
A Ship: At least a Small Dhow (purchased from Port Sarim for 50,000 GP) 
Cannon(s): At least 1 Ship Cannon (50,000 GP from Navy vendor) 
Crew: Optional but recommended (hire NPCs or bring friends) 
Tip: Naval PvP is opt-in only.
title: OSRS Sailing PvP Guide 2026 — Naval Combat & Piracy Mechanics - OSRSGuru

vendor) 
Crew: Optional but recommended (hire NPCs or bring friends) 
Tip: Naval PvP is opt-in only. You must raise your Jolly Roger flag to engage in PvP. Ships without the flag are safe from PvP but cannot initiate combat. 
PvP Zones in Navigable Waters 
Not all water is PvP-enabled. The following areas allow naval PvP (with Jolly Roger raised): 
International Waters (south of Port Sarim): Open PvP, no penalty for dying 
The Pirate's Cove (new area): Designated PvP zone with special rewards

The Forsaken Isles (new archipelago): High-level PvP zone (Sailing 70+ recommended) 

Ship Combat Systems 
Ship combat involves three main systems: Cannons , Boarding , and Ramming . Mastering all three is key to victory. 
Cannons 
Cannons are your primary ranged attack.

Cannons 
Cannons are your primary ranged attack. You can equip up to 4 cannons (2 per side) on larger ships.

Cannonball types: You can load different ammunition: 
Standard Cannonball: Balanced damage/range 
Grapeshot: AoE damage to crew (reduces enemy crew efficiency) 
Chain Shot: Damages enemy sails (slows their ship) 
Fire Shot: Sets enemy ship on fire (damage over time) 
Boarding 
Once you've weakened an enemy ship, you can initiate Boarding — a player-vs-player encounter on the enemy's deck.
title: OSRS Sailing PvP Guide 2026 — Naval Combat & Piracy Mechanics - OSRSGuru

text:
eakened an enemy ship, you can initiate Boarding — a player-vs-player encounter on the enemy's deck. 
Boarding is initiated when ships are adjacent (1 tile apart) 
You can board with your character or send your crew 
Boarding combat uses standard OSRS PvP mechanics (prayers, special attacks, etc.) 
If you win the boarding action, you gain access to the enemy's Cargo Hold 
Ramming 
Ramming is a high-risk, high-reward maneuver where you intentionally crash your ship into the enemy.
title: OSRS Sailing PvP Guide 2026 — Naval Combat & Piracy Mechanics - OSRSGuru

text:
Ramming is a high-risk, high-reward maneuver where you intentionally crash your ship into the enemy. 
Deals massive damage to both ships (can sink your own ship!) 
Best used when enemy HP is low and you have high Naval Armor 
Ramming also deals damage to the enemy's Hull Integrity (reduces their max HP) 
Warning: If your ship sinks in PvP, you lose ALL cargo and equipment on board. Your character washes up at the nearest port with only their 3 most valuable items (similar to Death's Office).

Piracy Mechanics — Looting Cargo 
Piracy is the act of attacking other players' ships and stealing their cargo. Here's how the loot system works: 
Cargo Looting Process 
Defeat the enemy ship (sink or surrender) 
Board the ship (if not sunk) 
Access the Cargo Hold (requires 10 seconds of uninterrupted access)
title: OSRS Sailing PvP Guide 2026 — Naval Combat & Piracy Mechanics - OSRSGuru

text:
Board the ship (if not sunk) 
Access the Cargo Hold (requires 10 seconds of uninterrupted access) 
Loot items from the cargo hold (you can take everything or pick selectively) 
What Can Be Looted 
Players can transport trade goods via ships. These are the most valuable loot: 
Cargo Type Value (GP) Notes 
Spices (from Karamja) 500—2,000 per unit High demand in Port Sarim 
Rare Logs (from Feldip) 3,000—8,000 per unit Used in Construction

Rare Fish (from Fishing Trawler) 1,000—5,000 per unit High Cooking XP 
Piracy Skill Check 
Your Sailing level and Thieving level affect how efficiently you loot: 
Sailing 50+: Faster cargo access (10 seconds → 7 seconds)

Tip: If you're pirate hunting, look for ships with the "Merchant Flag" — they have high-value cargo but weak defenses. 

Anti-Piracy Defense Strategies 
If you're transporting valuable cargo, you need to defend against pirates.
title: OSRS Sailing PvP Guide 2026 — Naval Combat & Piracy Mechanics - OSRSGuru

text:
iracy Defense Strategies 
If you're transporting valuable cargo, you need to defend against pirates. Here are the best defense strategies: 
Defensive Build 
The best defense is a well-armored, well-armed ship: 
Heavy Naval Armor: Reduces all damage taken by 15-30% 
Defensive Cannons: Load with Chain Shot to slow pursuers 
Crew: Hire Defender NPCs (high HP, tank damage) 
Escape Module: Emergency teleport to nearest port (once per trip, 30-minute cooldown) 
Evasive Maneuvers
title: OSRS Sailing PvP Guide 2026 — Naval Combat & Piracy Mechanics - OSRSGuru

text:
Module: Emergency teleport to nearest port (once per trip, 30-minute cooldown) 
Evasive Maneuvers 
If you're being chased: 
Raise Sails: Increases speed by 20% (consumes Sailing XP bonus) 
Use Islands: Duck into shallow water where large ships can't follow 
Fog Banks: Sail into fog to break line of sight (randomly appearing weather feature) 
Decoy Cargo: Drop a fake cargo crate (distracts pirates for 30 seconds) 
Defensive Alliances 
You can form temporary alliances with other players:
title: OSRS Sailing PvP Guide 2026 — Naval Combat & Piracy Mechanics - OSRSGuru

text:
pirates for 30 seconds) 
Defensive Alliances 
You can form temporary alliances with other players: 
Convoy: Sail in groups of 2-3 ships. Pirates are less likely to attack a convoy. 
Mercenary Escort: Hire other players to escort your ship (pay them a % of cargo value) 
Warning: The Escape Module teleports your ship to port, but you LOSE all cargo when you use it. Only use as a last resort. 

High-Risk Trade Routes 
Certain trade routes are more dangerous (and more profitable) than others.

Plunder XP unlocks new pirate abilities (e.g., "Grappling Hook" to board faster)

If you die in PvP, you lose 10% of your Plunder Points (similar to PvP stars)

1. Why Train Slayer? 
Slayer is the most popular combat skill in OSRS because it trains all three combat styles at once (Attack, Strength, Defence, Ranged, Magic, and Hitpoints all progress together). It's also one of the most profitable skills — many Slayer tasks earn 1M+ GP/hr while gaining XP.

Profit while training — many tasks earn 500K-5M GP/hr 
Boss unlocks — Slayer points unlock Alchemical Hydra, Cerberus, Kraken, and more 
Superior Slayer drops — Imbued Heart (30M+ GP), Eternal Gem, and Slayer helmet upgrades

10. FAQ 
What is the fastest way to get 99 Slayer in OSRS? 
The fastest route is: Turael (1-20 combat), Vannaka (40-70), Chaeldar (70-85), then Duradel (85-99). Use Ice Barrage in the Catacombs of Kourend for multi-combat tasks (Dust Devils, Nechryael, Abyssal Demons). With a Tier 80+ weapon and Piety, expect 80K-120K Slayer XP/hr from level 75+.

ael, Abyssal Demons). With a Tier 80+ weapon and Piety, expect 80K-120K Slayer XP/hr from level 75+. 

Which Slayer master should I use for max XP? 
Duradel is the best Slayer master for XP from 100 combat / 50 Slayer onward. He assigns high-XP tasks like Nechryael, Abyssal Demons, and Dust Devils. Nieve is a close second if you haven't unlocked Duradel yet. For Wildy tasks, Krystilia gives the most points but has PK risk.

What should I block on Duradel? 
For max XP: Block Black Demons, Hellhounds, Greater Demons, Fire Giants, and Wyverns. For max GP: Block Black Demons, Hellhounds, Steel Dragons, and Fossil Island Wyverns. You need 100 Slayer points per block. Skip (don't block) tasks you can do but don't want to.

How much money can you make with 99 Slayer? 
From 1-99 Slayer, you can earn 200M-500M+ GP depending on your task choices and boss unlocks. High-value tasks: Alchemical Hydra (4.2M-5.4M GP/hr), Cerberus (2M-4M/hr), Grotesque Guardians (1.5M-2.5M/hr), and Abyssal Demons (800K-1.2M/hr).

Unlock bosses as soon as you have the Slayer points: Alchemical Hydra (95 Slayer, 300 points), Cerberus (91 Slayer, 200 points), Kraken (87 Slayer, 200 points), Thermonuclear Smoke Devil (93 Slayer, 200 points), and Grotesque Guardians (75 Slayer, 200 points).

Do I need to imbue my Slayer Helmet at NMZ? 
Yes, absolutely. The imbued Slayer Helmet gives +15-16.67% accuracy and damage for ALL combat styles (melee +15% str bonus, magic/Ranged +15% accuracy). The NMZ grind costs ~1.25M points (~3-4 hours). Without imbuing, you're leaving massive DPS on the table.

Standard burst inventory: 2-3 Prayer Potions, 1 Super Combat Potion, 1-2 Super Restores, 1 Emergency Teleport (Royal Seed Pod / Amulet of Glory), rest Sharks/Monkfish. For bursting: 4-6 Prayer Potions, 2 Super Restores, Blood Blitz/Barrage runes, 1 Teleport.

text:
aid Overview & Lore 
The Vault of Ralos is the first new raid in OSRS since Tombs of Amascut (2022). Set in an ancient underground archive beneath the Southern Islands, this 1-8 player raid tells the story of Ralos, an ancient scholar who sought to preserve all knowledge — but at a terrible cost. 
The raid was released in two phases: 
Phase 1 (Q2 2026): Entry Mode (lower requirements, easier mechanics). 
Phase 2 (Q3 2026): Normal Mode (higher enrage, better drops).
title: OSRS The Vault of Ralos Raid Guide 2026 — Complete Walkthrough & Strategy - OSRSGuru

text:
ower requirements, easier mechanics). 
Phase 2 (Q3 2026): Normal Mode (higher enrage, better drops). 
Raid Lore (Spoiler-Free) 
Ralos was a scholar in the Second Age who believed that all knowledge should be preserved. He built a massive underground archive to store every scroll, tome, and artifact. But his obsession corrupted him — he began trapping the souls of adventurers to power his archive. Now, his avatar guards the vault, and only the bravest adventurers can stop him.

Raid Mechanics Overview 
The Vault of Ralos has several unique mechanics that set it apart from other OSRS raids. 
Core Mechanics 
Knowledge Points (KP): You earn KP by solving puzzles and defeating enemies. KP is used to unlock doors and skip certain mechanics. 
Soul Traps: Ralos trapped souls in crystals.
title: OSRS The Vault of Ralos Raid Guide 2026 — Complete Walkthrough & Strategy - OSRSGuru

text:
KP is used to unlock doors and skip certain mechanics. 
Soul Traps: Ralos trapped souls in crystals. Breaking them frees the souls (gives buffs) but alerts enemies. 
Archive Guardians: Stone golems that patrol the archive. They have specific weaknesses (melee/ranged/magic). 
Ralos's Watchers: Eye-like sentries that detect players. If detected, all enemies in the room become aggressive. 
The Collapsing Archive: Throughout the raid, the archive collapses.
title: OSRS The Vault of Ralos Raid Guide 2026 — Complete Walkthrough & Strategy - OSRSGuru

text:
in the room become aggressive. 
The Collapsing Archive: Throughout the raid, the archive collapses. You must reach safe zones before the room collapses. 
Combat Mechanics 
Enrage System: Each time you die, the remaining enemies get +5% damage/accuracy (stackable). 
Prayer Draining: Certain enemies drain prayer rapidly. Bring extra prayer potions! 
Phase Transitions: Bosses have multiple phases with new mechanics each phase. 
Shared Damage: Some mechanics deal damage to all players in the room.

ith new mechanics each phase. 
Shared Damage: Some mechanics deal damage to all players in the room. Spread out! 
⚠️ Enrage Warning: If your team dies more than 3 times in a run, the enrage penalty makes the raid extremely difficult. Play safe, don't rush! 

Room-by-Room Strategies 
The Vault of Ralos has 5 main rooms (plus the final boss room). Here's a detailed strategy for each. 
Room 1: The Archive Entrance 
Mechanic: Navigation puzzle — light the correct braziers in order.
title: OSRS The Vault of Ralos Raid Guide 2026 — Complete Walkthrough & Strategy - OSRSGuru

text:
h. 
Room 1: The Archive Entrance 
Mechanic: Navigation puzzle — light the correct braziers in order. 
Objective: Light 5 braziers in the correct sequence (shown by symbols on the wall). 
Strategy: Assign 1 player to read the symbols, others to light braziers. If you light the wrong one, all braziers extinguish (restart). 
Enemies: Archive Spiders (weak to stab attacks). 
Tip: The sequence is always the same per run.
title: OSRS The Vault of Ralos Raid Guide 2026 — Complete Walkthrough & Strategy - OSRSGuru

text:
t). 
Enemies: Archive Spiders (weak to stab attacks). 
Tip: The sequence is always the same per run. Write it down! 
Room 2: Hall of Whispers 
Mechanic: Stealth — avoid sound-sensitive enemies. 
Objective: Cross the hall without making sound (running, attacking, or certain prayers make sound). 
Strategy: Walk (don't run), don't attack, turn off prayers. Use Silence spell (Magic level 55+) to mute footsteps. 
Enemies: Whispering Shadows (detect sound, insta-kill if they catch you).

Enemies: Whispering Shadows (detect sound, insta-kill if they catch you). 
Tip: If detected, run to the exit! Don't fight — just escape. 
Room 3: The Relic Guardians 
Mechanic: Defeat 3 mini-bosses simultaneously. 
Objective: Defeat Guardian of Strength, Guardian of Wisdom, and Guardian of Defence within 30 seconds of each other. 
Strategy: Split team: 1 player per guardian (if 3 players) or focus fire one at a time (if less than 3).

Tip: If you kill one too early, the others enrage (+20% damage). Time your kills!

Room 4: Ralos's Library 
Mechanic: Memory puzzle — match ancient texts. 
Objective: Find 5 matching pairs of ancient texts (memory game).

Final Boss: Ralos Avatar Strategy 
The final boss of the Vault of Ralos is the Ralos Avatar , a multi-phase fight with complex mechanics. 
Phase 1: The Scholar's Form (HP 1000-700) 
Attack Style: Magic (艾魔法攻击, 艾魔法攻击). 
Special Attack: Knowledge Blast — AoE magic attack (prayer protect from magic). 
Mechanic: Ralos summons Archive Spirits (small adds).
title: OSRS The Vault of Ralos Raid Guide 2026 — Complete Walkthrough & Strategy - OSRSGuru

text:
AoE magic attack (prayer protect from magic). 
Mechanic: Ralos summons Archive Spirits (small adds). Kill them quickly (they heal Ralos). 
Strategy: Tank with protect from magic, DPS with ranged (Ralos is weak to ranged in this phase). 
Phase 2: The Corrupted Form (HP 700-300) 
Attack Style: Melee + Magic (dual attack). 
Special Attack: Soul Drain — Drains 50% of current prayer points.

Phase 3: The Avatar's True Form (HP 300-0) 
Attack Style: All styles (melee, ranged, magic).

Which Mode Should You Play? 
New to Raids: Start with Entry Mode. Learn mechanics without the pressure of high damage. 
Mid-Level Account (70-85 stats): Stick to Entry Mode. Normal Mode will be too hard. 
Endgame Account (85+ stats, BIS gear): Play Normal Mode for better drops and challenge.

Tips 
Ironmen have unique considerations for the Vault of Ralos. Here are tips for Ironman accounts. 
Ironman-Specific Tips 
Prioritize Entry Mode: Lower requirements, easier to get your first few uniques for progression. 
Group Up: Find an Ironman clan or group. Raiding solo as Ironman is extremely difficult. 
Supply Management: Bring your own supplies (food, potions). Don't rely on teammates to share. 
Target Specific Drops: Example: Archivist's Robes are huge for mage Ironmen.

Common Mistakes & How to Avoid Them 
Even experienced raiders make mistakes. Here are the most common ones in the Vault of Ralos. 
Mistake 1: Rushing Without Learning Mechanics 
The Mistake: Jumping into Normal Mode without understanding mechanics. The Fix: Complete Entry Mode 5-10 times first. Learn each room's mechanic. 
Mistake 2: Not Bringing Enough Supplies 
The Mistake: Running out of prayer potions or food mid-raid.
title: OSRS The Vault of Ralos Raid Guide 2026 — Complete Walkthrough & Strategy - OSRSGuru

text:
istake 2: Not Bringing Enough Supplies 
The Mistake: Running out of prayer potions or food mid-raid. The Fix: Overprepare! Bring 15+ prayer potions and 20+ food for Normal Mode. 
Mistake 3: Ignoring the Enrage System 
The Mistake: Dying multiple times and making the raid impossible. The Fix: Play safe! If you die, it's okay — but try to minimize deaths. 
Mistake 4: Bad Team Composition 
The Mistake: All DPS, no tank or support.

try to minimize deaths. 
Mistake 4: Bad Team Composition 
The Mistake: All DPS, no tank or support. The Fix: Have at least 1 tank (high defence, prayer) and communicate roles. 
Mistake 5: Not Using Voice Comms 
The Mistake: Relying on text chat (too slow for raids). The Fix: Use Discord or in-game voice chat for Normal Mode. 
⚠️ Final Warning: The Vault of Ralos is a challenging raid. Don't get discouraged if you don't clear it on your first try.

Frequently Asked Questions 
Q: Can I solo the Vault of Ralos? 
A: Yes, Entry Mode is solo-able with 90+ combat stats and BIS gear. Normal Mode is possible solo but extremely difficult (recommended 3-5 players). 
Q: What's the best way to find a team? 
A: Join the OSRS Raid Discord or find a clan that does raids.
title: OSRS The Vault of Ralos Raid Guide 2026 — Complete Walkthrough & Strategy - OSRSGuru

text:
: What's the best way to find a team? 
A: Join the OSRS Raid Discord or find a clan that does raids. You can also use the in-game grouping system (Grouping tab). 
Q: How long does a raid run take? 
A: Entry Mode: 25-45 minutes (depending on team size and experience). Normal Mode: 35-60 minutes. 
Q: Are the drops tradeable? 
A: Most drops are tradeable (GP items). Some items (like the pet) are untradeable. Ironmen cannot trade drops.

A: No, there's no in-game scanner. You must manually read the symbols and remember the sequence.
